### 1. 元旦特辑：2026 祝福四格拼图

**作者**: [松果先森](https://x.com/songguoxiansen/status/2005822648027091031)  **日期**: 2025-12-30  **语言**: zh

> 这是一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细多面板提示，用于创建一个 2x2 网格照片拼贴画。画面中，一位女性角色身着四套不同的服装，在四个不同的场景中拼凑一个拼图，拼图的中心显示“2026 新年快乐”。该提示详细说明了面部特征的精确保留、服装细节、背景元素以及时尚杂志风格的照片参数。

![元旦特辑：2026 祝福四格拼图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1767455034932_ivuvu0_G9V-MszakAEAIBw.jpg)

```
[关键:保持精确的面部特征,保留原始脸部结构,图中角色与上传参考图完全一致] 高级摄影棚2x2宫格写真。左上格(海军蓝背景):人物穿海军蓝色制服风连衣裙,金色纽扣装饰,复古卷发配蓝色贝雷帽和珍珠耳环,她双手托举一块巨大的拼图块(左上角块,上面有"20"数字),向画面中心方向移动,眼神专注地看向中心拼图区域,表情认真,嘴角微笑,背景有海军条纹、船锚、"启航新年"字样。右上格(樱花粉背景):同一女性穿粉色蕾丝连衣裙,珍珠项链,公主头配粉色玫瑰花发夹和水晶耳环,她双手托举右上角拼图块(上面有"26"数字)向中心移动与左上格拼接,眼神看向拼图接缝处,表情专注期待,身体前倾,背景有粉色樱花、"美好相遇"字样、蝴蝶、花瓣。左下格(薄荷绿背景):同一女性穿薄荷绿色棉麻连衣裙,文艺风格,自然长发配绿色发带和木质耳环,她双手托举左下角拼图块(上面有"元旦"字样)向上移动与左上格对接,眼神看向拼图,表情认真,嘴巴微微抿起,背景有绿色植物、"希望生长"字样、新芽、叶子。右下格(柠檬黄背景):同一女性穿黄色连衣裙,向日葵图案,双马尾配黄色蝴蝶结,她双手托举最后一块右下角拼图(上面有"快乐"字样)完成拼图,四块拼图在画面中心完美拼成"2026元旦快乐"完整图案,她头后仰,眼睛看向完成的拼图,脸上洋溢着成功喜悦的笑容,画面中心爆出金色光芒和彩纸,背景有黄色太阳、"圆满成功"字样、笑脸、向日葵。四格之间拼图从四角汇聚到中心形成完整画面,清透妆容,明亮环形光,85mm镜头,f/1.8光圈,拼图互动四联构图,时尚杂志风格。
```

### 3. Nano Banana Pro 巨型产品艺术装置提示词

**作者**: [Oogie](https://x.com/oggii_0/status/2041461023320785077)  **日期**: 2026-04-07  **语言**: en

> 这是一份针对 Nano Banana Pro 的高精度提示词，旨在保留产品参考图的精确细节，并将其置于欧洲现代城市广场中，呈现为一座 10 米高的巨型艺术装置，采用写实纪录片摄影风格。

![Nano Banana Pro 巨型产品艺术装置提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775631284710_luaxfn_HFS5-Z5bIAA5wAG.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 巨型产品艺术装置提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775631284769_h4h8o6_HFS5-Z6bcAAv5-F.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 巨型产品艺术装置提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775631284729_h59oc2_HFS5-bHacAAHDov.jpg)

```
CRITICAL: Preserve the product exactly as it is. Do not alter its shape, color, proportions, label, text, logo, texture, or any detail. Only change the scale and surrounding environment.

Place this product as a GIANT art installation in the middle of a city square. The product is enormous — approximately {argument name="size" default="10 meters"} tall, towering over the people walking around it. It sits directly on the pavement as if it was placed there by a crane for a brand activation event.

Small people around the base of the giant product for scale — some walking past, some stopping to look up, some taking photos with their phones. The people reach only to the bottom edge of the product, showing how massive it is.

City environment: a modern European city square with clean architecture, stone pavement, trees, and buildings in the background. Blue sky with a few white clouds. The scene looks like a real public art installation or a guerrilla marketing stunt.

The giant product casts a realistic large shadow on the pavement matching the sun direction. The lighting on the product matches the outdoor sunlight — warm natural daylight from above, same color temperature as the surrounding buildings and street.

Shot from street level, slightly looking up at the giant product. Wide angle 24mm lens, f/8. The scene must look believably real — as if someone took a photo of an actual giant product placed in a city. Photorealistic street photography, documentary style.
```

> 一份高度详细的提示词，用于生成一张空灵且细节丰富的户外肖像：一位身着田园风连衣裙的年轻女性坐在梦幻森林的庭院长椅上，指尖停着一只发光的蓝色蝴蝶。

![使用 Nano Banana Pro 创作空灵肖像的提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775631281522_jc7mw0_HFR1MeOaEAAbQsT.jpg)
![使用 Nano Banana Pro 创作空灵肖像的提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775631282518_pn1ms1_HFR1MeTbYAATXVq.jpg)

```
An ethereal, high-detail outdoor portrait of a young woman seated on a moss-covered, ornate wrought-iron garden bench in a dreamy forest setting. She has long, braided, wavy brown hair and a soft, curious expression as she gazes at a delicate, glowing blue butterfly resting on her outstretched left index finger.
She wears a cottagecore-inspired dress in light blue and white, featuring wide satin straps, a sweetheart neckline, and a structured white bust panel adorned with intricate blue floral embroidery, ribbon details, central flower appliqués, and small black bow accents. The skirt includes a sheer white tulle overlay decorated with tiny blue floral sprigs.
Her right arm rests gently by her side, while her left arm is raised toward the butterfly. She accessorizes with a light-blue beaded headpiece with a soft veil and small pearl floral earrings.
The environment is lush and magical, with soft, dappled natural light filtering through trees. Fine details are visible in the embroidery, moss texture, and the butterfly’s wings. Shot with a shallow depth of field, creating a soft, dreamy bokeh background of blurred foliage. Ultra-realistic, cinematic, 8K resolution.
```

### 8. 尴尬的 NFT 叠罗汉全家福

**作者**: [Edizkan ⭕🦇](https://x.com/edizkan_/status/2039929647354220786)  **日期**: 2026-04-03  **语言**: en

> 这是一个复杂且结构化的提示词，旨在生成一张刻意营造尴尬、俏皮感的摄影棚全家福。通过将上传的角色（NFT）强行组合成“不自然且略显局促的人体堆叠”，同时严格保留其原始特征与比例。

![尴尬的 NFT 叠罗汉全家福](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775284630106_bqzj2n_HE9Gt2ybcAA8Qh6.jpg)

```
A deliberately awkward and playful studio family portrait featuring uploaded characters.  The composition must recreate the feeling of an unnatural, slightly uncomfortable human stack — similar to classic awkward family portraits where people are leaning, sitting on each other, or balancing in strange but stable ways.  ---  🔒 IDENTITY LOCK (CRITICAL)  Each character must strictly preserve: • original AKCB proportions (large head, short limbs) • eye shape, spacing, stylization • balaclava fully covering nose and mouth (never visible) • original materials, textures, and colors  All characters must remain equal in scale. No size drift. No realism increase.  ---  🧱 STRUCTURE SYSTEM — “AWKWARD STACK LOGIC” (CORE)  The group must form a **stacked or interlocked structure** using their bodies.  Use combinations like: • one character acting as a base (lying or crouched) • one sitting sideways on another’s back or legs • one perched or kneeling on top • one leaning awkwardly across others for balance • limbs used as support points (shoulders, knees, backs)  The pose should feel: • slightly uncomfortable   • physically questionable but still believable   • intentionally staged and awkward    Avoid clean posing. Avoid symmetry.  ---  ⚖️ BALANCE RULE (IMPORTANT)  Even though the pose is silly: • the structure must feel physically possible   • weight distribution must make sense   • characters must visibly support each other    No floating. No broken physics.  ---  😐 EXPRESSION & BODY LANGUAGE  • neutral or mildly serious expressions (contrast with silly pose) • relaxed faces, awkward bodies • no exaggerated cartoon acting  ---  📸 STUDIO STYLE  • classic portrait studio background (gray / muted color / soft gradient) • soft even lighting • subtle shadows grounding each character • clean, slightly outdated family photo aesthetic  ---  🎯 COMPOSITION  • full body of all characters visible • clear stacking hierarchy (bottom → middle → top) • no messy overlaps hiding faces  ---  🚫 NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS  • no extra limbs   • no merging of characters   • no pose duplication   • no symmetry   • no action poses (this is static portrait energy)   • no extreme exaggeration    ---  ✨ VARIATION ENGINE  Each generation must create a DIFFERENT awkward stacked pose using the same logic.  Examples of variation: • pyramid stack • sideways bench stack • diagonal leaning tower • tangled sitting cluster • “one person is clearly struggling” composition
ar 1:1
```

**Related**: [[综合艺术]]、[[建筑摄影]]、[[综合动漫]]

### 9. 2000 年代初风格：身着粉色西装外套的人物数码照片

**作者**: [Chryz leen](https://x.com/Chryzleenprompt/status/2039470296743444885)  **日期**: 2026-04-01  **语言**: en

> 这是一个高度具体的提示词，用于生成具有 2000 年代初数码相机风格的超写实照片。画面主体身着色彩鲜艳的超大款粉色西装外套，坐在欧洲鹅卵石街道旁的咖啡桌前。包含详细的负面提示词以确保图像质量。

![2000 年代初风格：身着粉色西装外套的人物数码照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775112275466_xthbhz_HE2nbIfaUAAYIRK.jpg)

```
Create image: Use the attached reference image as a visual guide for the character’s appearance. Preserve key visual traits such as facial structure and overall proportions, while allowing small natural variations typical of real photography. The generated subject should clearly resemble the reference while remaining a natural photographic interpretation.
A hyper-realistic photograph in the style of an authentic early 2000s digital photo captures the subject seated at a round marble-topped café table on a narrow European cobblestone street. The subject is positioned in a medium-wide shot, angled three-quarters toward the camera with the right elbow resting on the tabletop and the chin cradled gently in the palm of the hand. The person’s legs are crossed at the knee, with the top leg extended forward to reveal white low-top sneakers with flat cotton laces. The subject wears a vibrant, saturated {argument name="blazer color" default="bubblegum-pink"} oversized blazer with structured shoulders and wide notched lapels, paired with straight-leg light-wash denim jeans featuring exaggerated four-inch cuffs at the hem. A rectangular fuchsia pink clutch with a hard-shell finish rests on the table beside a small glass. The makeup aesthetic features a frosted pink lip with a high-shine gloss and a shimmering pale eyeshadow. The voluminous, long wavy hair is styled in heavy, face-framing layers. The background is a detailed urban scene with a massive stone medieval tower rising at the end of a corridor of multi-story buildings in shades of ochre and terracotta, decorated with climbing green vines and retractable canvas awnings. The image exhibits the distinct qualities of a vintage point-and-shoot camera, including a slight overexposure from a direct flash, noticeable digital noise in the shadows, and a flattened dynamic range that emphasizes the electric saturation of the pink attire against the weathered textures of the cobblestone street.
Aspect Ratio: 3:4

Negative:
extra limbs, extra hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, dislocated hands, broken wrists, unnatural hand pose, twisted arms, duplicated body parts, bad anatomy, incorrect anatomy, broken anatomy, impossible pose, warped body, distorted proportions, ai artifacts, poorly drawn hands, malformed anatomy
```

### 11. 东南亚街头小吃摊前年轻人的纪实街拍

**作者**: [Ciri](https://x.com/Ciri_ai/status/2039277904174145949)  **日期**: 2026-04-01  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 nano-banana-pro 设计的详细图像生成提示词，旨在创作一幅纪实风格的街拍场景。提示词明确了场景（繁忙的东南亚街头小吃摊，提供印尼菜肴）、主体（两名身穿电竞风格球衣的年轻人）、他们的表情与站位，以及详细的摄影参数（柔和日光、35mm 镜头、浅景深、纪实写实风格）。

![东南亚街头小吃摊前年轻人的纪实街拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775112287609_eqfrnb_HEz4cDibIAA899A.jpg)

```
A candid street photography shot of two young Asian adults standing in front of a small Southeast Asian street food stall. The stall is packed with colorful menu boards and food photos, featuring dishes like {argument name="dishes" default="nasi goreng and ayam penyet"}, with prices in Indonesian rupiah. The signage is slightly worn and layered, giving a busy, authentic hawker-style atmosphere.
In the foreground, a young woman stands facing slightly to the right, looking off-camera with a neutral, calm expression. She has straight black shoulder-length hair, wears a black baseball cap and large over-ear headphones, and is dressed in a black, white, and red esports-style jersey with bold graphics and text. Her hands are casually in her pockets, posture relaxed.
Behind her, slightly leaning forward, is a young man with short dark hair and glasses. He wears a similar black and red esports jersey and light blue jeans. He is positioned slightly to her left and is looking at her with a subtle, curious expression, creating a natural candid moment.
Lighting is soft daylight, slightly overcast, with natural shadows. The composition feels spontaneous and documentary-style, with a sharp focus on the subjects and a richly detailed, slightly cluttered background. Colors are vibrant but realistic, emphasizing the reds, yellows, and food imagery from the stall.
Style keywords: candid photography, street photography, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural light, documentary realism, urban Southeast Asia, authentic, high detail
Camera settings (optional):
35mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 200, natural lighting, eye-level angle
```

### 12. Nano Banana Pro 自我介绍卡生成提示词

**作者**: [貴朱音（たかね）📸 むちこ](https://x.com/ShynUrab70521/status/2039079966554624444)  **日期**: 2026-03-31  **语言**: ja

> 这是一个为 nano banana 图像生成模型设计的详细结构化提示词模板，用于创建“自我介绍卡”图像。它指定了格式、文本字段（姓名、家庭、爱好、性格等）、字体样式、调色板和装饰元素，以实现“梦幻可爱”（Yumekawa）和少女感的审美风格。

![Nano Banana Pro 自我介绍卡生成提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1775026365180_zwse4r_HExDlwsaoAABrCX.jpg)

```
format: "self_intro_sheet"
text:
  title: "自己紹介シート"
  fields:
    名前: "{argument name="名前" default="おなまえ"}"
    家族: "{argument name="家族" default="お父さん、お母さん、妹"}"
    血液型: "A型"
    趣味: "カフェめぐり、写真を撮ること"
    性格: "明るい、よく笑う、マイペース"
    休日は: "友だちとお出かけしたり、かわいいお店を探したりする"
    好きな物: "プリン、いちご、かわいい服、おしゃれなカフェ"
    好みのタイプ: "やさしくて思いやりがある人"
    嫌いな物: "苦いもの"
    一言メッセージ: "仲よくしてくれるとうれしいです"

font:
  title: "ふんわりした太めの丸文字"
  label: "やさしい手書き風"
  body: "ポップな読みやすい丸文字"
  color: "ピンク色"

vibe:
  overall: "ゆめかわ、ガーリー、やさしくて甘い雰囲気"
  colors:
    - "ピンク"
    - "ラベンダー"
    - "ベビーブルー"
  decorations:
    - "犬"
    - "熊"
    - "ライオン"
    - "猫"
```

She has an athletic, fit, and highly toned physique with accentuated muscle definition and a full bust. She is seated and reclining on a robust, glossy green leg press machine, her torso resting against a detailed black leather backrest featuring a well-defined hexagonal pattern. Her hands are positioned near her head, resting on the bench with elbows pointing outward, while her legs are elevated and bent at the knees, prepared to push the silver metal foot platform.
She is wearing a highly vibrant, form-fitting bright white two-piece sports set with a subtle sheen, consisting of a cropped scoop-neck sports bra with thin straps and high-waisted sports shorts, with highly visible fabric micro-texture. Her hair is styled in a sleek, tightly pulled-back ponytail with a natural shine. Her facial expression is intensely focused and determined, looking slightly upward and to the side. Her face features highly realistic, smooth skin with subtle visible pores, defined facial features, and light, luminous, refined makeup. She wears a slightly reflective black smartwatch on her left wrist.
The setting is a brightly lit, visually dynamic commercial gym. The background has a controlled, soft depth-of-field blur, showcasing silver metal frames, black and vibrant blue stacked weight plates, and large mirrors reflecting the ambient light and a vibrant color palette of neon orange, bright white, intense green, deep black, and shiny silver. The lighting is intense, artificial high-key illumination with strong highlights, creating sharp reflections on the metal equipment and soft, defined shadows that beautifully emphasize the contours, volume, and firmness of her legs and core.
The overall mood is extremely energetic, powerful, and dynamic. Captured in a medium shot from a low side angle with a slightly dramatic perspective to emphasize depth and presence. Ultra-sharp 8K resolution, sharp focus on the subject, micro-details visible. Aspect ratio 9:16.
```

### 23. 九宫格竖版编辑布局，猫咪主题，适用于 Nano Banana Pro

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2037212451138085061)  **日期**: 2026-03-26  **语言**: en

> 给 Nano Banana Pro 的一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一个 3x3 的编辑肖像网格，要求严格保留上传女性在所有面板中的身份，展示她与一只逼真的蓝眼睛白色范猫亲密互动，背景设在一个光线柔和的干净简约工作室中。

![九宫格竖版编辑布局，猫咪主题，适用于 Nano Banana Pro](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774594331898_pcosnb_HEWh3AvXoAA2LEy.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded woman as the exact subject. Keep her face, skin tone, proportions, and natural beauty identical. Create a 3x3 editorial portrait grid where she appears in all panels with subtle but professionally styled pose variations. She is holding and interacting lovingly with a small white Van cat with bright blue eyes. The cat must look adorable, elegant, calm, and photorealistic. The interactions should feel affectionate, natural, and editorial, including gentle cuddling, kissing the cat, holding it close, and soft cheek-to-fur contact.

Subject: Same woman from reference image with long straight brunette hair, natural flow, consistent across panels. Soft natural glam, glowing skin, neutral lips, defined eyes. Minimal white tank top and light blue jeans, unchanged across all panels. Small fluffy white Van cat with vivid blue eyes, elegant face, soft fur, photorealistic, anatomically correct, consistent across panels.

Scene: Clean minimal studio with soft neutral background. Soft daylight, diffused, even skin illumination. Intimate, calm, warm, affectionate, natural, effortless beauty.

Panel directions: panel_1 - holding the white blue-eyed Van cat close to her chest, face near the cat, soft affectionate expression; panel_2 - direct eye contact with camera while gently cradling the cat in her arms, calm editorial pose; panel_3 - looking lovingly at the cat, cheek softly touching its fur, intimate and tender moment; panel_4 - kissing the cat gently on the head, elegant posture, soft emotional beauty portrait; panel_5 - hero center pose, holding the cat securely and naturally, confident and warm editorial composition; panel_6 - slight smile while hugging the cat close, relaxed shoulders, soft luxury portrait feeling; panel_7 - three-quarter profile, cat nestled in her arms, graceful neck line, refined magazine-style composition; panel_8 - chin slightly lifted, cat close to her shoulder, poised and elegant gaze, affectionate but polished; panel_9 - soft turn toward camera while cuddling the cat, serene expression, intimate final frame.

Pose language: very subtle, refined model-like shifts only. Soft, confident, loving, elegant expression. Natural and gentle hands, securely supporting the cat with realistic hand placement. Elongated neck, relaxed shoulders, subtle editorial asymmetry. Gentle cuddling, soft kissing, cheek contact, loving embrace, calm cat handling.

Camera: 85mm portrait lens, close-up to mid shot framing, eye-level angle, sharp focus on eyes, skin texture, and cat fur detail, soft background blur depth of field.

Output style: clean_beauty_editorial, ultra_skin_detail sharpness, very_subtle grain, soft_natural dynamic range, neutral_skin_tone color grade. 4:5 aspect ratio, portrait orientation, ultra_high_res resolution. 3x3 grid layout with thin gutter, no outer border, maximum_identity_lock panel consistency.

Must have: 3x3 grid, same woman in all panels, perfect identity preservation, small white blue-eyed Van cat, natural affectionate interaction with the cat, photorealistic cat anatomy and fur, natural skin texture, clean background, subtle but professional pose variations, editorial beauty portrait feeling, no text.

Negative prompt: identity change, different outfit, different cat color, extra animals, cat distortion, mutated cat face, unrealistic fur, bad anatomy, extra fingers, awkward pose, stiff expression, heavy makeup, harsh lighting, plastic skin, low quality, text, logo, watermark.
```

### 27. Sadie Sink 现代公寓写真

**作者**: [J⭕DIE](https://x.com/Jodie_Noraa/status/2036874081677857255)  **日期**: 2026-03-25  **语言**: en

> 三个独立的提示，供 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 使用，以生成 Sadie Sink 在一个现代公寓里休憩的逼真图像，她身穿白色罗纹背心和蓝色牛仔裤，重点关注不同的角度和光照条件。

![Sadie Sink 现代公寓写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774508272967_qj0sut_HERuGOZbYAAqu1z.jpg)
![Sadie Sink 现代公寓写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774508272855_pyzcv6_HERuHdmbcAAF1CQ.jpg)
![Sadie Sink 现代公寓写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774508272889_9guduw_HERuE5fbYAIcCA6.jpg)

```
A high-angle, close-up shot of a young woman with vibrant red hair and light freckles lounging on a grey plush sectional sofa. She is lying on her stomach, propped up on her elbows, looking directly into the lens with a calm expression. She wears a simple white ribbed tank top and blue denim jeans. Her hair is slightly damp, with a single wet curl draped over her forehead. In the soft-focus background, a modern open-concept apartment is visible, featuring dark wood kitchen cabinetry, a distinctive bright red retro-style refrigerator, and warm track lighting. Her bare feet are playfully kicked up in the air behind her.

---

A medium-wide shot capturing the woman from a slightly different angle as she rests on the grey sofa. She is positioned horizontally across the frame, lying on her chest with her legs crossed at the ankles and lifted upward. Her face is turned toward the camera with a subtle, relaxed smile, highlighting her rosy cheeks and clear blue eyes. The lighting is warm and domestic, casting soft shadows across the living area. The background remains consistent, showing the kitchen area and a hallway with a decorative mural on the wall, creating an intimate, "at-home" atmosphere.

---

A front-facing perspective of the woman propping herself up on the sofa with both hands planted firmly on the cushions. She is leaning forward toward the camera, her red hair appearing wet or styled with product, pulled back away from her face. She wears the same white tank top and blue jeans, with her freckled arms and shoulders prominent in the foreground. Her legs are still bent at the knees in the background. The scene is illuminated by the overhead warm lights of the apartment, emphasizing the contrast between the dark kitchen units and the pops of color like the red fridge.
```

### 29. 静奢 户外 专题肖像

**作者**: [glena Jenner](https://x.com/GlenaJenne/status/2036805054636974494)  **日期**: 2026-03-25  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化提示词，供 Nano Banana 2 生成一张奢华的户外时尚肖像，带有柔和复古美学风格，主角是一位年轻女性（身份信息保留自参考图片），身穿修身白色连衣裙，手持茶杯，靠近一座古典石质喷泉。

![静奢 户外 专题肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774508275028_0dfxwp_HEQvYoDbUAAnQSr.jpg)
![静奢 户外 专题肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774508275035_tiuxzt_HEQvZU_bkAAmBcw.jpg)

```
{
"photo_type":"luxury outdoor editorial portrait, soft vintage aesthetic",

"subject":{
"type":"young woman",
"use_reference_image":true,
"face_reference":true,
"preserve_identity":true,
"instruction":"strictly use the provided reference face, do NOT change facial structure, skin tone, eye color, or hair color",
"pose":"standing near a classical stone fountain, holding a small teacup delicately in one hand, body slightly angled, relaxed elegant posture",
"expression":"calm confident expression, soft serious gaze"
},

"appearance":{
"hair":"same as reference image, styled softly with volume, unchanged color",
"eyes":"same as reference image, unchanged",
"skin":"natural glowing skin with warm sunlight highlights",
"makeup":"soft glam, warm tones, subtle blush and highlight"
},

"outfit":{
"clothing":"{argument name="clothing description" default="fitted white luxury mini dress with structured details"}",
"accessories":[
"long elegant gloves",
"neck scarf ribbon",
"delicate earrings"
],
"style":"old money, classy, timeless"
},

"environment":{
"location":"luxury outdoor garden terrace",
"elements":[
"classical stone fountain",
"green hedges",
"tall cypress trees",
"soft blurred landscape"
]
},

"lighting":{
"type":"natural sunlight",
"setup":[
"warm golden daylight",
"soft highlights on skin",
"gentle shadows",
"dreamy glow"
]
},

"camera":{
"angle":"slightly low angle",
"framing":"mid to full body portrait",
"focus":"sharp subject, soft background blur"
},

"color_grading":{
"style":"cinematic editorial",
"tones":"warm cream, soft gold, pastel greens",
"contrast":"low to medium",
"saturation":"slightly warm and dreamy"
},

"details":{
"must_include":[
"reference face unchanged",
"same hair and eye color",
"teacup in hand",
"classical fountain",
"luxury sunlight aesthetic",
"clean elegant composition"
],
"avoid":[
"overexposure",
"harsh shadows",
"plastic skin",
"dark tones",
"modern clutter"
]
}
}
```

### 30. 四步深赤褐色染发剂转换网格提示，适用于 Nano Banana 2

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2036508189207015775)  **日期**: 2026-03-24  **语言**: en

> 一个为 Nano Banana 2 设计的高度结构化 JSON 提示词，旨在生成一个逼真的 2x2 网格图像，展示一步一步的染发过程。该提示词强调在所有四个面板中保持强大的身份一致性、真实感，以及从染发剂涂抹到最终浓郁深赤褐色头发造型效果的逻辑演变。

![四步深赤褐色染发剂转换网格提示，适用于 Nano Banana 2](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774421485609_suhczy_HEMhOCTaIAAwi7M.jpg)

```
Create a photoreal 2x2 step-by-step beauty transformation grid featuring one young adult woman across four panels with very strong identity consistency. The sequence must read clearly as one continuous at-home hair dye process. Keep the woman visually identical in all panels: same facial structure, same skin tone, same age, same proportions, and same natural beauty direction. Prioritize realism, continuity, and clean anatomy over dramatic complexity. Keep poses simple, believable, and easy to read. Hair transformation must progress logically from dye application to wet post-wash hair, then slightly damp drying stage, then final styled result. The final hair color must be a rich deep auburn-red or dark copper-red with glossy dimensional depth, elegant and luxurious, never bright orange or ginger. Output as 2x2 grid with thin gutter, no outer border, maximum identity lock between panels. Render in premium beauty editorial realism with ultra editorial crisp sharpness, minimal grain, soft rich natural dynamic range, warm luxury beauty color grade. Close beauty portrait or medium-close portrait framing in every panel using 85mm premium portrait lens, sharp on face and hair texture, soft luxurious depth of field with strong facial detail retention. Professional beauty lighting with realistic home ambience, soft controlled flattering light, dimensional but natural, elegant highlights on hair, accurate skin rendering, realistic skin texture no plastic effect. Panel 1: hair dye application step at home, near a mirror or vanity, hair neatly sectioned, visible dye cream applied on front and side sections, one hand applying dye and other stabilizing the hair, simple white T-shirt or white blouse with small natural dye stains, easy readable pose, clean mirror presence without complex reflection distortion. Panel 2: immediately after washing, hair fully wet, darker and more saturated, slick texture, same woman, same white top still visible, calm front or three-quarter angle, no towel wrapping, no chaotic splashes. Panel 3: drying stage, hair slightly damp and softer, deep auburn-red tone becoming clearer, relaxed home beauty moment, simple pose, gentle natural volume beginning to appear. Panel 4: final result, smooth voluminous blow-dried deep auburn-red hair with polished shine and rich dimensional color, wearing green satin halter top tied at the neck and blue jeans, confident fresh expression, premium beauty campaign finish. The exact same woman must appear in every panel with clear identity. Hair color and texture must evolve logically from one panel to next. Beauty direction remains natural and consistent, only hair texture and final outfit change according to the story. All arms, hands, shoulders, neck and mirror interactions must remain physically realistic. Avoid: different woman in each panel, identity drift, different face shape, different age, salon setting, bright orange ginger hair, neon red hair, cartoon, plastic skin, blurry face, bad anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, broken wrists, awkward shoulders, impossible arm position, confusing mirror reflection, duplicate reflection, messy unrealistic dye splatter, chaotic composition, cheap lighting, low detail, text, logo, watermark.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[美妆护肤]]、[[品牌广告]]

### 31. 虚构教科书页面生成模板

**作者**: [SSSS_CRYPTOMAN](https://x.com/SSSS_CRYPTOMAN/status/2036334419691315347)  **日期**: 2026-03-24  **语言**: ja

> 适用于 Nano Banana 2 的可复用模板提示词，旨在生成虚构教科书中的一页。用户可以自定义世界设定和主题，确保内容是准确的日语，避免字体损坏，并以一张从上方俯视的、真实的翻开的教科书照片形式呈现。

![虚构教科书页面生成模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774421491601_6c2ara_HEKC5FTaIAYuBxE.jpg)
![虚构教科书页面生成模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774421491654_nev5r1_HEKC5FEaIAMZ-5G.jpg)
![虚构教科书页面生成模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774421491550_xqhs11_HEKC5FEaIAIVX3J.jpg)
![虚构教科书页面生成模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774421492702_ghqkrd_HEKDFaLasAAFH6d.jpg)

```
「{argument name="世界観" default="ファンタジー世界"}」の学校で使われている「{argument name="科目" default="生物学"}」の教科書のページを作成。
教科書の内容は現実世界のものではなく、必ず指定した世界観に準じた内容で記載すること。内容は正確な日本語で記述し、同じ内容の重複、フォントの文字崩れが発生しないように生成する。開かれた教科書を真上から撮影した構図。イラストではなくリアルな写真。
```

A full body, three-quarter view of the young woman from the reference image, maintaining her exact facial features and identity, with her dark hair styled in a modern messy cut with soft bangs. She is walking gracefully with a serene and happy smile, wearing a light, flowing summer sundress. The scene is set in an urban environment where the background consists of weathered brick walls covered in sophisticated Banksy-style stencil graffiti and monochrome urban art. Warm, natural sunlight filters through the alleyway, casting soft, peaceful shadows. The overall aesthetic combines a highly detailed photographic portrait with the gritty, high-contrast texture of street art, capturing a moment of quiet joy.

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2036156791164379641)  **日期**: 2026-03-23  **语言**: en

> 针对 Nano Banana 2 的高度结构化提示词，旨在生成一张商业时尚写实图像。画面展示四名不同身材（S、M、L、XL）的女性在摄影棚内并排而立，她们穿着款式相同、颜色各异的柔和色调缎面细肩带连衣裙。该提示词强调真实的合身度、面料物理效果以及身材多样性，适用于尺码范围推广活动。

    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",

The four dresses are the same design in different soft pastel colorways: pastel yellow, pastel blue, pastel pink, and pastel green. Add refined butterfly embellishments or applique details that feel elegant and fashion-forward, not childish. The women should look like real fashion models in a commercial editorial studio shoot, with natural posture, slight human asymmetry, believable body diversity, realistic skin texture, and subtle expression variation. Add simple clean size labels below each model: S, M, L, XL."

### 34. Nano Banana 2 角色协作菜单 Prompt

**作者**: [絵空事テレビ / AIカワウソ](https://x.com/boke_ai/status/2036000337056977061)  **日期**: 2026-03-23  **语言**: ja

> 一个针对 Nano Banana 2 的详细提示词模板，用于根据提供的角色图像和设定，生成一份家庭餐厅联名菜单的图像。该提示词明确了输出格式、风格以及内容细节。

![Nano Banana 2 角色协作菜单 Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774334473395_7zuq71_HEFSSXEaQAAq8T8.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 角色协作菜单 Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774334473644_cvpl6k_HEFSY_9awAAJ7rQ.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 角色协作菜单 Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774334474010_3nxxcw_HEFSWdjacAEpMwd.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 角色协作菜单 Prompt](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774334474653_8s9vl3_HEFSZ5TbAAAYScp.jpg)

```
【キャラ設定】
- キャラ名：[{argument name="キャラクター名" default=""}]　← ここだけ埋めればOK。以下は任意
- 色・見た目の特徴：[{argument name="色・見た目の特徴" default=""}]
- 性格・口癖・行動パターン：[{argument name="性格・口癖・行動パターン" default=""}]
- 世界観・所属・設定：[{argument name="世界観・所属・設定" default=""}]
- ネタ・笑いのポイント：[{argument name="ネタ・笑いのポイント" default=""}]
※空欄の項目はすべて添付画像から読み取って自由に補完してください。キャラ名も空欄の場合は画像から命名してください。

上記のキャラクター設定と添付画像を使った「[{argument name="キャラクター名" default=""}]フェア」のファミリーレストランコラボメニューを作成。

出力形式：
実際のファミレスのテーブルの上に置かれた光沢のある冊子メニューを斜め上から撮影した写真風画像。冊子は見開きで開いており、ページには実際の料理写真・価格・メニュー番号が印刷されている。テーブルの木目や冊子の影・反射など、リアルな撮影環境の質感を再現すること。

メニューの内容：
- ページ上部に「[{argument name="キャラクター名" default=""}]フェア」のロゴ（食欲をそそるポップな赤×黄×白の配色）
- メニューページ内のキャラクター表現は添付画像のスタイルに合わせること：添付がイラスト・アニメ調ならイラストで、実写・写真調なら実写人物の写真で再現する。いずれも添付のビジュアルを忠実に反映すること。ポーズは以下からランダムに1つ選ぶ：①トレーを両手で差し出す ②料理を指差してアピール ③エプロン姿でガッツポーズ ④走りながら料理を運ぶ ⑤テーブルに身を乗り出しておすすめを囁く
- 上記キャラ設定をもとにオリジナルメニュー3品を考案。キャラの見た目・口癖・ネタを料理名や説明文に直接反映させること。各品に料理名・説明文・価格（税込）・メニュー番号を記載
- 「期間限定」「数量限定」のバナーをページ内に配置

横長の見開き構成（左ページにキャラ×メニュー紹介、右ページに料理写真×価格一覧）。
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[名片与Logo]]

> 一个详细的 JSON 结构化提示，用于 Nano Banana 2，旨在生成一张萨迪·辛克（Sadie Sink）和安娜·德·阿玛斯（Ana de Armas）在正午刺眼的阳光下手持鲜花的原始、逼真的户外肖像。该提示强调高对比度、硬阴影、可见的皮肤纹理以及特定的相机设置，以模仿未经滤镜处理的手机照片。

![烈日当空下的户外人像摄影提示词，适用于 Nano Banana 2](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1774074536812_z7h7at_HD32jb8boAABw9P.jpg)

{
  "photo_type": "Outdoor midday portrait (natural sunlight, raw realistic capture)",

  "subject": {
    "face": {
      "description": "Use uploaded reference image, keep identity exact, no smoothing or reshaping"
    },

    "pose_description": "Standing outdoors holding a bouquet of flowers, body slightly turned, head facing camera",

    "expression": "neutral soft expression, calm natural look"
  },

  "environment": {
    "setting": "garden or residential outdoor area",

    "details": [

      "house in background",
      "clear blue sky",
      "sunlit ground"

  },

  "lighting": {
    "type": "direct midday sunlight",

      "no diffusion",
      "strong direct light"
    ],

    "effects": [

      "high contrast",
      "bright highlights",
      "sharp shadow edges on ground and plants"
    ],

**作者**: [David](https://x.com/tealdog2/status/2034116831880089813)  **日期**: 2026-03-18  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于 Nano Banana 2 生成一张超写实的女性时尚编辑照片，该女性与参考面部匹配。该提示指定了一套米色和米白色定制服装、详细的配饰（金色珠宝、皮带）、一个特定的姿势（坐在藤制沙发上，手持瓷杯）以及技术相机设置（Canon EOS R5、85mm 镜头、f/1.8、浅景深），以实现具有 Kodak Vision3 50D 胶片效果的奢华美学。

![奢华时尚人像摄影提示词，适用于 Nano Banana 2](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773902665491_kttmly_HDqieazbEAEK7k3.jpg)

```
{
  "subject": "woman matching reference face, hair styled in a low polished ponytail with volume at the roots and loose baby hairs catching sunlight, wearing a cream and off-white tailored outfit: structured light wool blazer with visible silk lining, ribbed cashmere-silk tank top, high-waisted wide-leg trousers, brown cognac leather belt with large gold buckle, gold chain bracelet, minimalist watch with rose gold case and brown leather strap, gold rings and coin pendant necklace, large round sunglasses with thin gold frame",

  "composition": "seated on a clear wicker sofa outdoors, body slightly leaning forward, right leg crossed over left, right hand holding a thin porcelain cup with gold rim near lips, left hand resting inside pants pocket, direct gaze toward camera through sunglasses, relaxed yet confident posture, upper-body portrait framing",

  "environment": "outdoor patio setting with clear wicker furniture, bright open-air background softly blurred into bokeh, minimal distractions emphasizing subject and textures",

  "lighting_geometry": "intense natural midday sunlight, directional light creating defined shadows and crisp contrast, highlights catching on hair, skin, porcelain cup, and gold accessories, subtle reflections visible on sunglasses",

  "materials_and_texture": "fine wool fibers with visible structure, ribbed knit texture of tank top, smooth porcelain cup with glossy finish and gold edge, polished leather belt, metallic gold jewelry reflections, realistic skin texture with visible pores, soft makeup blending with matte-luminous finish",

  "camera_optics": "Canon EOS R5 full-frame camera, RF 85mm lens at f/1.8, extremely shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh background, sharp focus on eyes visible behind sunglasses and fine material textures",

  "color_strategy": "neutral cream and off-white palette, warm brown leather accents, gold metallic highlights, natural skin tones under bright sunlight with balanced contrast",

  "rendering_intent": "ultra-realistic editorial fashion photography, luxury aesthetic, Kodak Vision3 50D film look with subtle grain, clean and refined image quality, sophisticated and powerful atmosphere",

  "aspect_ratio": "4:5 vertical",

  "negative_prompt": "stylization, illustration, plastic skin, over-smoothed textures, distorted anatomy, exaggerated proportions, low detail, flat lighting, harsh HDR",

  "control": {
    "reference_face": "use attached image for identity consistency"
  }
}
```

**作者**: [Jessia](https://x.com/itsjessiababy/status/2033138701761450459)  **日期**: 2026-03-15  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张高质量的年轻女性穿着紧身蜘蛛侠服装的 Cosplay 照片。该提示指定了身体解剖学约束（丰满的沙漏型身材，突出的胸部体积）、姿势、光线（来自窗户的柔和漫射日光）以及简约的室内环境。

![丰满蜘蛛侠 Cosplay 肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773643970478_fmj4mj_HDcovQCXkAEj8uP.jpg)

```
Young woman with fair, pale skin wearing a full-body tight spandex cosplay bodysuit in a Spider-Man design. The suit features a deep red center panel on the torso and mask area with a black web pattern, and dark navy blue panels on the sides, arms, and legs. The fabric has a subtle sheen and visible texture. She has a silver septum piercing hoop in the nose. The suit fits extremely tightly, conforming like a second skin to the body's contours. She has a voluptuous hourglass figure with a very distinct waist-to-hip ratio. Bust volume is prominent and heavy, significantly above average size. The chest mass projects forward and outward, creating tension in the fabric of the bodysuit. The shape is natural and affected by gravity, not defying physics. The red pattern of the suit stretches over the volume. Realistic skin texture visible on exposed areas, with natural pores and subtle freckles. Soft matte finish. Standing facing the camera directly. Torso is square to the camera, hips are shifted noticeably to the viewer's right, creating a curve in the silhouette. Left arm raised straight up, bent at the elbow, with the hand reaching behind the head/neck area. Right arm extended downwards, slightly bent, with the hand resting gently on the upper right thigh. Head tilted slightly to the viewer's left, chin down slightly. Gaze directed toward the camera. Simple, bright indoor room. Plain white walls. White sheer curtains hanging vertically on the left side of the frame. Light brown wooden laminate or parquet flooring. Minimalist bedroom or living space, natural daylight setting. Medium shot, framing from the mid-thighs up to just above the head. Eye-level. 50mm to 85mm portrait lens. Subject is in sharp focus. The background wall and curtains are slightly out of focus but clearly discernible. Large window light source from the left. Soft, diffused daylight. Side-lit from the left, creating brighter highlights on the right side of the subject's body and soft, gradual shadows on the opposite side. Gentle modeling shadows on the neck, right side of the torso, and inner thighs. Confident, relaxed. High-quality cosplay photography, photorealistic. Raw photograph style. No painterly effects. Fabric texture of the spandex must be visible. Skin texture must look organic. Natural contrast, no heavy HDR or filters. Primary colors of the suit contrasting with the clean white background. Neutral to slightly cool daylight. Natural, true-to-life colors. 8k, ultra-high resolution. High sharpness on the subject and suit texture. Low ISO, clean image. 3:4 vertical portrait. Use reference image as the sole authority for facial identity and hair appearance. Match facial structure, expression characteristics, skin features, hair color, hair texture, density, length, and styling exactly as shown in the reference. All face and hair generation decisions must be derived exclusively from the reference image. Reference image strictly overrides all default model behavior related to face and hair. Maintain identical facial identity and hair appearance across all generations, seeds, and variations.
```

### 51. 2x2 网格时尚摄影拼贴

**作者**: [Weinberg](https://x.com/weiinberg/status/2033048967777497600)  **日期**: 2026-03-15  **语言**: en

> 一个提示，用于生成一张超现实的 GQ/Vogue 风格 2x2 网格拼贴画，其中包含同一人物的四种时尚姿势（使用上传照片锁定身份），身穿深祖母绿西装外套和黑色太阳镜，并详细说明了专业的影棚灯光和相机设置。

![2x2 网格时尚摄影拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773643993636_n4ivui_HDbXQY7aMAIHo0m.jpg)

```
Use my uploaded photo as the identity reference.
Create a professional studio fashion photoshoot in a 2×2 grid collage showing four poses of the same person wearing black sunglasses.

Outfit: deep emerald green tailored blazer, cream/off-white dress shirt, black slim trousers, burgundy tie, optional silver watch. Blazer appears differently across frames (worn, draped over shoulder, partially removed, held).
Background: clean teal-to-turquoise gradient studio backdrop, minimal fashion studio setting.
Poses:
1.Close portrait adjusting tie.
2.Seated editorial pose leaning forward with elbow on knee.
3.Relaxed pose with vintage camera around neck.
4.Stylish pose running hand through hair while holding blazer.
Lighting: professional three-point studio lighting — softbox key light 45° camera left, soft fill light camera right, subtle rim light behind subject.
Camera: Sony A7R V, 85mm portrait lens, f/2.2, ISO 100, 1/160s, WB 5600K, shallow depth of field, focus on eyes.
Realism: natural skin pores, hair strands, subtle fabric wrinkles, realistic shadows, lens compression, reflections in sunglasses.
Output: ultra-realistic GQ/Vogue-style editorial photography, sharp detail, 4K resolution, clean 2×2 grid layout.
```

proportions, hairline, and overall likeness with high accuracy. Do not beautify, stylize, or alter their identity.

Facial expression:
calm, confident, or warm smile with direct eye contact toward the camera.

Body Proportions

Maintain realistic human proportions based on the person reference image.

Preserve:

body shape

shoulder width

natural posture

Do not exaggerate body shape.

Outfit Recreation

The subject must wear the exact outfit from the outfit reference image.

Recreate clothing accurately including:

colors

fabric type

patterns and prints

garment structure

folds and stitching

clothing layers

The outfit should appear naturally worn and properly fitted to the subject.

Pose Logic (Important)

Do not copy the pose from any reference image.

Instead, determine the pose based on the style of the outfit.

Examples:

Modern / streetwear outfits → relaxed modern fashion pose
Formal outfits → confident professional standing pose
Casual outfits → natural relaxed pose

The pose should look like a professional fashion studio photoshoot.

Composition

Professional studio fashion portrait.

Full body framing from head to toe (very important).

Aspect ratio 4:5 vertical.

Subject positioned naturally in the center of the frame.

Background

Create a clean professional studio sweep background.

Background characteristics:

smooth light grey seamless backdrop

backdrop curves smoothly into the floor

darker grey studio floor

subtle gradient lighting on the background

No objects or props.

Lighting

Professional studio lighting:

soft front key light

balanced fill light

subtle rim light for separation

evenly illuminated background

Lighting must look natural and professional.

Image Style

Ultra-realistic studio photography.

Requirements:

photorealistic skin texture

detailed fabric rendering

sharp focus

natural shadows

professional fashion photography look

Restrictions

No extra people
No text
No logos
No props
No background objects
No half-body portrait
Subject must be fully visible from head to toe

### 57. 详细的 X 射线透明玫瑰艺术提示

**作者**: [A1-CREATE](https://x.com/a1createsh/status/2032383346660290750)  **日期**: 2026-03-13  **语言**: ja

> 一个极其详细、结构化的提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro（通过 GeminiApp）生成一幅玫瑰的 X 射线透明艺术图像。该提示详细说明了构图、主体设计（侧重于单朵花朵的中心旋涡）、渲染模式和密度映射，旨在生成高度逼真、近乎单色但带有微妙色彩提示的图像。

![详细的 X 射线透明玫瑰艺术提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773469813505_o425wy_HDR42A4asAAA8Lu.jpg)

```
meta:
  title: "バラのX線透過アート - 花弁だけで埋める単輪寄り・中心渦強調"
  concept: "ほぼ単輪のバラだけで画面を埋め尽くし、真上からの極端な超接写で中心渦を強烈に見せる、ほぼモノクロのX線ファインアート。花弁内部にだけ、ごくわずかなバラらしい色味を忍ばせる"
  language: "ja"

output:
  aspect_ratio: "4:5"
  orientation: "縦"
  resolution_intent: "高解像度"
  deliverable_type: "単輪寄り花弁充満の植物X線・微着彩"

scene:
  genre: "植物X線写真"
  subject: "バラ"
  subject_count_impression: "ほぼ単輪、周辺に断片的な花弁のみ"
  realism_level: "高"
  environment: "スタジオでの単体撮影"
  mood:
    - "静謐"
    - "官能的"
    - "精緻"
    - "緊張感"
    - "吸い込まれるような中心渦"
    - "上品な微着彩"

> 一个高度详细、多部分的提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张怀旧、电影风格的年轻韩国 K-pop 偶像肖像，风格效仿滨田英明 (Hideaki Hamada)，重点突出其特定的顽皮表情、精致的服装和柔和的晨光。

![怀旧 K-Pop 偶像肖像，滨田英明风格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773297031703_41q79w_HDHFgrbWIAAx_o-.jpg)

```
Masterpiece, Best Quality, 8K, 2:3 
  a candid medium format film photograph in the distinct style of Hideaki Hamada,
  Kodak Portra 400 film stock, visible fine film grain, nostalgic pastel tones,
  natural soft window light, airy ethereal atmosphere,
  shallow depth of field, gentle muted color palette,

  a beautiful young Korean female K-pop idol in a private photobook shoot,
  age 19-21, innocent baby face with a bratty confident edge,
  the mood is intimate late-morning mischief — she woke up a while ago
  but hasn't bothered to fix her outfit or get up from the blanket nest,

  face: soft round face, big doe eyes with natural aegyo-sal,
  straight light-brown eyebrows, small nose with rounded tip,
  full lips in natural rosy pink,

  expression: she has caught one of the red ribbon ties from the sheep hood
  between her teeth — biting down on the ribbon playfully,
  the red ribbon stretches from the crumpled hood behind her neck
  to the corner of her mouth where she holds it with her front teeth,
  her lips curve into a lopsided half-grin around the ribbon,
  the bite pulls her mouth slightly to one side creating a cocky asymmetric smirk,
  eyes fully open and bright, pupils sharp and locked directly into camera
  with a daring "what are you gonna do about it" challenge,
  one eyebrow raised almost imperceptibly — the universal signal of attitude,
  the red ribbon cutting across her chin and lower lip is a vivid color accent
  drawing every eye straight to her mouth,
  she is not being cute on purpose — she is being a brat on purpose,
  the confidence reads as: completely in control, completely amused,
  nose slightly scrunched from the smirking tension,

  hair: long wavy dark brown hair, messy from sleeping,
  spread across the cream blankets beneath her in a loose halo,
  a few strands stuck to her cheek and caught under the ribbon at her lips,
  soft and tousled, no styling — pure bedhead with volume,

  skin: fair warm-toned milky complexion, Portra 400 warm skin rendering,
  natural and unretouched in Hamada style,
  soft morning warmth on the cheeks — natural flush, no makeup blush,

  CLOTHING — the same sheep-themed outfit in a state of playful undress:

  Layer 2 : white fluffy oversized hoodie with sheep-inspired design,
    round white button-front closure — ALL BUTTONS UNDONE,
    the hoodie has slipped off both shoulders and slid down to her elbows,
    pooling around her forearms and bunching at her lower back and hips,
    the fluffy white fabric creates a soft nest-like frame around her body,
    underneath: a simple white ribbed cotton tank top with thin spaghetti straps
    and scoop neckline, the tank top has ridden up slightly on one side
    exposing a sliver of bare stomach above the shorts waistband,
    her collarbones, shoulders, and upper arms completely bare,
    the red knit hood with sheep ear details crumpled behind her neck,
    one red ribbon tie clampe

### 61. 艾玛·迈尔斯 (Emma Myers) 的鱼眼失真写实街头服饰肖像

**作者**: [KeorUnreal](https://x.com/KeorUnreal/status/2031405965975675298)  **日期**: 2026-03-10  **语言**: en

> 通过 Hailuo AI 为 Nano Banana 2 生成的详细提示，用于创作一张艾玛·迈尔斯 (Emma Myers) 的超写实 8K 街头服饰时尚肖像，采用低角度特写视角，带有强烈的鱼眼畸变，在阳光直射下强调鲜艳色彩和高对比度。

![艾玛·迈尔斯 (Emma Myers) 的鱼眼失真写实街头服饰肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773210652440_wsnrbw_HDEA8j4XoAA3t5d.jpg)
![艾玛·迈尔斯 (Emma Myers) 的鱼眼失真写实街头服饰肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773210652452_m1zdj8_HDEA8f2XYAYc9x3.jpg)
![艾玛·迈尔斯 (Emma Myers) 的鱼眼失真写实街头服饰肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1773210652861_n10w12_HDEA8psXYAU6tgU.jpg)

```
"Generate a highly detailed, photorealistic 8K streetwear fashion portrait of {argument name="subject name" default="Emma Myers"}, who is dominating about 90% of the frame. The shot is taken from a low angle with a close-up perspective, using a wide-angle lens with heavy fisheye distortion to simulate a photo taken on a modern smartphone. She has thick blonde pigtail braids, bright orange-red lips, and a confident expression. She is in a low, crouched squat position on the floor, balancing on the spiked high heels and both hands are placed flat on her thighs, leaning slightly forward, and looking directly at the camera. Yellow-framed rectangular retro sunglasses slightly away from her eyes with both hands. She is wearing a fuchsia cotton halter crop top, tight orange latex leggings, and white high heels. Her accessories include a ruby bead necklace with a gold star pendant, silver hoop earrings, gold rings, and a bright pink bracelet with a raised texture. The outdoor setting features a vibrant, textured teal wall behind her with a graffiti written 'KeorUnreal'and a red metal grate above. The scene is lit by intense, direct daytime sunlight, creating hard shadows and high contrast that highlight the vibrant color palette (orange, white, orange, fuchsia and pink), perfectly capturing a modern, retro-casual summer vibe. Aspect ratio 4:5."
```

A high-resolution digital photo collage birthday poster on a teal background with torn paper top and bottom edges. It features four white-framed, photorealistic portraits of a smiling woman (use the uploaded photo as reference) with long dark hair wearing a bright orange turtleneck, illuminated by soft natural light. Each portrait capture different playful pose. The photos are arranged asymmetrically: two vertical on top, a horizontal one in the middle, and a vertical one on the bottom left. In the bottom right, a dark blue pinned rectangular sign reads "Happy Birthday" in elegant white cursive. ### 74. 城市中行走的女性的抓拍街头照片

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2030203040004010419)  **日期**: 2026-03-07  **语言**: en

> 生成一张高度逼真的 8K 街头抓拍照片的提示词，内容为一位年轻女性走在繁忙的城市人行道上。照片应体现她随意的着装（白色 T 恤、宽松牛仔裤、咖啡杯）、自然阳光和反光，以及街头摄影的技术细节（50mm 镜头、浅景深、自然色彩）。

### 75. 逼真的“鸭子嘴”自拍肖像

**作者**: [sammy](https://x.com/sumiturkude007/status/2030202631176790314)  **日期**: 2026-03-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性逼真的、随意的室内自拍风格肖像。它详细描述了复杂的细节，包括肤色、发型（法式挑染/渐变染）、妆容（上扬眼线、玫瑰粉色唇妆）、表情（俏皮的眨眼和“嘟嘴”）、服装（格子紧身胸衣上衣、低腰牛仔裤）、配饰（戒指、杏仁形指甲），以及现代卧室背景的具体元素。

![逼真的“鸭子嘴”自拍肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772951317412_cfupfe_HCy6Vx6bcAEZBEW.jpg)

```
Photorealistic casual indoor selfie-style portrait, 9:16 aspect ratio, medium waist-up shot at eye level with soft bright diffused natural frontal lighting casting gentle shadows behind the subject.

Young adult woman with warm golden-bronze sun-kissed tan skin, smooth glowing complexion. Long thick blonde hair with dark brown roots (balayage/ombre), center-parted with loose voluminous waves extending past the shoulders and soft face-framing strands.

Oval face with softly contoured jawline. One eye open looking directly at the camera (dark brown or hazel), the other tightly closed in a playful wink. Black winged eyeliner and dark mascara on upper lashes, well-defined softly arched medium-brown eyebrows. Slim straight nose with subtle highlight and contour. Contoured cheekbones with warm rosy-peach blush on the apples. Very full glossy rosy-pink lips puckered outward in a pronounced kissing “duck face” expression. Overall expression playful, confident, flirtatious.

She wears a tight light blue and white gingham corset-style camisole with sweetheart neckline, structured underwire cup stitching, thick matching straps, and delicate white scalloped lace trim along the neckline and bottom hem. Bottoms are light-wash denim jeans, low-to-mid rise with the top metal button undone and waistband slightly folded open.

Hands rest lightly on the waist/hips with fingers spread across the ribs. Multiple stacked silver rings on the right hand. Long almond-shaped acrylic nails painted light pink/nude.

Background: modern bright indoor room (bedroom). Smooth white walls and light oak wood flooring. On the left wall a framed pastoral landscape painting of a green field, with the edge of a bed showing white sheets and a textured beige/cream throw blanket. On the right side a dark doorframe or open door and a woven wicker/rattan floor basket partially visible. Ceiling includes a rectangular white HVAC vent and a circular white smoke detector or light fixture.

Photorealistic, high detail, natural indoor portrait.
```

A stylish young man standing in front of a modern townhouse door, wearing a black baseball cap, white t-shirt, black tie with a gold tie clip, and a burgundy bomber jacket that he is holding open to reveal the inside lining. Inside the jacket are nostalgic 90s items attached: a Tamagotchi keychain, a silver flip phone, wired earphones, a vintage cigarette pack, a dollar bill, and a small sticky note saying “P.S. ### 90. Nano Banana 2 代示例和提示

**作者**: [KAWAI](https://x.com/kawai_design/status/2028823580503642374)  **日期**: 2026-03-03  **语言**: ja

> 以下是针对 Gogole Nano Banana 2 的四个详细图像生成提示，涵盖了肖像、街拍、产品和海报风格，强调了详细提示对于获得高质量结果的重要性。

![Nano Banana 2 代示例和提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605589980_fx8ny5_HCfSCUQaEAAqeBh.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 代示例和提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605590341_9b3c1o_HCfR6TZa0AA6sdD.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 代示例和提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605590542_r68yeb_HCfR-p2boAEAMX9.jpg)
![Nano Banana 2 代示例和提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772605591291_vm0dkg_HCfSkceaoAAEMPL.jpg)

```
1枚目：ポートレート

強いサイドライトによって顔の半分が影になった、ドラマチックなモノクロームポートレート。影の部分は完全に黒く、光の当たった部分は肌の質感が際立つ。Hasselblad X1D II 50CとXCD 80mm F1.9レンズで撮影。

─────────────────

2枚目：ストリートスナップ

雑踏の中、一瞬立ち止まってカメラを見つめる人物のストリートポートレート。背景は適度にボケさせ、人物に焦点を当てる。Leica Q2で撮影されたようなスナップショット感。

─────────────────

3枚目：プロダクト

洗練されたミニマリストな空間に、最新のスマートウォッチが浮遊している広告ビジュアル。背景は深みのあるネイビーとゴールドのグラデーション。スマートウォッチの画面には『{argument name="スマートウォッチの文字" default="Time Redefined"}』という文字が表示されている。

─────────────────

4枚目：ポスター

音楽フェスティバルのポスター。サイケデリックな色彩と抽象的な模様が組み合わさり、フェスティバルのテーマ『{argument name="フェスティバルのテーマ" default="Sound Odyssey"}』が大きく表示されている。多様なフォントとレイアウトを試す。
```

**Related**: [[科技产品]]、[[综合产品]]、[[综合设计]]

### 93. 90 年代街头服饰肖像与丰田 Supra MK4

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2028494151671767502)  **日期**: 2026-03-02  **语言**: en

> 生成一张年轻女性的逼真、抓拍式全身照片的提示（需要面部参考），她倚靠在一辆改装过的白色丰田 Supra MK4 旁，背景是夜晚，强调 90 年代街头服饰美学、直射闪光灯照明和粗犷的都市背景。

![90 年代街头服饰肖像与丰田 Supra MK4](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772519737877_zantlc_HCaorKRbwAAwTFc.jpg)

```
A realistic, candid full body photo of a young woman, use my face exactly from my reference image, leaning casually against the hood of a modified white Toyota Supra MK4 at night. She has messy, wavy black hair in a wolf cut and is looking directly at the camera with a calm, confident expression. She is wearing a silver chain necklace, an oversized dark charcoal grey corduroy crewneck sweatshirt with the text "{argument name="sweatshirt text" default="NEOPALESCENT"}" inside an oval logo on the chest, baggy loose fitting black denim jeans, and tan suede boots. Her hands are in her pockets. The background is a gritty urban street corner with a concrete wall heavily covered in graffiti tags and “Afux” written on the wall. The lighting is direct camera flash style, creating hard shadows behind the subject and a high contrast vintage 90s streetwear aesthetic. 4K resolution, raw photo style, flash photography.
```

### 94. Sydney Sweeney 兔女郎写真提示词

**作者**: [𝐌](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/2028347191895761262)  **日期**: 2026-03-02  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张西德尼·斯威尼（Sydney Sweeney）身穿白色针织紧身衣和兔耳，坐在粉色人造毛皮沙发上的高清摄影棚照片，需要提供服装和沙发的参考图片，并包含一个微妙的文字叠加。

![Sydney Sweeney 兔女郎写真提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772519748140_0h1n9z_HCYjAZEbsAANYz3.jpg)
![Sydney Sweeney 兔女郎写真提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772519748132_2u8zrg_HCYjAYiboAAt2bN.jpg)
![Sydney Sweeney 兔女郎写真提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772519748150_qhksem_HCYjAYca8AAim-E.jpg)

```
{
  "model_id": "image_generator_v1",
  "prompt": "A high-definition, medium close-up studio photograph of Sydney Sweeney, with a charismatic and playful expression, looking directly into the lens. Her wavy blonde hair is styled loosely. She wears the identical white ribbed knit bodysuit and white fluffy bunny ears headband as seen in image_11.png. She is seated upright on the incredibly plush, shaggy pink faux-fur sofa from image_11.png, which seems to envelope her, with a few pink fur pillows around her. Her pose is new: sitting with her legs tucked slightly. Her right hand is subtly adjusting one of the bunny ears, and her left hand rests on her knee. The texture of the white bodysuit and the detailed shagginess of the pink fur sofa are highly defined. The background is a solid, clean dusty-rose wall. The lighting is soft and flattering. The composition is balanced and elegant. In the bottom-right corner, there is a small, subtle text overlay in white font: 'SYDNEY SWEENEY | THE BUNNY SESSIONS'.",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "style": "professional portrait photograph"
}
```

**Related**: [[JSON结构化提示]]、[[修复与增强]]

![古典写实油画肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433488858_e7zb5k_HCWLgAcWUAAtJTv.jpg)
![古典写实油画肖像提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433488919_0n8w6v_HCWLgAxaIAA0OCC.jpg)

An oil painting portrait of a young girl [Use the uploaded image as reference] in classical realism with visible, expressive brushstrokes. The palette features an earthy brown background, warm peach skin tones, Soft, natural lighting from the left illuminates her face in a close-up, three-quarter profile, and wide eyes looking off-camera. The texture features rough, unfinished painted edges at the top and bottom, contrasting with a smoothly blended face and loose, gestural strokes on her clothing. The mood is peaceful and innocent. High resolution, Vertical portrait, 4K, highly detailed fine art quality.

### 101. 浮世绘与工业融合的写实肖像

**作者**: [Lovart 公式 (ラブアート)](https://x.com/lovart_jp/status/2028032501021569200)  **日期**: 2026-03-01  **语言**: ja

> 一个复杂的图像生成提示，用于 Nano Banana Pro、Nano Banana 2、GPT Image 1.5 和 Seedream 5，重点是一个融合了都市、工业和浮世绘（日本木版画）元素的超写实肖像，具有详细的纹理、几何形状以及在面部工作的微型浮世绘工匠。

![浮世绘与工业融合的写实肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433524876_ifezi5_HCPtwZzbEAgbhPU.jpg)
![浮世绘与工业融合的写实肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433524862_lclvve_HCPtv7PbEAYFXA0.jpg)
![浮世绘与工业融合的写实肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433524874_kctj4r_HCPtv0QbEAEY63E.jpg)
![浮世绘与工业融合的写实肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772433525445_na6ocm_HCPtw5zbYAAMCF-.jpg)

```
添付画像の女性をモデルとする。横顔のポートレート。左向きの横顔で、クールで知的な表情。バストアップ構図。

女性の顔と肌は完全にフォトリアルな写真品質を維持する。これは最優先事項であり、イラスト調やアニメ調にならない。毛穴、産毛、まつ毛の一本一本、耳の軟骨の透け感まで見える超高精細な質感。

背景と装飾要素はアーバンとインダストリアルと浮世絵の融合。画面全体にグリッド線と計測線が走っているが、そのグリッドの一部が葛飾北斎の波の曲線に変形している。直線的な設計図の線が、ある地点から急に波頭のうねりへと変貌する。数値やスケール表記が縦書きの和文と混在している。

背景に配置された鋭い幾何学的な三角形やラインは藍色で、その藍は浮世絵の藍摺りと同じ深い青。三角形の内部には木版画の波模様や渦巻き文様が透けて見える。幾何学と浮世絵の文様が一つの画面で共存している。

ミニチュアサイズの人々が女性の顔や輪郭の上で作業している。江戸時代の木版画の彫師と摺師で、小さな彫刻刀で版木を彫り、バレンで和紙に摺っている。浮世絵の職人たちは藍色の着物を着ている。小さな足場と梯子が顔の輪郭に沿って架けられている。

女性の横顔の輪郭線は、ある部分はシャープなデジタルのベクター線、別の部分は墨と筆による浮世絵の輪郭線になっている。二つの線描技法が一人の顔の上で交差している。

インクのスプラッターと飛沫が画面全体に散っているが、黒いインクの飛沫に混じって藍色の墨の飛沫と朱色の飛沫が混在している。グランジテクスチャはコンクリートの壁の質感と和紙の繊維の質感が重なり合っている。

画面内に文字、テキスト、タイポグラフィ、日本語の文字列、落款印、印鑑、ハンコ、署名は一切含まない。

照明はコントラスト強めのドラマチックな陰影。画面左からの硬い光で横顔の輪郭がはっきりとした明暗で浮かび上がる。フィルムグレイン。超高解像度。シャープ。アートポスター風。
```

**Related**: [[浮世绘与日本传统]]、[[手绘素描]]、[[综合艺术]]

### 105. 超逼真的冬季街头摄影

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2027646958064513085)  **日期**: 2026-02-28  **语言**: en

> 一个针对 Gemini Nano Banana 2 的高度详细提示，指示其生成一张超现实的冬季街头男士写真图像。该提示强调严格保留上传照片中的面部，精确的姿势和服装细节（u2k 风格），固定的拍摄角度（iPhone 胸部水平），密集的背景元素（湿沥青、汽车、商店橱窗），以及特定的光照条件（冬日傍晚的冷暖混合光），以捕捉 2000 年代风格的“定格瞬间”。

![超逼真的冬季街头摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772346668193_w29esz_HCOmEeSbEAERbxg.jpg)

```
Shot on iPhone, winter street photoshoot, ultra-realism, natural shot: SAVE FACE FROM UPLOADED PHOTO 1:1 — do not change features, proportions, age, facial expressions and similarity even by 1%, use the uploaded photo as the ONLY face standard), plot: a man in the center of a busy winter city street makes a "reporter's" street shot, holds a compact camera/camcorder to his face, as if he is filming in response, the pose is fixed, stance U2K confident, pelvis slightly shifted to the right, shoulders relaxed, one hand holds a compact camera to the lips/chin, the other hand deep in the pocket, elbow slightly pulled back, looking straight into the lens, expression calm and bold; the angle is fixed: shooting on an iPhone from chest level, slight wide-angle (26mm feel), the hero is strictly in the center, the frame is waist-deep, the perspective is minimal, without a "corridor" into the distance, the background is dense and close; the background is strictly defined: a winter evening in the city, wet asphalt and slush, behind the hero there is a wide street with closely parked cars in two rows, on the right next to (3-5 meters) a parked dark minivan, on the left the facade of a building with brightly lit shop-windows and an entrance, above the entrance there are 2-3 small neon signs without legible words, on the sidewalk around the hero there are 10-15 people in winter clothes (some are passing by, some are standing in a group near the shop-window), all the faces of passers-by are slightly blurred so that the focus remains on the model; a street lamp, road signs, reflections of lights in the wet asphalt are visible in the frame, no long horizon, a "wall" of buildings and cars in the background, short depth; The clothes are strictly defined (u2k unisex, winter): a short glossy down jacket "metallic silver" made of nylon with a high collar, under it a white tight-fitting thermal jacket without prints, bottoms: low-rise dark gray baggy jeans with a belt, shoes: winter sneakers/boots white and gray with a massive sole, accessories: narrow rectangular glasses u2k with dark lenses, black gloves, a small black shoulder-bag with a short strap over the shoulder, in hand a black compact camera/camcorder without logos; fixed light; winter evening mixed cold street + warm shop-window light, soft contrast, no flash, no studio light, natural shadows under the nose and chin, glare from the wet road; atmosphere: lively urban winter street, city noise, people moving, the feeling of a "captured moment" in the style of the 2000s; textures: hyper-realistic skin texture, natural pores and fine details, Subtle imperfections, slight reddening of cheeks from the cold, realistic lip gloss, detailed texture of the glossy nylon down jacket, visible seams and zipper, denim with a pronounced weave and creases, wet asphalt with reflections, grainy slush, camera plastic with small scratches; camera and processing: iPhone photo look, iPhone RAW, slight dig
```

      "resolution": "8K ultra high-definition",

    },

    "color_palette": {

      "mood": "bold, powerful, masculine, premium fitness aesthetic"
    }
  }
}

  "Character": {

    "Hair": "natural dark brown medium-length bob hair gently swaying in the breeze, no hat",
    "Eyes_and_Expression": "wide innocent soft eyes capturing the light, looking directly at camera with a gentle, ephemeral and pure expression",

  },
  "Scene": {
    "Environment": "wooden engawa (traditional Japanese veranda), traditional Japanese house with sliding glass doors open to a lush green summer garden",
    "Details": "bright white sheer curtains blowing in the background, soft green, brown, and white color palette",
    "Atmosphere": "clear summer morning breeze, nostalgic and ephemeral atmosphere, feeling the gentle summer breeze"
  },
  "Photography": {
    "Style": "Japanese idol photobook (shashin-shu), airy and transparent photography, masterpiece, best quality, photorealistic",
    "Camera_and_Lens": "Contax 645 medium format look, Carl Zeiss Planar 80mm f/2 lens, shallow depth of field, soft airy creamy bokeh, soft ethereal focus on the edges, sharp on the eyes",
    "Framing": "shot from EYE LEVEL, medium close-up framing, knee-up composition",
    "Lighting": "SOFT NATURAL DAYLIGHT, OVERCAST or DIFFUSED WINDOW LIGHT, high-key lighting (low contrast), slightly overexposed (+1 EV) for transparency, soft wrap-around light, bright square catchlights in eyes",
    "Film_Simulation_and_Color": "Fujifilm Pro 400H film simulation, pastel color grading, cool cyan-green undertones in the shadows, milky lifted blacks, soft glowing highlights without pure white clipping",
    "Effects": "fine subtle film grain (0.2), very mild vignette (0.1), soft gentle light leak from the top corner"
    "Aapect Ratio": "3:4"
  }
}

### 113. 坦率的万圣节服装派对照片

**作者**: [gauche](https://x.com/gaucheai/status/2026359200419557852)  **日期**: 2026-02-24  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示，用于生成一张抓拍式的、社论风格的万圣节派对照片。主体是一位身穿金属红色恶魔服装的年轻女性，详细描述了她的白金色头发、妆容、俏皮的姿势以及室内派对环境（质朴的砖墙、温暖的钨丝灯照明、柔和的焦外虚化背景）。

![坦率的万圣节服装派对照片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1772001531950_xnzh0g_HB8Se9tW8AA2eDv.jpg)

```
{

> 一个详细的图像生成提示，用于创建一张逼真的、低角度的、科幻怪兽电影风格照片：一头巨大的、70 年代风格的日本哥斯拉，站在东京高层建筑区的宽阔国道上，东京晴空塔在多云的天空下清晰可见。该提示指定了宽高比，并要求哥斯拉直视镜头。

```

### 125. 高级时尚编辑肖像：精确的身份和姿势复制

**作者**: [Dr. Samia](https://x.com/oye_samia/status/2024744731792871647)  **日期**: 2026-02-20  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂、高度详细的提示，用于拍摄一张高级时装编辑肖像，要求 100% 保留参考图像中的身份，精确复制一个戏剧性的姿势（手遮住脸），特定的戏剧性影棚灯光，以及精确复制服装和配饰（黑色抹胸、白色蕾丝头巾、特定手链）。

![高级时尚编辑肖像：精确的身份和姿势复制](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771655065994_33t24v_HBlWmW4bUAMZXeA.jpg)

```
Role: high-fashion editorial photographer shooting a bold luxury studio portrait, ultra-realistic photography
Subject: use the attached face photo as the exact facial identity (100% identity preservation, anatomical precision, original facial proportions, natural skin texture, no AI reshaping, no beautification distortion), seamlessly replace the model's face from the reference image with the attached face, perfect alignment of jawline, cheekbones, eye spacing, nose structure, lip shape, and skin tone matching, maintain realistic skin texture with visible pores and natural tonal transitions, no visible blending artifacts
Pose & Expression (match reference EXACTLY): tight upper body framing (mid-torso to top of head), body facing camera, left arm raised with hand covering upper half of face, fingers spread naturally across forehead and eyebrow area, palm angled diagonally, eye visible through fingers, other arm relaxed downward, intense direct gaze through fingers, mouth slightly open (natural parted lips exactly like reference, relaxed jaw, subtle sensual tension), bold confident expression
Lighting (replicate reference precisely): dramatic directional studio lighting, strong key light from front-left, visible highlight on left side of face and arm, defined shadow gradient across right side of face, controlled contrast, subtle specular highlights on skin, crisp shadow separation from background, no soft diffused beauty lighting
Background: neutral dark grey seamless studio background, clean minimal composition, slight falloff gradient
Outfit (exact replication): black strapless bandeau top, smooth stretch fabric, minimalistic silhouette
Accessories (must match exactly): white lace headscarf tightly wrapped around head, large glossy white bangle bracelet with bold black double-C logo, no necklace, no additional visible jewelry
Hair (match styling exactly): very long straight dark brown hair, sleek glossy finish, center part under headscarf, hair falling evenly over both shoulders, realistic strand detail
Makeup (exact replication): glam makeup, matte sculpted skin, defined brows, soft brown smoky eye, subtle eyeliner, contoured cheekbones, nude matte lips, high-definition editorial finish
Realism Requirements: ultra high resolution, sharp focus on visible eye, realistic skin pores, accurate lace texture, realistic plastic gloss on bracelet, natural arm anatomy, no plastic skin, no oversmoothing, no AI artifacts
Camera: full-frame camera, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, high-fashion editorial color grading, neutral cool-toned palette
Negative prompt: low resolution, distorted face, incorrect anatomy, asymmetry errors, extra fingers, warped hands, artificial skin texture, over-smoothed skin, soft beauty lighting, flat lighting, wrong hand placement, closed mouth, exaggerated open mouth, wrong hairstyle, short hair, different headscarf, missing bracelet, incorrect
```

### 126. 偏离中心闪光街拍人像生成器

**作者**: [Rian Arya](https://x.com/Banyu_Biroeee/status/2024547847090356460)  **日期**: 2026-02-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张使用硬直闪光灯拍摄的夜间高级时装街头抓拍肖像。该提示指定了偏离中心构图（三分法构图）、动态的倾斜姿势，以及富士胶片经典负片（Fujifilm Classic Negative）调色板，以营造一种粗犷而时尚的氛围。

![偏离中心闪光街拍人像生成器](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771569164849_qjz8xh_HBijiURbUAAwfJX.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "portrait_generation_parameters",
  "version": "1.3",
  "style_preset": "Off-Center Composition / Flash Street Snap",
  "parameters": {
    "subject_description": {
      "base": "A cute and trendy young woman with a strong sense of lens awareness.",
      "user_portrait_slot": "{User Portrait}",
      "facial_expression": "Playful smile with bright eyes looking directly at the camera.",
      "head_direction": "Head tilted and turned slightly towards the right."
    },
    "apparel_and_outfit": {
      "base": "High-fashion street style.",
      "outfit_slot": "{Apparel/Outfit}",
      "styling_notes": "The outfit should have movement and texture, suitable for a dynamic street snap."
    },
    "pose_and_action": {
      "leg_position": "Legs pressed tightly together, knees slightly buckled inward, one foot slightly forward.",
      "body_orientation": "The body leaning forward and angled towards the right side of the frame.",
      "hands": "Hands resting on the thighs to support the leaning posture.",
      "overall_dynamic": "A cute, youthful standing pose that looks candid and energetic."
    },
    "composition": {
      "framing": "Medium-full body shot.",
      "visual_balance": "Off-center composition. The subject is positioned in the **left third** of the frame (Rule of Thirds).",
      "directional_flow": "The subject's body and gaze are directed from the left side towards the right (into the negative space).",
      "camera_angle": "Eye-level or slightly low angle to accentuate the legs."
    },
    "lighting": {
      "type": "Direct On-Camera Flash (Night).",
      "characteristics": "Hard, direct flash illuminating the subject, creating sharp contrast against the darker street background.",
      "shadows": "Hard drop shadows falling behind the subject."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Urban night street. The empty space on the right side reveals blurred city lights and street details.",
      "atmosphere": "Casual, spontaneous, gritty but stylish."
    },
    "color_palette": {
      "style": "Fujifilm Classic Negative (NC).",
      "tones": "Moody cool tones in the background, warm flash tones on the skin. High contrast."
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "center frame",
      "centered subject",
      "legs apart",
      "wide stance",
      "straight legs",
      "looking left",
      "body facing left",
      "bad anatomy",
      "distorted hands",
      "missing fingers",
      "blurry face",
      "flat lighting"
    ]
  }
}
```

賑やかな人混みの真ん中に佇む若い日本女性の、映画のようなポートレート。真剣な表情で落ち着いた雰囲気を醸し出し、周囲を人々が素早く動き回る中、彼女の顔にピントがしっかりと合っている。被写体の周囲には強い放射状のモーションブラーが施され、ダイナミックな動きのエフェクトと浅い被写界深度が特徴。自然な柔らかな日光、落ち着いた色調、柔らかなベージュとグレーのトーン。中央に寄せた構図、感情の分離をコンセプトに、85mmレンズ、f/1.8、超精細な肌の質感、リアルな写真、ハイダイナミックレンジ、8K解像度。

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2023855408247353803)  **日期**: 2026-02-17  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，要求生成一张逼真的女性时尚杂志肖像（具有特定的姿势、服装和道具），同时生成一个与主体完全相同的 2D 矢量卡通复制品，确保贴纸叠加中的姿势和细节精确镜像。

![时尚专题：精确的 2D 卡通复制品](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771396584911_0fj1tq_HBYtuRAaEAEA8wP.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "fashion_editorial_street_portrait_with_exact_cartoon_duplicate",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.2_EXACT_2D_DUPLICATE_STICKER"
    },
    "input": {
      "mode": "text_to_image",
      "notes": "Create a photoreal fashion portrait AND a 2D cartoon sticker that is an exact duplicate of the real woman’s pose, outfit, accessories and prop placement. The sticker must mirror the real subject precisely."
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 1,
      "sharpness": "editorial_crisp",
      "grain": "subtle_film"
    },
    "scene": {
      "environment": "bold matte red wooden door",
      "lighting": "soft natural daylight, no HDR, balanced contrast",
      "mood": "confident luxury street style"
    },
    "subject": {
      "person": "adult woman",
      "pose": "crouching with knees close together, right hand holding iced coffee with bagel on lid, left hand relaxed near knee",
      "expression": "calm confident subtle smile",
      "hair": "soft brown waves",
      "wardrobe": {
        "dress": "white satin slip dress",
        "boots": "knee-high red leather boots",
        "bag": "large red crescent leather handbag placed on ground to her right side",
        "accessories": "dark oversized sunglasses"
      },
      "props": {
        "drink": "clear iced coffee cup with black straw",
        "food": "toasted sesame bagel placed on top of cup lid"
      }
    },
    "cartoon_sticker": {
      "enabled": true,
      "description": "2D cartoon duplicate of the same woman in EXACT same crouching pose, EXACT same leg angle, EXACT same hand placement, holding iced coffee and bagel in the same position, same white satin dress, same red boots, same red bag location, same sunglasses shape.",
      "style": "clean flat 2D vector illustration, bold black outline, flat color fills, minimal shading, simplified facial details but same hairstyle and expression, small cute proportions but anatomically consistent",
      "placement": "bottom-left corner",
      "scale": "18-22% of image height",
      "edge": "white sticker cutout border",
      "shadow": "subtle soft drop shadow",
      "strict_rules": [
        "do not change pose",
        "do not change outfit colors",
        "do not change prop placement",
        "do not turn into 3D",
        "do not mix realistic shading into sticker"
      ]
    },
    "camera": {
      "lens": "50mm prime",
      "aperture": "f/2.8",
      "focus": "sharp on main subject"
    },
    "style": {
      "aesthetic": "photoreal main image + clean 2D sticker overlay",
      "retouching": "natural skin texture",
      "no": "AI glow, deformed anatomy, sticker becoming realistic, duplicated background, extra limbs"
    }
  }
}
```

Generate Image, Ultra-HD 8K vertical portrait, EOS-style photography. Keep the original face exactly the same — do not alter or enhance any facial features.

A soft natural-light portrait of a woman (keep face, eyes, norse, mouth and hair style same as photo keep my face 100% same as in the reference image) sitting casually on the floor in a bright, minimal studio.
She wears a striped yellow-and-black crop top with a light gray hoodie slightly falling off one shoulder, paired with navy cycling shorts, gray socks, and white sneakers.
Her sitting pose is relaxed and comfortable — one knee bent close to her chest while her other leg extends slightly forward.

She rests one hand loosely on her knee and the other on the floor for balance, gazing softly toward the camera with a calm, serene expression.
Sunlight streams through a nearby window, creating gentle highlights on her face and soft shadows on the floor, adding warmth and natural depth.

Her makeup is light and natural, enhancing her real features.
Her slightly tousled hair catches the sunlight, contributing to a fresh, cozy feel.
The background is clean, neutral, and uncluttered — emphasizing simplicity and calmness.

Cinematic EOS lens clarity, no grain, no blur, true-to-life color and shadow.

傑作、最高品質、高解像度、（全身ショット：1.5）、ファッションスクラップブックページレイアウト、コラージュスタイル、[テーマ/美的キーワード]

[主題]：[キャラクター説明]のワイドショット全身ファッション写真。[ポーズとアクション]。[衣装詳細]、[アクセサリー]を身に着け、（靴が見える：1.3）、頭からつま先まで完璧な体型。

[構成]：画像は[レイアウトメタファー：DIYジン/フィールドドシエ/ムードボード]のようにデザインされており、メインキャラクターを中央に配置し、その周囲を（異なるポラロイド写真3枚：1.3）で囲んでいます。これらの写真にはそれぞれ異なる[テーマ]ディテールが示されています：（[顔/メイクアップディテール]のクローズアップ1枚：1.2）、[生地/テクスチャ/武器ディテール]のマクロ1枚：1.2）、（[靴/アクセサリーディテール]のディテール1枚：1.2）。これにより、挿入写真が重複せず、ユニークでユニークなものとなっています。

[装飾]: [スタイル] スクラップブッキングの要素、[紙の厚さ] の紙をまとめた [クリップの種類: シルバークリップ / ゴールドクリップ / 錆びたクリップ]、[テープの種類: 和紙 / ダクト / マスキング] テープ、手描きの [落書きの種類: 矢印 / 星 / グラフィティ]、[インクの種類] で手書きされたテキスト注釈 (例: [ショートテキスト 1]、[ショートテキスト 2])、[ステッカー/スタンプ]、破れた紙のテクスチャ。
注意：テキスト注釈は日本語である。

[背景]: ([紙の種類: 白紙 / 厚紙 / 地図 / フォルダー] の乱雑な積み重ね: 1.4)、メインシートの下にある紙の端の層、紙の層間のリアルな奥行きと影、[表面の素材と色] の上に配置。

[技術的]: [照明スタイル]、[雰囲気]、シャープフォーカス、エディトリアル写真、8k、触覚的な質感、リアルなマテリアルレンダリング。
```

He has short straight brown hair, light skin, and wears black rectangular eyeglasses. His outfit is minimal and coordinated: a deep burgundy baseball cap with subtle embroidered text, an oversized white sweatshirt with a small elegant graphic logo on the chest, burgundy tailored trousers with a clean modern fit, and clean white sneakers. He carries a small black crossbody bag in some frames.

Each panel captures a different natural pose adjusting his glasses, walking, leaning against a wall, turning casually, lifting one arm confidently, or holding the brim of his cap, creating a relaxed, confident, everyday fashion mood. His expressions range from thoughtful and calm to cheerful and carefree.

The setting is an outdoor urban environment with modern architecture, cobblestone walkways, neutral-toned buildings, large wooden planters, and leafless trees decorated with red lantern-style lights. One central frame features a classic storefront façade labeled “{argument name="storefront label" default="[Add Text]"},” adding a European café street aesthetic.

Backgrounds are softly blurred, emphasizing the subject while maintaining environmental context. Lighting is natural daylight with soft shadows, overcast tones, and balanced exposure. The color palette is cohesive and elegant, burgundy reds, crisp whites, muted greys, and warm wood tones, creating a refined street-style look.

Textures are realistic: cotton fabric folds, natural fabric movement, leather accessories, and stone pavement. Shot in high resolution, lifestyle fashion photography style, shallow depth of field, editorial composition, authentic street photography feel, clean framing, modern Instagram lookbook aesthetic, minimal color grading, soft contrast, natural motion capture.

Octane render & Unreal Engine.
