**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2022667561381339220)  **日期**: 2026-02-14  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张写实的黑白纪录片风格图像，描绘一对情侣在城市街道上遭遇大雨，用夹克遮挡雨水，强调抓拍构图、湿润的纹理和高对比度的单色胶片颗粒。

![雨中黑白纪录片情侣（图像到图像）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771137186540_cbs70z_HBH1YE4acAEzcO9.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "photoreal_documentary_couple_rain_black_and_white",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.0_BW_RAIN_CANDID_JACKET_SHIELD"
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "resolution": "high",
      "num_images": 4
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "raw romantic documentary moment in heavy rain, captured like street photojournalism",
      "environment": "city street in a downpour, wet pavement with reflections, soft out-of-focus buildings and street signs in the background",
      "key_action": "man holding a jacket above both heads as rain shield while they move quickly, laughing and close together",
      "composition": "mid-shot to 3/4 body, dynamic candid framing, shallow depth of field, background unobtrusive"
    },
    "subject": {
      "couple": "adult woman and adult man",
      "wardrobe": {
        "woman": "white shirt loosely tied, dark skirt, visible wet fabric texture, natural styling",
        "man": "dark shirt and trousers soaked by rain, wristwatch visible, jacket lifted above them"
      },
      "pose": "moving fast under the jacket, bodies close, woman smiling widely, man looking at her with a protective gesture",
      "details": "wet hair strands, rain droplets on skin and clothing, natural wrinkles and cling of wet fabric"
    },
    "camera": {
      "shot": "documentary street photo",
      "lens_mm": 35,
      "aperture": 2.8,
      "focus": "sharp faces and hands; background softly blurred",
      "quality_tags": "ultra-photoreal, crisp rain streaks, realistic wet textures, subtle film grain"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "style": "overcast rainy daylight or dim street ambient",
      "notes": "keep highlights controlled on wet skin and fabric; preserve raindrop visibility"
    },
    "color_grade": {
      "mode": "black_and_white",
      "contrast": "high contrast monochrome with filmic rolloff",
      "grain": "subtle 35mm film grain"
    },
    "negative_prompt": "color, HDR, oversaturated, plastic skin, CGI, cartoon, blur, lowres, fake rain overlay, incorrect rain direction, deformed hands, extra fingers, duplicated limbs, text, logo, watermark"
  }
}
```

### 150. 街头服饰情侣泳池拍摄提示（空泳池）

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2022336100845719733)  **日期**: 2026-02-13  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张超现实的 35 毫米胶片照片，内容是一对情侣穿着配套的超大码街头服饰，置身于夜晚空旷的水泥滑板池中。它要求从上传的照片中严格进行 1:1 的面部复制，并详细说明使用硬闪光灯照明，以营造高对比度的“快照”美学。

![街头服饰情侣泳池拍摄提示（空泳池）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050465243_9p384g_HBDH90QagAA1sLc.jpg)
![街头服饰情侣泳池拍摄提示（空泳池）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050465298_rfpk59_HBDH9tVbsAAAx4c.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded photos as the ONLY appearance standards: keep the faces of both people 1:1 (features, proportions, age, skin tone, hair color/length), without changing their appearance even by 1%, without enhancing, without facial retouching. Ultra-realistic film fashion shoot of the couple (35mm film photo), streetwear aesthetics, "caught on film". Location: an empty concrete pool/skate pool with smooth curves (empty pool bowl), worn paint in blue and mint shades, signs of use and light dirt are visible, night-time atmosphere. Frame: vertical 3:4, tilted composition (slight Dutch angle), medium shot. The couple is positioned diagonally in the frame. Pose (important): the guy is sitting by the wall of the pool, his back leaning against the edge and looking at the camera. The girl is lying on top of the edge, her head hanging down next to the guy's head (their heads almost touching). The girl's hair hangs loosely down. The mood is calm, slightly detached. Images: identical white oversized streetwear sweatshirts with large black text and a red graphic element on the chest (no specific brands/logos), identical neutral light-colored shorts/bottoms, minimalism. Lighting: hard flash to the forehead (direct on-camera flash), strong shadows and sharp contrast, "snapshot" aesthetic, bright highlights on the skin and fabric, darker background. Film style: real film grain, slight color shift, light green/blue cast, soft blur at the edges, subtle vignette, dust/scratches, analog sharpness. Realism: genuine leather (pore detail), natural hair, textured sweatshirt fabric. Aspect ratio 3:4.
```

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2022181577091158380)  **日期**: 2026-02-13  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的提示，指示将上传的图像转换为 64K DSLR 风格的 3x3 拼贴画，内容为时尚都市时装摄影。它详细说明了拍摄对象的形象、服装（酒红色帽子、白色运动衫）、各种抓拍姿势、都市环境细节（鹅卵石、红色灯笼灯光），以及 Octane 渲染和虚幻引擎等技术要求。

![都市时尚画册拼贴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1771050473053_0kpv9r_HBA7bTZaYAAoxW1.jpg)

```
Transform this image [Upload Your Image] into a 64K DSLR shot resolution of a stylish urban fashion photoshoot presented as a 3x3 collage, featuring a young man (same face as the uploaded image) captured in candid lifestyle poses across a modern city setting. He has short straight brown hair, light skin, and wears black rectangular eyeglasses. His outfit is minimal and coordinated: a deep burgundy baseball cap with subtle embroidered text, an oversized white sweatshirt with a small elegant graphic logo on the chest, burgundy tailored trousers with a clean modern fit, and clean white sneakers. He carries a small black crossbody bag in some frames.

Each panel captures a different natural pose adjusting his glasses, walking, leaning against a wall, turning casually, lifting one arm confidently, or holding the brim of his cap, creating a relaxed, confident, everyday fashion mood. His expressions range from thoughtful and calm to cheerful and carefree.

The setting is an outdoor urban environment with modern architecture, cobblestone walkways, neutral-toned buildings, large wooden planters, and leafless trees decorated with red lantern-style lights. One central frame features a classic storefront façade labeled “[Add Text],” adding a European café street aesthetic.

Backgrounds are softly blurred, emphasizing the subject while maintaining environmental context. Lighting is natural daylight with soft shadows, overcast tones, and balanced exposure. The color palette is cohesive and elegant, burgundy reds, crisp whites, muted greys, and warm wood tones, creating a refined street-style look.

Textures are realistic: cotton fabric folds, natural fabric movement, leather accessories, and stone pavement. Shot in high resolution, lifestyle fashion photography style, shallow depth of field, editorial composition, authentic street photography feel, clean framing, modern Instagram lookbook aesthetic, minimal color grading, soft contrast, natural motion capture.

Octane render & Unreal Engine.
```

> 一个结构化提示，用于生成一张高魅力、网红风格的自拍，画面中两位女性（一位身穿红色乳胶衣，一位身穿黑色紧身胸衣）在黄金时段，户外几何隐私屏前，身体相互依偎，嘟着嘴。

![两位嘟嘴女性的网红风格自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878354397_esh9jk_HA5jTlkXsAARRaQ.jpg)
![两位嘟嘴女性的网红风格自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878354474_q3hhcf_HA5jTglXwAAifcP.jpg)
![两位嘟嘴女性的网红风格自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878354514_03byhf_HA5jTp1WAAEt-94.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject_composition": {
      "type": "Selfie portrait",
      "subjects": [
        {
          "position": "Left",
          "appearance": {
            "gender": "Female",
            "hair": "Long, voluminous dark brunette, middle part, soft waves",
            "makeup": "Full glam, matte finish, heavy blush, sculpted brows, matte nude pouty lips",
            "clothing": "{argument name="left clothing" default="Red latex camisole"} with spaghetti straps, high sheen material"
          }
        },
        {
          "position": "Right",
          "appearance": {
            "gender": "Female",
            "hair": "Long dark brunette, swept back",
            "makeup": "Full glam, dewy skin, rosy cheeks, glossy nude pouty lips",
            "clothing": "Black strapless bustier top",
            "accessories": [
              "Black sunglasses resting on top of head",
              "Diamond stud earring"
            ]
          }
        }
      ],
      "interaction": "Heads leaning together, cheek-to-cheek, both making kissing/pouty faces at the camera"
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Outdoors, daytime",
      "background_elements": "Brown metal privacy screen with geometric star-shaped cutouts, green tree foliage visible above and behind fence"
    },
    "technical_specs": {
      "resolution": "4K Ultra HD",
      "quality": "Photorealistic, highly detailed",
      "lighting": "Natural bright sunlight, warm golden hour tones, hard shadows, specular highlights on skin and latex",
      "camera_style": "Smartphone selfie angle, wide aperture, sharp focus on faces"
    },
    "style_tags": [
      "Influencer style",
      "Celebrity photography",
      "High fashion",
      "Social media aesthetic",
      "Glamour shot"
    ]
  }
```

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2021635546158616578)  **日期**: 2026-02-11  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的生活肖像：一位身穿腮红粉色缎面连衣裙的女士，在郁郁葱葱的绿色公园背景中吹着彩虹色的肥皂泡，强调柔和的光线和逼真的织物纹理。

![泡泡公园中逼真的生活方式肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878330885_enuo6s_HA5Ksi3bsAItvVn.jpg)
![泡泡公园中逼真的生活方式肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878331015_6d9qhd_HA5Ksn3WsAAIW2E.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "task_type": "photoreal_lifestyle_portrait_bubble_park",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.0_PINK_SATIN_BUBBLES_PARK"
    },
    "output": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "resolution": "ultra_high",
      "num_images": 4,
      "sharpness": "high",
      "grain": "subtle_analog"
    },
    "scene": {
      "concept": "romantic candid portrait of a woman blowing soap bubbles in a green park",
      "environment": "lush city park with willow trees in the background, open lawn, soft cloudy daylight, distant people and park elements softly blurred",
      "composition": "vertical full/three-quarter body, subject seated on grass slightly right of center, bubbles drifting across the left side of the frame, strong depth and layering",
      "mood": "playful, dreamy, serene"
    },
    "subject": {
      "person": "adult woman",
      "pose": "sitting on the grass with legs folded to the side, torso upright; one hand holding bubble wand near lips; other hand holding bubble bottle",
      "expression": "eyes gently closed or relaxed, lips pursed blowing bubbles",
      "hair": "long straight dark hair, center part, smooth natural shine",
      "makeup": "soft natural glam, defined lashes, neutral blush, muted nude-pink lips",
      "wardrobe": {
        "dress": "dusty-rose / blush pink satin maxi dress, subtle sheen, thin straps, soft drape and realistic satin highlights and folds"
      },
      "accessories": "multiple silver rings and bracelets, minimal elegant jewelry"
    },
    "props": {
      "bubble_kit": "small bubble wand with red ring and a small bubble solution bottle in hand"
    },
    "bubbles": {
      "quantity": "many",
      "look": "iridescent rainbow soap bubbles with realistic reflections and refraction",
      "motion": "some bubbles sharp near the subject, others slightly blurred with motion and distance"
    },
    "camera": {
      "shot_type": "lifestyle portrait",
      "lens": "35mm",
      "aperture": "f/2.0",
      "focus": "face and bubble wand sharp; bubbles in mid-air partially sharp; background softly blurred",
      "framing": "9:16 vertical, eye-level"
    },
    "lighting": {
      "key_light": "soft overcast daylight",
      "fill": "natural ambient fill from grass and sky",
      "highlights": "controlled satin specular highlights, no clipping",
      "skin_tone": "natural, realistic texture, no plastic smoothing"
    },
    "color_grading": {
      "palette": "fresh greens + blush pink satin + rainbow bubble iridescence",
      "look": "clean, airy, cinematic-natural",
      "contrast": "medium",
      "saturation": "natural with bubbles slightly vivid"
    },
    "quality_rules": {
      "anatomy_accuracy": "strict",
      "hands": "correct fingers, natural joints, no extra digits",
      "face_integrity": "no warping, no asymmetry artifacts",
      "fabric_realism": "tr"
    }
}
```

### 166. Z 世代时尚肖像：Labubu 与猫咪提示词

**作者**: [simeon-sanai](https://x.com/Naiknelofar788/status/2021574480766943706)  **日期**: 2026-02-11  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超现实影棚照片的提示词，照片中人物（身份信息保留自参考照片）身穿 Z 世代街头服饰，倚靠在一个真人大小的毛绒 Labubu 玩偶上，旁边有一只超现实的英国短毛猫，所有元素都置于充满活力的橙色影棚背景中。

![Z 世代时尚肖像：Labubu 与猫咪提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770878336311_11vswr_HA4TRLRaoAAtLCA.jpg)

```
Create a hyper-realistic, high-detail studio photoshoot featuring the same person from the reference photo with the exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, proportions, and identity fully preserved (no changes to face or structure). She is wearing stylish Gen-Z fashion attire trendy, minimal, modern streetwear. She is leaning casually on a realistic, fluffy, life-sized Labubu character, rendered in soft fur texture with playful expression. A British Shorthair cat sits or poses nearby, also hyperrealistic with detailed fur and natural posture.

The entire scene is set against a smooth, seamless, vibrant orange studio backdrop with professional studio lighting, crisp shadows, clean highlights, and a premium fashion editorial vibe. Ultra-photorealistic, flawless skin texture (but unchanged identity), high-end photography style, full-body or mid-shot composition.
```

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2021269332752511311)  **日期**: 2026-02-10  **语言**: en

> 以下是为 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张高角度、抓拍的夜间街头时尚照片的详细提示。它指定了拍摄对象的外观（使用面部参考）、服装（牛仔夹克、白色运动鞋）、环境（小型超市入口）和技术细节（Canon AE-1 胶片效果、冷荧光灯与暖街灯混合、4:5 宽高比）。

![街头抓拍：夜间时尚摄影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770792198781_qml8q3_HAz9viraAAMxsA_.jpg)

```
High-angle candid night street fashion photograph, shot from an upper floor across the street, looking downward.
A young woman (face photo reference) stands alone near a minimarket entrance, slightly off-center. Full body visible with open negative space.
She wears a white T-shirt, a washed blue denim jacket, dark straight-leg jeans, and white canvas sneakers. A small tote bag hangs from one shoulder. Hair loose or tied low, slightly messy.
Bright minimarket lighting spills onto the pavement, creating soft reflections. Glass doors show blurred interior shelves and posters.
She stands still for a moment, holding a white takeaway coffee cup while the other hand adjusts her tote bag strap.
She glances upward casually, unaware of the camera.
Cool fluorescent light mixed with warm street lighting.
Shot on Canon AE-1 film, candid street editorial mood.
Slight desaturation, fine film grain.
Sharp subject, gently softened background.
No other people. No readable text.
Aspect ratio 4:5.
```

> 一个用于生成奇幻生动日落风景照片的提示。照片中，一只黑猫的剪影在草地上行走，夕阳的金色光芒从其身后照来。背景中，湖面映照着城市景观，包括帝国大厦，营造出一种神秘的氛围，并带有橙色、紫色和蓝色的暖色渐变。

![奇幻日落风景：黑猫剪影与城市倒影](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770706235578_tqj840_HAvkWIlaAAEJPWP.jpg)

```
幻想的で鮮明な風景写真。夕暮れ時。草むらの中を歩く{argument name="動物" default="黒猫"}のシルエット。シルエットは、沈みゆく太陽の黄金色の光によって逆光になっている。背景には、湖のような水面に、{argument name="建物" default="エンパイア・ステート・ビルがあるビル群"}が立ち並んでおり、その姿が水面に映り込んでいる。空はオレンジ、紫、青のグラデーション。光は暖かく、全体的に神秘的な雰囲気。
```

### 174. 埃隆·马斯克 K-Pop 坏男孩发型参考海报

**作者**: [Sadia](https://x.com/SadiaMalik182/status/2020863785641161083)  **日期**: 2026-02-09  **语言**: en

> 这是一个极其详细的多段式提示，旨在让 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 模型生成一张 3x3 网格海报，海报中埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）留着各种男性化的 K-Pop 高级时尚发型。该提示对面部表情（平静、坚忍、不微笑）、肢体语言（阳刚、强壮、每个面板姿势不同）、强制性配饰（钻石耳钉）以及特定的仪容要求（哑光皮肤、零油光、无瑕质感）都施加了严格的规定。它还概述了九种具体的短发、中长发和长发发型，将应用于网格中的不同面板。

![埃隆·马斯克 K-Pop 坏男孩发型参考海报](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770706216589_az6x6n_HAuM4F9agAAJ95g.jpg)

```
FACIAL IDENTITY & Elon musk EXPRESSION CONTROL:
- Masculine facial expression only: calm, confident, stoic, slightly intense
- No smiling, no playful or cute expressions
- Strong jaw presence and grounded masculinity
- Editorial “bad boy” attitude, controlled and confident

Create a MEN’S Korean high-fashion hairstyle reference poster with EXACTLY 9 PANELS.

POSTER LAYOUT (STRICT):
- EXACT 3x3 grid (9 panels only)
- Perfect symmetry, equal panel size
- Consistent framing and crop
- Neutral studio background
- Luxury men’s fashion editorial layout

POSE, BODY LANGUAGE & HAND GESTURES (VERY IMPORTANT):
- Each panel MUST have a DIFFERENT pose
- All poses must read MANLY and STRONG
- Strong neck posture and jaw angles
- Subtle head turns, chin forward or slightly down
- Natural masculine hand poses allowed:
  - Hand near jaw or chin
  - Fingers touching neck or collarbone
  - Hand brushing hair back
  - Relaxed hand near face
- No soft wrist bends, no feminine gestures
- Poses should feel dynamic, confident, rebellious

BAD BOY ENERGY:
- Calm but dangerous confidence
- Slight intensity in eyes
- Editorial “don’t-care but powerful” presence
- Masculine K-Pop idol bad boy aesthetic

ACCESSORIES (MANDATORY):
- Diamond stud earrings in EVERY panel
- Earrings must be small, clean, masculine, high-end
- Some panels may include:
  - Classic aesthetic reading glasses
  - Stylish black sunglasses
- Accessories must enhance masculinity, not distract

MAKEUP & GROOMING (VERY IMPORTANT):
- Sophisticated masculine elegance
- Sharp jawline definition
- Pristine, absolutely flawless realistic skin texture
- High-end fashion editorial grooming
- Matte-finish skin: zero shine, zero oil, zero sweat
- Imperceptible pores, ultra-clean complexion
- Very subtle, undetectable corrective grooming
- Enhances bone structure naturally without visible makeup
- Ultimate freshness and health despite movement
- Neutral, hydrated matte lips
- Neat, masculine eyebrows (not overstyled)

HAIRSTYLES TO APPLY:

SHORT HAIR:
1. Buzz Cut Korean (strong frontal bad-boy pose)
2. Short Korean Side Part (power editorial pose)
3. Short Two Block Perm (structured, confident masculinity)

MEDIUM HAIR:
4. Comma Hair (controlled bad-boy elegance)
5. Messy Korean Medium Perm (rugged, textured energy)
6. Braids (bold, masculine, fashion-forward)

LONG HAIR:
7. High Bun Soft Korean Perm (warrior-like posture)
8. Wolf Cut (rebellious, edgy male fashion)
9. Long Wavy Choppy Hair (rockstar bad-boy masculinity)

HAIR REALISM RULES:
- Ultra-photorealistic hair texture
- Natural masculine hair density
- No beauty-gloss finish
- Hair moves naturally with head and hand gestures
- Realistic hairline adjustments only

PHOTOGRAPHY & FASHION STYLE:
- MEN’S high-fashion editorial photoshoot
- Masculine lighting with soft contrast
- Shadows enhance jaw, cheekbones, and neck
- Korean luxury men’s magazine aesthetic
- Bold, confident, fashion-forward mood

TEXT & LABEL
```

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张超现实的、业余风格的 iPhone 肖像照片，重点是保持上传面部参考的精确几何结构和特征。场景设定在黄昏的城市停车场，捕捉一个随意的、抓拍的瞬间，并带有特定的光线和纹理细节。

![业余 iPhone 人像照片，带精确面部参考](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770706148405_efus36_HArtGYtaMAEzGcp.jpg)

```
An amateur photo taken on an iPhone. Use the face from the uploaded photos as the ONLY and ACCURATE face reference keep the proportions of the face 1:1, accurate geometry, similarity, age and expression. Don't change your facial features by even 1%. No embellishments, no stylization. The scene: an outdoor parking lot near a low modern brick building, early evening soft sky, a few parked cars in the background, casual street atmosphere, slightly messy urban surroundings. Pose and action: the camera is slightly below eye level and close to the subject. The model is framed chest-up, centered, shoulders relaxed, body turned 3/4, head slightly tilted toward the camera, one hand lifting the brim of a {argument name="cap color" default="black"} baseball cap, the other arm relaxed out of frame. Outfit: oversized {argument name="sweatshirt color" default="light beige/cream"} sweatshirt with subtle worn texture, black baseball cap with small white stitching, no jewelry, no accessories. Emotions: a wide natural smile, friendly candid vibe. Lighting: soft natural daylight (late afternoon/early evening), gentle even shadows, no flash, natural contrast. Realistic skin: hyper-realistic skin texture, visible pores, barely noticeable imperfections, natural skin shine. Hair: natural growth line, a few stray hairs near the cap, realistic strands. Hands: natural skin texture, soft transitions of light on the knuckles, realistic nails. Camera and appearance: the photo was taken on an iPhone, amateur framing, slightly tilted horizon, RAW image, jpeg compression, moderate grain, natural color tones, no retouching, shallow depth of field. Ar 3:4.

### 183. PC 到智能手机网页设计转换提示，适用于 Nano-banana Pro

**作者**: [まさた｜Web制作](https://x.com/Masa_nmFL/status/2020444494920065042)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: ja

> 这是一个针对 Nano-banana Pro 的详细系统提示，指示其扮演一名熟练的 UI 设计师。它将 PC 网页设计图像的一部分转换为针对智能手机 (SP) 屏幕优化的响应式布局。该提示包含布局转换的具体规则（将水平元素垂直堆叠）、保持设计一致性（颜色、字体、样式），以及排除不必要的元素（如页眉或页脚），只专注于提供的部分。

```
# 命令
あなたは熟練したUIデザイナーです。
添付された「PC版Webデザインの一部（セクション）」画像を解析し、そのパーツがスマホ（SP）画面で表示された際の最適なレイアウト画像を生成してください。

# 生成のルール（セクション特化）
1. 独立したコンポーネントとして処理:
- ヘッダーやフッター、余計なナビゲーションバーは一切追加しないでください。
- 画像にある要素（テキスト、アイコン、写真）のみを使用して再構成してください。

2. レイアウトのレスポンシブ化（Stacking）:
- PCで横並び（Horizontal row）になっている要素は、スマホ用に縦積み（Vertical column）に変更してください。
- 余白（Padding/Margin）はスマホの狭い画面幅に合わせて適切に調整してください。

3. デザインの継承:
- 元画像の配色、フォントの雰囲気、装飾スタイルを維持してください。
- 画像のアスペクト比は、要素が縦に並ぶことを想定して 縦長（{argument name="アスペクト比" default="3:4 または 9:16"}）で生成してください。

# アクション
添付画像のセクションを、スマホの画面幅（375px〜）に最適化したデザインカンプとして1枚生成してください。
```

### 184. 三联画构图提示，用于抽象时尚专题报道

**作者**: [KTDS](https://x.com/KTDS_Official/status/2020440677557969389)  **日期**: 2026-02-08  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多面板提示，旨在生成一个垂直三联画（三个堆叠图像），描绘同一个高光泽、雕塑感的主题。该提示通过极端的特写镜头技术（低角度、微距、倾斜角度、选择性模糊）来规定不断升级的亲密感和强度，从而在不依赖环境或道具的情况下，创造出一种动态、抽象的时尚编辑风格。

![三联画构图提示，用于抽象时尚专题报道](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770619708000_wd22mq_HAoLvZvawAA-v1y.jpg)

```
THE TASK
Act as a world-class fashion photographer shooting a defining editorial campaign. Create a cohesive 3-panel vertical triptych (stacked top, middle, bottom) of the same subject. The sequence escalates intimacy and intensity through extreme proximity, revealing tactile hyper-realism and restrained dynamic power purely via photographic technique — no environmental changes, no added elements.
TRIPTYCH COMPOSITION
(VERTICAL STACK – ESCALATING CLOSE-UP INTENSITY)
Top Panel – Presence (Intense Dominant Close-Up)
Dynamic low 3/4 angle close-up (camera below the main form, tilted upward) to create looming, commanding scale.
Tight crop: the subject’s primary focal feature and sharp contours dominate; one side falls into deep shadow.
Subtle implied motion via slight rotational tilt and micro-blur only on far-edge highlights — keep the central zone razor-sharp.
Specular streaks rake across glossy surfaces like wet lacquer, emphasizing curvature and fine material imperfections.
Background: pure high-key white with faint gradient falloff — identical across all panels, no environmental cues.
Middle Panel – Control (Kinetic Structural Sweep)
Canted-angle macro from the side with aggressive perspective distortion.
Crop frames the central structural zone, with key elements off-center and partially cut by frame edges.
Highlights slice diagonally across contoured channels and ridges due to the dramatic angle.
Very shallow depth of field: nearest surface tack-sharp, farther planes melt softly to suggest velocity and tension.
Same pure high-key white background and exact tonal range — variation achieved solely through camera angle and lens proximity.
Bottom Panel – Essence (Extreme Graphic Detail)
Extreme macro from an aggressive angle evoking a controlled whip-pan. Choose one signature detail and make it feel alive with implied motion while remaining graphically pristine:

A protruding or extending element shot from below, strongly foreshortened, reaching toward the lens,
Or a central geometric/functional feature shot on a steep diagonal, highlights spiraling like motion trails,
Or a sharp edge or blade-like contour shot from behind, catching a razor-thin specular line.

Apply controlled directional blur only to a secondary trailing plane; keep the primary micro-texture impeccably crisp.
Frame so tight it becomes near-abstract: beveled edges, micro-scratches, gloss pooling, subtle material stress marks, fine imperfections.
No debris, no additional elements — identical high-key white background maintained.
STYLING & BOLD CHOICES (CRITICAL)
Subject: {argument name="subject material" default="any high-gloss, sculpted form with precise contours and reflective surfaces"}.
No additional objects, characters, props, text, or logos.
All sense of energy and motion derived exclusively from camera technique: low/canted angles, foreshortening, shallow depth of field, controlled selective blur, and highlight flow.
Identical lighting rig across all three panels — consistent
```

### 189. 超逼真的街头照片，保留特定主体

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2019968323421892691)  **日期**: 2026-02-07  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的冬季街头照片，照片中有一个男人。该提示要求 1:1 保留上传的面部/身体特征，并指定了场景（湿沥青、光秃秃的树木、城市街道）、服装（超大号深橄榄色连帽衫、蓬松的米色羊毛围巾）和技术细节（RAW iPhone 拍摄效果、冷白平衡、自然皮肤纹理），以实现最大程度的真实感。

![超逼真的街头照片，保留特定主体](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532799758_51rv1c_HAheeqnbcAALkJ9.jpg)
![超逼真的街头照片，保留特定主体](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770532800103_unwnbu_HAhee0XacAEtBZa.jpg)

```
Generate a realistic street photo of a guy on your iPhone in the casual street photography style. Use the face from the uploaded photo as the only and precise appearance standard: preserve facial features, face and body proportions, age, hair color and length at a 1:1 ratio, without even 1% change. The guy is standing on a city street in winter, leaning his shoulder slightly against a black street lamp on the sidewalk. His pose is relaxed, one hand in his pocket, the other hanging loosely. In the background are an intersection, bare winter trees, tall buildings, and a few people in the distance; the asphalt is wet after snow, creating a cool city atmosphere. Clothing: an oversized dark olive hoodie without a hood, a voluminous beige-cream scarf partially covers his head and hangs down slightly; the fabric is wool, the fibers are visible. Light: natural winter daylight, soft shadows, cool white balance, no flash. Realism: ultra-realistic photo, natural skin texture, pores, subtle imperfections, realistic fabric textures (scarf wool, thick cotton hoodie), no neural network effects. Quality: photo from the iPhone's main camera, RAW iPhone look, slight digital noise, natural sharpness. Aspect ratio 3:4.
```

"camera_settings": "Shot on iPhone 17 Pro Max main camera (24mm equivalent), f/1.78, natural shallow depth of field, realistic iPhone computational photography look, ultra-crisp yet natural detail, subtle lens flare and micro-contrast, 48MP ProRAW-style quality downsampled to 12MP look, ultra-photorealistic, zero AI smoothness, visible authentic skin texture and pores, medium-full body shot"
},
"primary_subjects": [
{
"character": "attached celebrity",

"details": "Long blonde wavy hair with small hair clip, bold dramatic eye makeup, glossy red lips, very short shiny {argument name="dress color" default="red"} satin strapless mini dress with subtle ruffle/peplum edge, {argument name="shoe color" default="red"} high heels with ankle strap detail, large gold bracelet, realistic skin texture with natural pores, subtle imperfections and glow from real lighting"
}
],
"environment_details": {

"architecture": "Vintage wooden makeup dresser cluttered with lipsticks, nail polish, bottles, brushes, red rose in vase, yellow 'KEOR UNREAL' ashtray, chrome hubcaps on brick wall, pink 'XOXO Sydney' writing on mirror, red ribbons scattered on floor",
"fidelity": "Ultra-photorealistic real photograph look, iPhone 17 Pro Max natural rendering, lifelike satin folds and realistic light reflection, authentic skin micro-texture, natural hair strands, exact seductive pose, precise real-world lighting behavior, dominant red color scheme, glamorous burlesque photoshoot captured like a real behind-the-scenes iPhone shot"
}
}

### 191. 超逼真偷拍旅行浪漫场景：爱琴海石街

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2019828592989892838)  **日期**: 2026-02-06  **语言**: en

> 这是一个为 NanoBanana Pro 工具设计的高度详细的 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张超逼真、抓拍式的电影剧照，捕捉爱琴海狭窄石街上的浪漫瞬间。该提示详细说明了相机设置（35mm 镜头，手持）、光线（自然阴影/轮廓光）、主体细节（年轻，真实质感，特定服装）以及一个微妙的微动作（整理衣领），以捕捉宁静的温柔。

![超逼真偷拍旅行浪漫场景：爱琴海石街](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770446082716_lvjgtg_HAffV6cWAAAkwFN.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_travel_romance",
      "version": "v1.0_AEGEAN_STONE_STREET_SHADE_WALK_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "restrained_true_to_life",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },
    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, handheld, candid documentary feel",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (shade bounce + sun rim), no flash",
      "authenticity_markers": "real stone texture, chipped paint, imperfect framing, no glamour look"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Narrow stone street in a small Aegean town, bougainvillea overhead. They walk slowly in afternoon shade. A tiny gesture becomes the scene.",
      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "young man and woman early 20s, ordinary and real; faces visible and sharp",
        "expression": "calm smiles, comfortable silence",
        "skin_and_face": "natural texture, no retouch"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "female": "simple summer dress or light shirt, cotton texture, hair slightly frizzy from humidity",
        "male": "plain shirt/t-shirt, casual pants, slightly wrinkled",
        "props": "small backpack or tote, no logos"
      },
      "micro_action": "one adjusts the other’s collar or hair without thinking; they exchange a small look",
      "environment_details": {
        "location": "Aegean stone street",
        "background": "whitewashed walls with worn edges, stone steps, bougainvillea, a cat blurred near a doorway",
        "signage_rule": "no readable text/logos"
      },
      "lighting": "soft shade with gentle sun rim; controlled highlights; deep but detailed shadows",
      "composition": "eye-level medium shot, slightly tilted, imperfect framing like real street photography; faces sharp; background recedes naturally",
      "mood": "quiet tenderness, real time"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "studio lighting",
      "flash",
      "beauty retouch",
      "plastic skin",
      "model faces",
      "perfect symmetry",
      "HDR",
      "AI glow",
      "luxury fashion shoot",
      "text",
      "logo",
      "watermark"
    ]
  }
}

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张年轻女性的生活方式/角色扮演肖像。她身穿蓝色超级英雄紧身衣（蜘蛛女），坐在一辆汽车的棕褐色皮革内饰中。该提示详细定义了色彩配置文件（互补的蓝色和棕褐色）、自然日光照明和技术规格，以实现清晰、结构化和锐利聚焦的图像。

![车内女性的 Cosplay 生活方式肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187154167_io04ec_HAQVf3bX0AAguOy.jpg)

```
{
"metadata": {
"confidence_score": "high",
"image_type": "photograph",
"primary_purpose": "social media"
},
"composition": {
"rule_applied": "center composition",
"aspect_ratio": "4:5 (portrait)",
"layout": "single subject",
"focal_points": [
"Subject's face",
"Blue bodysuit texture vs tan leather"
],
"visual_hierarchy": "Viewer notices the blue subject first due to color contrast against the tan seats, then moves to the face, then follows the legs and car interior details.",
"balance": "asymmetric - subject curled to one side but framed centrally within the car seat structure"
},
"color_profile": {
"dominant_colors": [
{
"color": "Cognac/Tan",
"hex": "#A86334",
"percentage": "45%",
"role": "background (car seats)"
},
{

"hex": "#384B75",
"percentage": "30%",

},

},
{

},
{

"role": "background (wall)"

],
"color_palette": "complementary",

},
"lighting": {

"source_count": "single source (sun)",
"direction": "top/front",

"quality": "soft light",

"type": "soft gradual edges",
"density": "gray",

"length": "short"
},
"highlights": {

"placement": "shoulders, forehead, leather seat bolsters, knees of bodysuit"
},
"ambient_fill": "present",
"light_temperature": "neutral daylight"
},
"technical_specs": {

"sharpness": "tack sharp",
"grain": "none",

},

"Superhero aesthetic",

},

},

"

### 208. 超模在黄金时段城市街道上的肖像

**作者**: [Elara Weiss](https://x.com/ElaraWeiss/status/2018739030095954335)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 和文本提示，用于生成一张逼真的图片：一位丰满的俄罗斯超模，在巴黎或纽约时尚的城市街道上，黄金时段，以抓拍风格捕捉。提示中详细描述了她的身体特征（瓷器般肌肤、冰蓝色眼睛、草莓金色头发）、服装（缎面吊带裙）和环境，并强调了她俏皮的眨眼和调皮的微笑。

![超模在黄金时段城市街道上的肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187154471_8gei7i_HAQAcYvXQAEbZgU.jpg)

```
{
  "model": "gemini-3-pro-image-preview",
  "prompt_json": {
    "environment": {
      "atmosphere": "fashion blogger vibes, sophisticated city life, trendy influencer",
      "background": [
        "Eiffel Tower visible / NYC buildings",
        "historic architecture",
        "city bustling"
      ],
      "foreground": [
        "cobblestone street",
        "designer shopping bags"
      ],
      "lighting": "warm afternoon sun creating flattering light, natural street lighting, golden glow on face",
      "midground": [
        "charming cafe tables",
        "boutique storefronts",
        "fashionable pedestrians blurred"
      ],
      "setting": "trendy city street in Paris/NYC, daytime golden hour"
    },
    "scene_type": "city_street",
    "subject": {
      "age": 20,
      "ethnicity": "Russian supermodel",
      "expression": "playful wink with mischievous dirty smile",
      "outfit": {
        "details": {
          "description": "satin slip dress clinging to curves"
        },
        "type": "fashion"
      },
      "physical": {
        "body": {
          "skin_tone": "porcelain white alabaster skin",
          "type": "thick voluptuous curves with big boobs"
        },
        "eyes": {
          "color": "piercing ice blue captivating"
        },
        "face": {
          "lips": "glossy juicy lips",
          "shape": "oval model face with high sharp cheekbones and defined jawline"
        },
        "hair": {
          "color": "strawberry blonde",
          "length": "past shoulders cascading",
          "style": "high ponytail swinging"
        }
      },
      "pose": "close-up portrait looking directly at camera, hand touching face gently"
    }
  },
  "prompt_text": "Real photograph captured on iPhone 14 Pro camera by a friend during a casual outing.\n\nSUBJECT (IN SHARP FOCUS) - Stunning 20 year old Russian supermodel:\n\nFACE: oval model face with high sharp cheekbones and defined jawline, glossy juicy lips, piercing ice blue captivating eyes looking at camera, flawless porcelain white alabaster skin with natural glow, subtle makeup enhancing features, long lashes, perfect brows.\n\nHAIR: strawberry blonde, high ponytail swinging, past shoulders cascading, catching light beautifully, natural shine.\n\nBODY: thick voluptuous curves with big boobs, porcelain white alabaster skin, realistic skin texture with pores visible, natural definition.\n\nOUTFIT: Wearing satin slip dress clinging to curves.\n\nPOSE: close-up portrait looking directly at camera, hand touching face gently. \n\nEXPRESSION: playful wink with mischievous dirty smile.\n\nSETTING - trendy city street in Paris/NYC, daytime golden hour:\ncobblestone street, designer shopping bags. charming cafe tables, boutique storefronts, fashionable pedestrians blurred. Eiffel Tower visible / NYC buildings, historic architecture, city bustling.\n\nLIGHTING: warm afternoon sun creating flattering light, natural street lighti"
```

**作者**: [Crystal](https://x.com/Cicily_aura/status/2018680597246521820)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张超逼真的生活肖像：Billie Eilish 坐在一张野餐毯上，地点是阳光明媚的公园，她身穿一件鲜艳的印花迷你连衣裙，周围摆放着熟食拼盘和寿司，强调黄金时段的光线和高细节。

![野餐毯上的 Billie Eilish 8K 生活肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187175615_uby1g5_HAPLSVvbEAE95XU.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "{argument name="subject name" default="Billie Eilish"} with fair skin and long, wavy, dirty-blonde/light-brown hair.",
      "pose": "Sitting on a picnic blanket in a park, legs tucked to the side. One arm is raised with her hand resting gently on the back of her head/neck, fingers in her hair. The other arm rests straight down on the blanket.",
      "expression": "Direct eye contact with the camera, soft neutral expression to a subtle smile.",
      "apparel": {
        "clothing": "Short, strapless mini slip dress. Fabric is vibrant emerald green with a small, busy, animal-print or ditsy floral pattern in light beige/white.",
        "accessories": "Small, delicate gold pendant necklace; thin bracelet on the raised wrist."
      }
    },
    "setting": {
      "location": "Spacious outdoor park on a sunny day.",
      "background": "Green manicured grass leading back to large, mature deciduous trees with full green canopies. A body of water (lake or river) is visible in the distant left background. The sky is a vibrant blue with scattered white wispy clouds.",
      "foreground": "A large, textured cream/off-white picnic blanket spread over the grass."
    },
    "props_and_objects": {
      "picnic_basket": "A large, rectangular woven wicker picnic basket in a warm orange-brown wood tone, positioned on the left side of the blanket.",
      "food_display": {
        "charcuterie_board": "A wooden serving board featuring red and green grapes, raspberries, blueberries, cubes of orange cheddar cheese, and round crackers.",
        "sushi": "A black rectangular tray containing approximately 8 pieces of sushi rolls (maki) with visible salmon or tuna filling, accompanied by wooden chopsticks.",
        "other": "A glimpse of a yellow pillow or cushion behind the basket."
      }
    },
    "technical_specifications": {
      "quality": "8K Ultra HD, extremely detailed, photorealistic, ultra-sharp focus, large format, high-resolution.",
      "lighting": "Natural bright sunlight, mid-to-late afternoon golden hour, soft shadows, vibrant color saturation, realistic reflections and textures.",
      "style": "Lifestyle photography, Instagram aesthetic, summer vibe, high dynamic range (HDR), ultra-realistic."
    },
    "full_combined_prompt": "A photorealistic 8K UHD lifestyle portrait of Billie Eilish with wavy dirty-blonde hair sitting on a large cream picnic blanket in a sunny park. She is wearing a vibrant emerald green patterned strapless mini dress, posing with one hand in her hair and looking at the camera. The setting features lush green grass, large mature trees, and a bright blue sky with wispy clouds. Beside her is a woven wicker picnic basket, a wooden charcuterie board with grapes, berries, cheese, and crackers, and a tray of sushi rolls. Lighting is soft golden hour sunlight, emphasizing ultra-sharp details, realistic textures, and vibrant colors. Large format, ultra-"
  }
}
```

### 211. 使用 Nano Banana Pro 和 Drawthings 进行图像修复

**作者**: [横　優羽子(ゆうこ)](https://x.com/yoko_y__/status/2018676300978766218)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: ja

> 一位用户尝试使用 Nano Banana Pro 生成图像，然后用 Drawthings 进行局部重绘，特别是想在“香蕉”主体中融入人类特征，但发现这很困难。他们指出，GPT Image 1.5 无需 Drawthings 就能生成更好的结果。

![使用 Nano Banana Pro 和 Drawthings 进行图像修复](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187215984_aycmcb_HAPHZPvbYAArd2M.jpg)

```
bananaが写真1と2を人物特徴入れてもなかなか言うことを聞いてくれなく
```

**作者**: [Dockie](https://x.com/Document195/status/2018675725793144961)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个结构化的提示，用于生成一个多图像拼贴画，画面中一位年轻女性在一辆涂鸦复古面包车前摆姿势。它详细说明了拍摄对象的样貌、服装、都市背景，并要求拍摄不同类型的照片（全身照、特写、抓拍瞬间），以实现年轻、无忧无虑且专业的时尚杂志风格。

{
  "prompt": "A lifestyle photo collage featuring a young blonde woman with natural makeup and freckles posing in front of a vintage beige van covered in colorful graffiti and stickers. She is wearing a gray crop top, ripped blue jeans with red patches, and casual sneakers, accessorized with layered gold necklaces and bracelets. In several shots she is holding and sipping a green iced drink with a straw. The setting is a sunny urban street with parked cars and trees. The collage includes full-body shots, mid-shots, close-ups of hands, outfit details, and candid smiling moments. ### 213. 废弃的促销雕像改造提示

**作者**: [Doctor Wasif](https://x.com/doctorwasif/status/2018656958879002659)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个独特的提示，用于将上传的角色图像转换为逼真的、废弃的宣传雕像或服装，发现于黑暗、布满灰尘的地点（例如旧电视演播室）。它要求保留原始角色设计，同时将人物描绘成毫无生气、肮脏且磨损的状态，仅由刺眼的手电筒光束照亮，强调纪录片般的真实感。

![废弃的促销雕像改造提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187140138_7fx439_HAO1zBTaoAEywfl.jpg)
![废弃的促销雕像改造提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187140025_av5uo2_HAO1y_VakAAIvnI.jpg)
![废弃的促销雕像改造提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187139984_ah0drx_HAO1y_WagAAPTxT.jpg)
![废弃的促销雕像改造提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187141056_72vjjz_HAO1zDDbcAEjs8c.jpg)

```
Use the uploaded image of the character as an exact reference. Preserve the original proportions, materials, colors, textures, and facial features. Do not alter the design and do not stylize the character.

A first-person point-of-view shot inside an abandoned space [LOCATION TYPE: television studio/advertising set/real filming location].

The viewer is holding a flashlight, creating a single circular beam of light while the rest of the space is engulfed in darkness. In the flashlight beam, it is visible that the character is positioned as if it was left behind after filming: [POSITION: lying on the floor/curled up in a corner/leaning against a table/slumped against a wall]. The character must appear completely lifeless and inactive: no action, no intentional pose, no sense of presence. If it is a doll or a costume, there must be no visible hands, rods, strings, or person inside.

The character appears old, dirty, and abandoned: worn fabric, accumulated dust, stains, discoloration, flattened or damaged areas.

The environment is clearly abandoned: dusty surfaces, old filming equipment, cables scattered on the floor, faded signs or set decorations.

Dust particles float within the flashlight beam; the space feels silent and untouched for years.

Photorealistic flashlight-based lighting, harsh shadows, rough textures, documentary realism, on-location shooting aesthetics, no stylization Aspect

Ratio 9:16
```

**Related**: [[综合动漫]]

### 214. 花园中男士的自然编辑肖像

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2018615792645165211)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张逼真的生活方式/时尚肖像，描绘一位穿着野战夹克和亚麻衬衫的年轻男士，置身于春季郁郁葱葱的户外花园中。该提示强调柔和、漫射的自然光线，清新的调色板，以及适合编辑内容的轻松、休闲优雅风格。

![花园中男士的自然编辑肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770187156990_syxgvf_HAOQWLkaEAAjaF7.jpg)

```
{
  "image_type": "photograph",
  "orientation": "vertical",
  "composition": {
    "framing": "medium shot from upper thighs to head",
    "camera_angle": "eye-level, straight-on",
    "subject_position": "centered",
    "pose": "relaxed stance with hands resting at hips or in pockets",
    "balance": "symmetrical subject placement with organic background framing",
    "depth_of_field": "moderate, subject clearly separated from detailed background"
  },
  "subject": {
    "count": 1,
    "description": "young male-presenting individual",

**作者**: [Iris](https://x.com/xIrissy/status/2018596903718690984)  **日期**: 2026-02-03  **语言**: en

Behind her are pale green paneled double doors with brass handles and a sandstone wall with a plaque reading '3 BRUNSWICK'. ### 219. 黑白街头摄影：决定性瞬间

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2018433422260044253)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化且结构化的提示，用于生成一张黑白街头摄影作品，重点捕捉“决定性瞬间”，即一名行人与几何感强烈的城市背景中的建筑线条完美对齐的时刻。它指定了精确的相机设置（50mm 定焦镜头、f/8 光圈、手动区域对焦）和严格的构图规则，以模仿经典的街头摄影大师。

![黑白街头摄影：决定性瞬间](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100782200_345tt2_HALqcKUXgAE1HwL.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "street_photography_decisive_moment",
      "language": "en",
      "priority": "highest",
      "version": "v1.0_DECISIVE_MOMENT_GEOMETRY_NO_CROP"
    },

    "scene": {
      "location": "busy urban street corner",
      "time_of_day": "daytime",
      "environment": "natural light only, no artificial lighting",
      "activity": "pedestrians walking through a geometrically strong background",
      "moment_description": "a single pedestrian enters the frame at the exact peak of motion, perfectly aligned with architectural lines"
    },

    "camera_logic": {
      "lens": "50mm prime",
      "aperture": "f/8",
      "shutter_speed": "1/250",
      "iso": "auto",
      "focus_mode": "manual zone focusing",
      "focus_distance": "approximately 3 meters"
    },

    "composition_logic": {
      "approach": "pre-framed composition",
      "geometry_priority": "high",
      "human_subject_role": "secondary to composition but perfectly timed",
      "crop_policy": "no crop, frame must be complete in-camera"
    },

    "timing_logic": {
      "capture_rule": "capture only at the peak of human motion",
      "burst_mode": "minimal, 1-2 frames max",
      "anticipation_based": true
    },

    "style": {
      "color": "black and white",
      "contrast": "medium",
      "tonality": "natural, film-like",
      "mood": "quiet, precise, timeless"
    },

    "negative_prompt": "posed subjects, artificial lighting, shallow depth of field, dramatic blur, heavy post-processing, cinematic exaggeration, crop, zoom lens look"
  }
}
```

**作者**: [PSS](https://x.com/PromptSin/status/2018401693147217953)  **日期**: 2026-02-02  **语言**: en

> 生成一张泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 的超现实 8K 全身肖像的提示，她身着职业装，斜靠在灰色摄影棚的墙壁上。独特的元素是要求在墙壁上直接添加一个突出、清晰的矢量肖像和文字叠加（姓名和头衔），将摄影的真实感与现代平面设计融为一体。

![泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 的超逼真全身肖像，带图形叠加](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100820809_egae55_HALNai6XwAAjXCn.jpg)
![泰勒·斯威夫特 (Taylor Swift) 的超逼真全身肖像，带图形叠加](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100820760_ablcbu_HALNdYpW4AAt8By.jpg)

```
"Ultra-realistic 8K full body portrait of {argument name="subject name" default="Taylor Swift"} , wearing a clean and pressed white social shirt with folded collar and a small lapel microphone, dark navy-blue dress pants and polished brown social shoes. Casually and unpretentiously leaning against a smooth light gray studio wall; hands are in pockets and one leg is crossed over the other, with relaxed and confident body language. Add to the wall next to them a prominent vector portrait in black and white of their face and bust - with sharp lines and angles, overlapping polygonal shapes and a minimalist modern graphic style, right below the information: “Taylor Swift”, and below the name: “Singer-Songwriter”. 2:3 dimension.”
```

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，旨在生成一张未经修饰的年轻女性肖像，具有 90 年代杂志/街头摄影美学。它指定了胶片模拟（Kodak Portra 400, Leica M6）、详细的主体外观（毛躁、毛孔、凌乱的头发）、杂乱的环境以及直射相机闪光灯和高对比度等技术规格。

![具有胶片美学的街头人像摄影原片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770100816731_frcq0j_HAIrxcSXwAAB4bZ.jpg)

{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject_details": {
      "appearance": "Young woman with long, voluminous, golden-blonde wavy hair with visible flyaways and natural frizz.       "pose": "Candid, unposed seating on a red armchair. One leg bent with knee to chest, other leg extended downward. Leaning forward, right elbow on knee, hand squishing the cheek slightly. Left arm draping casually over the raised leg."
    },
    "outfit_and_attire": {
      "upper_body": "Fitted light blue ribbed tank top showing fabric weave, under an oversized cream button-down shirt. Shirt is unbuttoned, slipping off shoulders, with visible wrinkles and stitching details.",

    },

High-angle candid night street fashion photograph, shot from an upper floor across the street, looking downward.
A young woman ({argument name="subject identity" default="face photo reference"}) stands alone near a minimarket entrance, slightly off-center. Full body visible with open negative space.
She wears a white T-shirt, a washed blue denim jacket, dark straight-leg jeans, and white canvas sneakers. A small tote bag hangs from one shoulder. Hair loose or tied low, slightly messy.
Bright minimarket lighting spills onto the pavement, creating soft reflections. Glass doors show blurred interior shelves and posters.
She stands still for a moment, holding a white takeaway coffee cup while the other hand adjusts her tote bag strap.
She glances upward casually, unaware of the camera.
Cool fluorescent light mixed with warm street lighting.
Shot on Canon AE-1 film, candid street editorial mood.
Slight desaturation, fine film grain.
Sharp subject, gently softened background.
No other people. No readable text.
Aspect ratio 4:5.
```

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张 4K 超逼真生活方式编辑图片：一名女性在黄金时段的野餐毯上放松。它详细说明了场景（公园、远处的水）、服装（飘逸的夏日连衣裙）和道具（熟食板、寿司），以营造充满活力的 Instagram 风格夏日美学。

![金色时光野餐生活方式编辑提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014697089_sgx82s_HAFBbE-WcAA_MQU.jpg)
![金色时光野餐生活方式编辑提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014697200_y7bvb8_HAFBbFHW4AAh34u.jpg)
![金色时光野餐生活方式编辑提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1770014697324_x92imx_HAFBbE9XMAAwGcO.jpg)

```
{
  "image_generation_prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "description": "Beautiful blonde woman, fair skin, soft blonde hair with natural volume, light natural makeup, recognizable facial features.",
      "pose": "Relaxed semi-reclining pose on a picnic blanket, leaning on one elbow with her upper body slightly turned to the side. The other hand rests casually on her bent knee.",
      "expression": "Warm, gentle smile with direct eye contact, calm and approachable mood.",
      "apparel": {
        "clothing": "Flowy pastel blue (or soft sage green) midi summer dress with thin straps, lightweight fabric.",
        "accessories": "Delicate gold pendant necklace, small gold hoop earrings, minimal thin bracelet."
      }
    },
    "setting": {
      "location": "Spacious outdoor park on a sunny day.",
      "background": "Lush green manicured grass, large mature deciduous trees with full green canopies. A lake or river visible in the distant left background. Vibrant blue sky with scattered wispy white clouds.",
      "foreground": "Large textured cream or off-white picnic blanket spread over the grass."
    },
    "props_and_objects": {
      "picnic_basket": "Large rectangular woven wicker picnic basket in a warm orange-brown tone, positioned on the left side of the blanket.",
      "food_display": {
        "charcuterie_board": "Wooden serving board with red and green grapes, raspberries, blueberries, cubes of orange cheddar cheese, and round crackers.",
        "sushi": "Black rectangular tray with approximately 8 pieces of sushi rolls (maki) with visible salmon or tuna filling, accompanied by wooden chopsticks.",
        "other": "A soft yellow pillow or cushion partially visible behind the picnic basket."
      }
    },
    "technical_specifications": {
      "quality": "4K Ultra HD, highly detailed, photorealistic, sharp focus.",
      "lighting": "Natural bright sunlight approaching golden hour, soft shadows, vibrant color saturation.",
      "style": "Lifestyle editorial photography, Instagram aesthetic, summer vibe, high dynamic range (HDR)."
    },
    "full_combined_prompt": "A photorealistic 4K lifestyle editorial portrait of a beautiful blonde woman relaxing on a cream picnic blanket in a sunny park. She is wearing a pastel blue or sage green flowy summer dress, posed in a relaxed semi-reclining position, leaning on one elbow and looking warmly at the camera. The scene features lush green grass, tall leafy trees, a distant body of water, a wicker picnic basket, a wooden charcuterie board with fruit and cheese, and a tray of sushi. Natural golden-hour sunlight, vibrant colors, shallow depth of field, and a polished Instagram-style summer aesthetic."
  }
}
```

### 232. 在火车月台上的抓拍街头摄影

**作者**: [Lovart 公式 (ラブアート)](https://x.com/lovart_jp/status/2017523384046006471)  **日期**: 2026-01-31  **语言**: ja

> 一个详细的提示，用于使用 Nano Banana Pro 生成一套以四季为主题的四件套奢华珠宝。它指定了水晶类型、图案、背景、材质、灯光以及整体风格，以呈现一张逼真的珠宝展照片。

![Nano Banana Pro 奢华珠宝套装设计提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927695909_vt2r68_G_6W3EJaQAAOkHh.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 奢华珠宝套装设计提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927696050_ku7ia7_G_6W3icbkAIVTmm.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 奢华珠宝套装设计提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927696628_qqke60_G_6W4arbwAA2R2c.jpg)
![Nano Banana Pro 奢华珠宝套装设计提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769927697307_jjsdxv_G_6W5PJbwAAp_Rp.jpg)

```
四季をテーマにした4点のラグジュアリージュエリーセット、
春：ピンクパープルの紫水晶風クリスタルを中心に桜の花モチーフのピアスペア、シルク生地の上に自然に並べられる
夏：オーロラホログラムクリスタルのティアドロップ型ネックレス、向日葵の花びらが散らばる背景に置かれる
秋：オレンジレッドのガーネット風クリスタルをメインに紅葉の葉っぱモチーフのリング、木製のトレイの上に置かれる
冬：クリアなアイスクリスタルのペンダントネックレス、雪の結晶がクリスタルのカット面に輝き、ホログラム風のクロスの上に配置
全体を俯瞰視点で撮影したジュエリー展示写真、自然光の下で質感が鮮明に映る、
背景は季節ごとのトーン（春：パステルピンク / 夏：水色 / 秋：オレンジ / 冬：クリアホワイト）、
鮮やかな色彩とリアルな質感（クリスタルの輝き/金属の光沢/シルクのドレープ）、
ファンタジージュエリーアートスタイル、フォトリアリズム、
超高精細、8K、ロマンティックでラグジュアリーな雰囲気
```

### 237. 现代波西米亚街头时尚牛仔造型提示词

**作者**: [Briella](https://x.com/briellaai/status/2017380808336777687)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个提示，旨在生成一张女性图片，她身穿“现代波西米亚”和“街头时尚”风格的全牛仔服装，包括一件短款夹克和一条绣有“法蒂玛之手”符号的迷你短裤，在户外活动中，她以俏皮的“回眸一笑”姿势，站在足球机旁。

![现代波西米亚街头时尚牛仔造型提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841122343_5qpl80_G_5Dir-WoAIMHmI.jpg)

```
General Ambiance and Character Style
Style: The character (same woman at the attached reference images) is wearing an all-denim ensemble that reflects a wonderful mix of "Modern Bohemian" and "Street Chic" styles.

Ambiance: The setting appears to be an event space or the background of an outdoor party. The character is standing at a foosball table, taking a break from the game to look back over her shoulder directly at the camera. The presence of other people and a production crew (a microphone boom can be spotted above) suggests this might be a film or photoshoot set.

Detailed Appearance and Pose
Pose: Standing sideways to the table, the character holds one of the foosball handles. With a slight twist of her body, she delivers a classic "over-the-shoulder" gaze that is both playful and assertive.

Hair and Makeup: Her long, light-brown hair flows naturally over her shoulders. Her makeup is very fresh and "glowy"; the highlighter on her cheekbones particularly shimmers in the daylight.

Outfit: * Top: She is wearing a cropped, long-sleeved denim jacket. The jacket features "Hand of Fatima" (Hamsa) embroideries—a protective symbol in Middle Eastern culture—along with colorful bead details, especially on the shoulder.

Bottom: She wears matching, very form-fitting denim mini-shorts. The back pockets also feature the same Hamsa embroidery and colorful stone embellishments, adding a mystic and artistic flair to the outfit.

Surrounding People and Details
Other Characters: On the opposite side of the table, looking at the main character with a smile, is another woman wearing a beige spaghetti-strap dress (resembling model Chrissy Teigen). To the left, the back of a man in a grey t-shirt—the character’s opponent in the game—is visible.

Table Detail: Resting on the edge of the foosball table is an icy drink in a metallic mug (likely a Moscow Mule cocktail), which reinforces the cheerful and relaxed mood of the setting.
```

Sitting at a European street cafe terrace with wooden chairs and tables, other patrons blurred in the background, natural daylight softly illuminating her face. Close-up, selfie-style framing, capturing a candid beauty moment with shallow depth of field, lifestyle influencer aesthetic, casual and feminine vibe, warm neutral tones.",

### 241. 宁静独处自然肖像提示

**作者**: [The Prompt Engineer](https://x.com/rorschachvibes/status/2017087347364680051)  **日期**: 2026-01-30  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张强调广阔绿色景观中宁静孤独感的远景照片。它指示 AI 保持主体在参考照片中的外观，同时让他坐在一把黑色折叠椅上阅读小说。构图利用前景散景和自然构图来突出小人物主体与广阔、平静环境之间的对比，光线柔和均匀。

![宁静独处自然肖像提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769841099559_pghje3_G_4iQIkbYAAUqMJ.jpg)

```
Create a photo of a person based on the reference photo without changing his face and hair. The composition is very calm. Emphasize a feeling of peaceful solitude. Place the focus in the middle of nature. In the middle of a grassy field, a man sits on a black folding chair. It is a camping chair. He looks focused while reading an open novel. He wears the same outfit as in the reference photo. He wears white Asics Gel-1130 shoes, with a small part of white socks visible. He uses white Bluetooth earphones, showing that he is listening to music to help him concentrate. His hair is slightly messy from the wind but still looks neat. His sitting posture is relaxed but upright. He looks fully absorbed in his activity. The photo is taken from a distance using a long shot technique. The photographer appears to shoot from behind a mound of grass or bushes. A large green bokeh effect fills the foreground. Plants in the foreground and a tree branch in the upper right create a natural frame that directs the viewer’s eye to the subject in the center. The human subject looks small compared to the wide green landscape. This highlights a positive sense of solitude and the calmness of the open space. The background is a hill or a sloping meadow with a fresh and even green color. The grass texture looks smooth. In the far upper left, a small part of a path or a lighter ground area is visible. The light is soft and even, like on a slightly cloudy day or in the afternoon. There are no harsh shadows or distracting contrasts. The dominant colors are dark green and light green, which create a calming and refreshing mood. The contrast between the dark outfit and the white earphones makes the subject stand out without breaking the harmony of the natural colors. Aspect ratio 3:4.
```

"statement dangling",         "material": "gold-toned metal",         "color_hex": "#D4AF37",         "design": "sunburst floral"       }     }   },   "pose": {     "hands": {       "position": > 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的、抓拍式的年轻女性生活肖像，背景是城市，时间是黄金时段。它指定了高角度拍摄、无肩带的淡粉色迷你连衣裙，以及绿松石项链和“摇滚”手势等细节，背景元素包括银色工具车的局部视图和斑驳的树影。

![城市夏季人像高角度拍摄](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769755002814_x27sjf_G_0DHbqbUAAc5U5.jpg)

      "hair": "Shoulder-length dark brown hair, wet or damp texture, pushed back but loose",
      "skin": "Sun-kissed complexion, natural makeup, soft features",

High-end lifestyle portrait, intimate close-up of a young woman as the uploaded picture as reference. She is resting her chin directly on her raised left shoulder, torso angled, with a sultry direct gaze looking through a distinct stray lock of wavy hair falling. She wears a light grey ribbed cotton-blend scoop-neck tank top and a thin silver chain with a small rectangular pendant. Background is a soft-focus architectural setting with a blurred glass railing. Bright natural side lighting, sunlit glow, creamy skin texture, extreme shallow depth of field, f/1.4, 85mm lens, high-fidelity editorial photography style.

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2016188295429161067)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的年轻女性肖像，她身穿橄榄绿抹胸文胸和米色针织休闲长裤，坐在灰色沙发上。该提示详细说明了光线（自然散射日光）、技术规格（8k 分辨率、85mm 镜头模拟）以及干净、数字化的外观所需的详细身体特征。

![超逼真居家服生活方式肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581984605_58o69y_G_rwkdIbAAAQmuj.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt": {
    "subject": {
      "demographics": "Young female adult, roughly early 20s",

### 261. 图像转 SD 纸艺转换提示

**作者**: [Lovart 公式 (ラブアート)](https://x.com/lovart_jp/status/2016074165443559465)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: ja

> 一个针对 Nano Banana Pro（通过 Lovart 使用）的详细提示，用于将输入图像转换为两种输出：一个 Q 版（SD）角色纸模型模板（展开视图）和最终组装好的纸模型成品。此提示结构严谨，旨在生成特定格式的输出。

![图像转 SD 纸艺转换提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769582024516_7qr5z3_G_qGeqcbAAIdEK4.jpg)
![图像转 SD 纸艺转换提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769582024525_7oemb3_G_qGfVdbYAA8zev.jpg)
![图像转 SD 纸艺转换提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769582024640_yo5moj_G_qGcxOa0AANRly.jpg)
![图像转 SD 纸艺转换提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769582025811_cg289i_G_qGf15bAAILFN_.jpg)

```
[AI指示: 画像→SDペーパークラフト変換]

[入力画像] を分析する。

抽出: [入力画像]から人物/キャラクターの顔の特徴、髪型、髪色、服装、アクセサリー、ポーズを読み取る。
SD化: 2〜3頭身のSDキャラクター（スーパーデフォルメ）としてペーパークラフト化。
出力: 2枚の画像を生成。
[画像1: 展開図・パーツ]
ペーパークラフトの展開図状態。厚紙に印刷されたカラフルなパーツ。頭、顔、髪、胴体、腕、脚、アクセサリーなど各パーツの展開図。折り線（点線）、のりしろ、番号が見える。背景にハサミ、カッター、のり、カッターマットが散らばっている。真上からの俯瞰構図。企業名・ロゴは一切表示しない。

[画像2: 完成品]
組み立て済みの立体ペーパークラフト。SDキャラクターとして2〜3頭身。髪型、髪色、服装、アクセサリーは入力画像を参考に再現。紙の質感、折り目、角の丸み、手作り感のある温かみ。商品プロモーション撮影のような構図とライティング。

[注意]
実在の企業名、ブランドロゴ、商標は一切含めない。

[雰囲気]
クラフト雑誌やハンドメイド作品の写真のようなクオリティ。柔らかいスタジオライティング、クリーンな背景。高解像度。
```

**Related**: [[综合产品]]、[[综合3D]]

**作者**: [Hamid Siddiqui](https://x.com/hamidInventions/status/2016024257604813144)  **日期**: 2026-01-27  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张主体在水疗按摩椅上放松的超逼真生活方式肖像。该提示强制严格保留参考照片中的身份，并指定柔和、漫射的晨光、现代水疗美学以及模拟高质量智能手机照片的技术细节。

![具有身份锁定的逼真水疗生活方式肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769581989328_va7s6h_G_pbRapaQAALAIX.jpg)

```
{
  "intent": "Generate a photorealistic, soft morning spa-lifestyle portrait of the subject relaxing and recharging.",
  "reference_usage": {
    "preserve_face": true,
    "preserve_body": true,
    "notes": "Match the subject’s facial structure, skin tone, and overall appearance exactly to the provided profile photo."
  },
  "frame": {
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "composition": "medium-full body shot from knees up, slightly angled from the foot of the massage chair toward the upper body",
    "perspective": "friend-taken candid spa photo composition, as if a spa staff or companion captured a natural moment",
    "crop": "subject centered, massage chair and spa environment framing the scene, edges softly blurred"
  },
  "style": {
    "primary": "ultra-photorealistic contemporary lifestyle photography",
    "lighting": "early-morning natural light filtered through sheer curtains, soft and diffused with cool-neutral spa tones",
    "mood": "calm, relaxed, restful, self-care morning ritual",
    "technical": {
      "camera_type": "modern smartphone rear camera look",
      "lens_look": "28–35mm natural portrait perspective",
      "depth_of_field": "shallow; crisp focus on face and upper body, background gently blurred",
      "imperfections": "very subtle noise, natural skin texture, realistic handheld framing, no over-retouching"
    },
    "materials": {
      "skin": "natural complexion with realistic texture and gentle highlights from diffused light",
      "hair": "slightly damp, loosely brushed back or falling naturally around shoulders, soft moisture sheen",
      "clothing": "crisp white sports bra and white shorts, soft stretch fabric, clean lines, natural folds and creases from reclining",
      "environment_surfaces": "modern leather or faux-leather full-body massage chair, light wood floors, matte walls, soft textiles like rolled towels"
    }
  },
  "subject": {
    "identity": {
      "face": {
        "preserve_original": true
      },
      "body": {
        "preserve_original": true
      }
    },
    "pose": {
      "overall_position": "reclined in a modern full-body massage chair in a spa relaxation room",
      "legs": "relaxed in the extended leg section of the chair, slightly apart in a natural, modest position",
      "upper_body": "torso comfortably angled back, shoulders dropped and relaxed into the chair",
      "arms": {
        "right_arm": "resting on the chair armrest, hand relaxed and open",
        "left_arm": "resting lightly across the stomach or on the other armrest, fingers naturally curved"
      },
      "head_and_neck": {
        "tilt": "very slight tilt toward one side, nestled into the headrest",
        "rotation": "facing generally toward the camera",
        "chin": "slightly down for a gentle, serene look"
      }
    },
    "expression": {
      "overall": "peaceful, subtly content, hint of a soft smile",
      "eyes": {
        "
      }
    }
  }
}

### 268. 停车场街头风深蹲姿势提示词

**作者**: [Busra](https://x.com/promptLab0/status/2015891980748824722)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成一张 8k 超逼真街头风格照片，内容为一名年轻女性在昏暗的工业停车场内完全蹲姿摆拍。提示详细描述了她的服装（超大卫衣、迷你裙、红色高跟鞋）、妆容、表情以及工业背景元素。

![停车场街头风深蹲姿势提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495436034_hk27n7_G_njEV1XAAAQd2R.jpg)

```
A 17-year-old woman with long, wavy red hair poses in a fully squatted position on the floor of a covered parking garage; she is wearing a cream-colored oversized sweatshirt and a khaki green ruched mini-skirt. She has nude-toned lipstick, neutral and matte skin makeup, light peach blush, and full lips. Her outfit is completed with thin red heeled sandals and a red baguette bag on her shoulder. Her legs are slightly thick and aesthetically pleasing. Her hands are under her chin, and she has a serious expression looking directly at the camera. In the background, there are concrete columns, red pipes running across the ceiling, and a dim, industrial garage atmosphere. This is an 8k ultra-realistic, 3:4 aspect ratio, realistic street style photograph.
```

### 270. 伊斯坦布尔街头写实抓拍浪漫场景提示词

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2015835682585944186)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细、结构化的提示词，旨在生成一张超逼真的街头抓拍照片，捕捉一对情侣在伊斯坦布尔（Tünel / Galip Dede 街）的雨天共撑一把伞的场景。它强调真实感标记，如湿润的反光、真实的雨痕和自然的皮肤纹理，旨在营造一种宁静、私密且逼真的电影剧照美学。

![伊斯坦布尔街头写实抓拍浪漫场景提示词](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495361213_90znwh_G_mv3YNXoAETog1.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_street_romance",
      "version": "v2.1_TUNEL_GALIP_DEDE_UMBRELLA_SHARE_9x16_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },
    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "9:16",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_street_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "restrained_rain_realism",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },
    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm, eye-level, candid street photo feel, imperfect crop, focus on eyes",
      "lighting_language": "overcast rain daylight only, wet reflections, no flash, no studio look",
      "authenticity_markers": "real rain streaks, wet fabric darkening, subtle halation on wet highlights, no AI glow"
    },
    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Tünel / Galip Dede street on a rainy day. The couple shares one umbrella. A real, slightly cramped, human closeness.",
      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "same couple (early 20s), ordinary, faces visible and sharp",
        "expression": "soft warmth, restrained smile, micro-expressions only",
        "skin_and_face": "real texture, no retouch"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "clothing": "simple coats/jackets, neutral tones, slightly wet, no logos",
        "props": "one umbrella, backpacks slightly damp, no branding"
      },
      "micro_action": "the umbrella tilts; he adjusts it to cover her more; she leans closer for a second, then relaxes back",
      "environment_details": {
        "location": "Tünel / Galip Dede vibe",
        "background": "wet pavement reflections, shopfront shapes with no readable signs, people blurred with umbrellas"
      },
      "composition": "eye-level medium shot, couple off-center, faces sharp, slight motion blur only in background rain and passersby",
      "mood": "quiet, intimate, rainy Istanbul realism"
    },
    "negative_prompt": [
      "studio lighting",
      "flash",
      "beauty retouch",
      "plastic skin",
      "model faces",
      "perfect symmetry",
      "HDR",
      "AI glow",
      "unrealistic rain",
      "readable text",
      "logo",
      "watermark"
    ]
  }
}

### 271. Ana de Armas 奢华夜间都市写真

**作者**: [Qaiser Tzq](https://x.com/TzqQaiser/status/2015768572019314944)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，结构为“扩展数字分析”，用于生成安娜·德·阿玛斯（Ana de Armas）的奢华夜间都市肖像。它详细说明了她的着装（金色亮片连衣裙）、场景（俯瞰城市天际线的高层阳台）和电影般的构图，重点是捕捉亮片上的光线。

![Ana de Armas 奢华夜间都市写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495351309_rs2t06_G_lyv81WYAAnsO7.jpg)
![Ana de Armas 奢华夜间都市写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495351317_g3fuky_G_lyv8-aQAAQ-P_.jpg)
![Ana de Armas 奢华夜间都市写真](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495351486_he1vxw_G_lyv88a4AEL-nG.jpg)

```
{
  "document_header": {
    "title": "Extended Digital Analysis of Visual Media",

### 272. 超逼真奢华生活方式肖像，带面部锁定功能

**作者**: [gemini_prompts](https://x.com/gemini_prompts/status/2015742008623837502)  **日期**: 2026-01-26  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成超逼真奢华生活方式肖像的综合提示。它强调保留拍摄对象的精确面部特征（不进行任何修改或美化），并详细描述了三种特定的姿势，背景设定在拥有柔和、漫射自然光线的现代奢华室内。

![超逼真奢华生活方式肖像，带面部锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495344459_od229x_G_laqJNbwAAPQi6.jpg)
![超逼真奢华生活方式肖像，带面部锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495344384_zrygje_G_laqKAW4AAZdWE.jpg)
![超逼真奢华生活方式肖像，带面部锁定功能](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769495344568_bfc8hn_G_laqJQaUAEuIBB.jpg)

```
"Without changing my facial features or face. It should look realistic.
Create a highly detailed, photorealistic luxury lifestyle portrait of a young woman in her early to mid-20s with light cool-neutral skin tone and a slim figure with soft curves. Her facial identity is preserved exactly with no alteration. She has a soft heart-oval face shape, large almond-shaped blue eyes with a calm direct gaze, softly arched light-brown brows, a straight petite nose, and medium-full lips closed in a faint natural smile. Natural skin texture is visible with pores and slight asymmetry, no smoothing or beautification.
Her hair is long, dark blonde, center-parted, worn smooth and loose with natural volume at the crown.
She is wearing a deep {argument name="top color" default="chocolate-brown"} asymmetrical satin halter-style top with a gathered twist at the center, draped snugly with a soft silk sheen. The bottom is a beige nude mini skirt made of stretch jersey fabric, body-hugging with ruched sides and drawstring ties. Accessories include large gold hoop earrings, a small brown leather shoulder bag, and clear-strap high heel sandals.

Pose:
1. Kneeling on the floor with both knees tucked under, torso upright and facing the camera. Both arms raised with hands resting in the hair near the crown. Head level with a slight downward tilt, eyes looking directly into the camera.

2. Seated on the floor with legs crossed comfortably. Hands resting loosely on the knees. Spine upright but relaxed. Head tilted slightly to one side. Eyes looking toward the camera with a gentle smile. Expression warm and approachable.

3. Standing with one shoulder and upper back resting against a wall. One knee bent with the foot pressed lightly against the wall. Arms crossed loosely at the forearms. Head turned slightly to the side, eyes gazing off-frame. Expression thoughtful and distant.

The setting is a modern luxury interior with light gray stone tile flooring, floor-to-ceiling windows, dark modern kitchen cabinetry, minimalist furniture, and a white orchid plant in the foreground. Depth of field remains moderate so background elements are clearly readable.
Lighting is soft, diffused natural daylight entering from large windows behind and to the left of the camera, producing very gentle shadows with low contrast.
The camera captures a full-body kneeling portrait using a 50mm lens equivalent, framed from slightly above the head to below the knees, centered composition.
Image quality is ultra-realistic editorial photography with sharp focus on the face and torso, natural unretouched skin texture, neutral modern color grading with warm accents, and no stylization, filters, body reshaping, or background changes."
```

**Related**: [[室内设计]]、[[超现实]]、[[综合生活]]

### 278. Y2K 科技拼贴肖像

> 这个详细的提示词旨在生成一个创意十足的平铺照片拼贴画，其中包含 2000 年代的复古电子设备（翻盖手机、Game Boy、数码相机）。这些设备的屏幕共同呈现出主体破碎的低保真肖像，营造出具有强烈 Y2K 美学风格的数字马赛克效果。

![Y2K 科技拼贴肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769408675153_7f924m_G_fzHCqaQAI_oaH.jpg)

```
主題と配置：2000年代のビンテージ電子機器（折りたたみ式携帯電話、古いノキアのブロック型携帯電話、デジタルコンパクトカメラ、ゲームボーイ、MP3プレーヤー、古いiPhone）を、無造作に、重なり合いながら、コラージュのように配置したクリエイティブなフラットレイ写真。清潔な白い背景に散りばめられています。
主要な視覚効果：サイズ、アスペクト比、向き（縦向き、横向き、小さな正方形など）が大きく異なるこれらの多様なデバイスの発光画面は、集合的に[{argument name="被写体" default="カメラを見つめる暗いウェーブヘアの若い日本女性"}]の1つの大きなポートレートを表示しています。肖像画は断片的に画面上に散らばり、まるで雑然としたデジタルモザイクのように広がっていますが、全体として見ると完璧に整列し、完全な顔を形成しています。画面に表示される画像は、粗く、ローファイで、レトロなデジタル美学を備えています。
雰囲気とスタイル：Y2Kの美学、ノスタルジックなテクノロジー、フォトリアリスティック、使い古されたプラスチックや金属の筐体の精緻な質感、自然なスタジオ照明、高解像度の写真。
```

**Related**: [[超现实]]、[[JSON结构化提示]]

### 284. 韩国女团风格写真拍摄提示

**作者**: [骑司Chase](https://x.com/qisi_ai/status/2014961007068905955)  **日期**: 2026-01-24  **语言**: zh

> 一个详细的中文提示，用于生成一张四格照片拼贴画，风格为韩国女团写真，强调精致的面部特征、特定的妆容细节（粉色腮红、细微雀斑）以及柔和明亮的光线。它要求上传一张参考图片以保持身份一致性。

![韩国女团风格写真拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322345144_qxi7qh_G_aUWD4WMAA1YHU.jpg)
![韩国女团风格写真拍摄提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769322345170_ebehuq_G_aUWDTbMAA7alq.jpg)

```
一、画面构图
1 版式：整体为3:4比例，四宫格拼图，3:4小图用2×2排列
2 取景：近景到特写为主，人物占画面大比例
3 角度：平视近拍，轻微左右变化，统一干净背景

二、人物主体
1 参考来源：以上传参考图作为严格身份来源
2 一致性要求：零偏差
3 脸部：脸型精致、眼睛偏大、右眼下方点了一颗小痣，鼻梁细长
4 肤质：白皙带淡粉，皮肤细腻，有轻微柔焦
5 细节：鼻梁与面中高光明显，脸颊与鼻尖轻微泛红，散落少量雀斑点

三、妆容细节
1 底妆：通透干净，轻薄雾面带微光
2 腮红：粉色集中在脸颊与鼻梁两侧
3 眼妆：自然放大，睫毛纤长，眼神清澈
4 唇妆：水润嘟嘟唇，淡粉到蜜桃渐变，唇峰柔和

四、发型与头饰
1 发型：黑色长直发，中分，发量饱满，自然垂落
2 碎发：额前少量发丝自然飘动
3 发饰：左右各一枚粉色发夹，颜色偏亮粉与浅粉，金属夹片可见

五、手部与配饰
1 指甲：超长甲型，半透明或浅色系，带细闪与立体装饰
2 戒指：多枚粉色可爱造型戒指，糖果感与花朵感，体积夸张但软萌
3 手势风格：靠近脸部与嘴唇，突出指甲与戒指细节

六、服装与材质
1 上衣：毛绒质感外套或袖套，白色蓬松柔软
2 内搭：浅粉色吊带或上衣，露肩或斜肩效果
3 整体风格：甜美软糯，带一点小酷感

七、四张分镜动作与表情
1 左上：双手托脸贴近镜头，表情冷淡微委屈，直视镜头
2 右上：手指靠近嘴唇或轻触唇边，眼神平静略挑逗，特写更近
3 左下：下巴或手臂压在桌面边缘，眼睛看向侧方，神情发呆放空
4 右下：手握拳轻抵下巴，微笑但克制，直视镜头，气质更亲和

八、光线与色调
1 光线：高亮柔光，阴影很浅，整体均匀
2 色调：冷白背景为主，粉色点缀突出，肤色偏冷粉
3 对比：低对比，干净通透，不厚重

九、质感与画面效果
1 清晰度：五官与发丝清晰，皮肤细节保留但有轻微磨皮柔化
2 景深：背景虚化很弱或几乎无纹理，主体更突出
3 氛围：甜美感女团韩杂风写真，甜美可爱、精致梦幻、轻微玻璃质感光泽
```

**Related**: [[综合3D]]

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，旨在生成具有法医真实感的超逼真嫌犯大头照肖像。它指定了平坦的临床照明、带有可见数字的身高测量背景、中性严肃的表情，并要求呈现原始皮肤纹理（可见毛孔、晒伤）和特定的身体修饰（寸头、面部/颈部纹身），同时严格避免化妆、微笑或魅力照明。

defiant", "face": { "shape": "oval with defined jawline", "eyes": "brown, almond-shaped, sharp focus, weary but alert", "nose": "straight bridge, slightly rounded tip", "mouth": "natural lips, closed, She wears an elegant {argument name="dress color" default="red"} off-shoulder mini dress with a front bow detail and a softly structured skirt (same silhouette as the reference photo). She holds a stemmed wine glass filled with red wine, bringing it near her lips as if about to sip. Chic café chairs with woven red-green pattern, small round marble table, warm reflections in the window, subtle crowd behind glass. No text anywhere.",
      "wardrobe_and_style": {

}

    {
      "position": "Top Left",
      "style": "Sartorial Elegance",
      "visuals": "Captured in high-contrast black and white, the subject wears a tailored black tuxedo with satin lapels and a crisp pleated shirt. With slicked-back hair and a confident hands-on-hips pose, she embodies a sharp, androgynous, and powerful persona."

    {
      "position": "Top Right",

    },
    {
      "position": "Bottom Left",

    },
    {
      "position": "Bottom Right",
      "style": "Bohemian Nostalgia",

}

Art Style: 3D render with a smooth vinyl texture, lighting style is direct flash photography with sharp shadows against the snow, fashionable and cute aesthetic

### 295. 复古模拟胶片摄影美学提示

**作者**: [Michael Rabone](https://x.com/michaelrabone/status/2013990267641004414)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 一个旨在生成具有真实复古模拟胶片摄影美学图像的综合提示，特别模仿过期 Kodak Portra 400 胶片的观感。它详细描述了诸多瑕疵，如胶片颗粒、光晕、漏光和柔焦，旨在营造一种怀旧、触感丰富的氛围，让人联想到 1990 年代的傻瓜相机。这对于寻求视觉作品中真实复古质感和情感深度的创作者来说是理想之选。

![复古模拟胶片摄影美学提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063158586_vpkehb_G_MhbHZWwAEAyRd.jpg)
![复古模拟胶片摄影美学提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063158568_bbhjos_G_MhbL3XIAAZzrk.jpg)
![复古模拟胶片摄影美学提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063158918_sjcujm_G_MhbHVXYAAwbN5.jpg)
![复古模拟胶片摄影美学提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063159777_9atvss_G_MhbHRXwAAyUkn.jpg)

```
Kodak Portra 400 authentic vintage analog film photography, captured on classic 35mm film camera with manual focus lens, shot on expired Kodak Portra 400 film stock, pronounced natural film grain structure with visible halation around bright highlights, warm nostalgic color palette with slightly desaturated mid-tones, organic color shifts between frames, gentle peachy skin tones characteristic of Kodak Portra film, soft dreamy vignetting gradually darkening towards corners and edges, accidental light leaks with orange and red hues bleeding into frame edges, subtle lens flare from uncoated vintage optics, imperfect manual focus creating dreamy bokeh with swirly out-of-focus areas, chromatic aberration visible in high contrast edges, film dust particles and hair caught during scanning process, fine vertical scratches from film transport mechanism, authentic analog warmth with slightly lifted blacks and compressed highlights, natural color bleeding between adjacent film layers, gentle overexposure in bright areas creating soft glow, film edge artefacts and frame numbers barely visible, scanned from original negative with slight color cast, 1990s point-and-shoot disposable camera aesthetic, Fujifilm Superia or Agfa Vista alternative film characteristics, organic photographic imperfections and inconsistencies, slightly soft focus overall sharpness, date stamp in corner optional, double exposure ghost images subtle overlay, sprocket holes impression, cross-processed color shifts, pushed film development look with increased contrast and grain, natural lighting artefacts and lens imperfections, retro photo lab color correction style, authentic film emulsion texture, varying exposure between frames showing human photographer touch, mechanical shutter artefacts, slight motion blur from slower shutter speeds, nostalgic summer afternoon golden hour warmth, faded photograph found in old shoebox quality, memory lane aesthetic, tactile analog photography feel.
```

**Related**: [[综合艺术]]、[[建筑摄影]]、[[概念艺术]]
