### 296. 安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 赌场写真拍摄提示词：极致细节

**作者**: [Qaiser Tzq](https://x.com/TzqQaiser/status/2013983372985696740)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的多帧提示，详细描述了安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 在经典赌场环境中进行主题摄影。它指定了三幅不同图像构图的服装（带水晶肩带的乌黑迷你连衣裙）、姿势、灯光几何形状和背景元素。

![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 赌场写真拍摄提示词：极致细节](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063227638_7s43qc_G_MbLR4XYAATww0.jpg)
![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 赌场写真拍摄提示词：极致细节](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063227499_pgigpn_G_MbLYpbkAAaEsR.jpg)
![安娜·德·阿玛斯 (Ana de Armas) 赌场写真拍摄提示词：极致细节](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063227783_zhqll9_G_MbLTzaQAA1m1C.jpg)

```
{
  "document_info": {
    "type": "Extreme Detail Image Analysis",
    "subject_identity": "Ana de Armas",
    "event_context": "Themed photoshoot in a classic casino environment",
    "date_simulated": "January 2026"
  },
  "visual_data_points": [
    {
      "image_id": "20260121_192600",
      "frame_composition": "Medium full shot, eye-level perspective",
      "subject_analysis": {
        "facial_features": "Soft makeup, brown eyeshadow, nude lip color, focused gaze",
        "body_language": "Elegant seating, relaxed shoulders, legs crossed at the knee",
        "hair_style": "Brunette, parted in the middle, natural soft curls falling over shoulders"
      },
      "wardrobe_specifications": {
        "dress_type": "Cocktail mini-dress",
        "color_palette": "Jet Black (#000000)",
        "strap_material": "Dual-row crystal encrusted spaghetti straps",
        "footwear": "Platform satin heels, approximately 5-6 inches high, ankle wrap closure"
      },
      "background_technical_data": {
        "machine_brand": "Triple Jackpot Gems",
        "display_status": "Active, showing winning combinations",
        "furniture": "Vintage-style red vinyl bar stool with chrome base and footrest"
      }
    },
    {
      "image_id": "20260121_192604",
      "frame_composition": "Full body vertical shot, slightly angled",
      "design_focus": {
        "dress_cut": "Extreme plunging neckline reaching the mid-torso",
        "silhouette": "Tailored bodycon fit, accentuating the waistline",
        "hemline": "Upper-thigh length (Mini)"
      },
      "lighting_geometry": {

### 300. 图片转饮料样机转换

**作者**: [Lovart 公式 (ラブアート)](https://x.com/lovart_jp/status/2013914733817299301)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: ja

> 这是一个结构化提示，旨在将输入图像（如图标或徽标）转换为瓶装饮料的逼真产品广告。它指示 AI 分析输入图像的图案、氛围和调色板，然后设计相应的饮料（例如，果味水、苏打水）和标签，强调专业的影棚摄影、浅景深和 8k 逼真度。

![图片转饮料样机转换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063243187_gq8fht_G_LXE20bcAAUq5q.jpg)
![图片转饮料样机转换](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063243318_sfqi4b_G_LW9LPaUAA0Kx2.jpg)

```
[AI指示: 画像→ペットボトル飲料変換]

[入力画像] を分析する。

抽出: [メインモチーフ]、[雰囲気]、[カラーパレット]を読み取る。
ドリンク選択: 画像の色と雰囲気からドリンクを自由に決める（{argument name="ドリンクの種類" default="フルーツウォーター、炭酸、お茶、乳酸菌飲料、エナジードリンク、スムージー"}など）
ラベルデザイン: モチーフをラベルのイラストやロゴに。色はドリンクの液体色とラベルに反映。
テキスト: 画像内に文字があれば商品名やフレーバー名として活用。
[メインモチーフ]
コンビニの飲料コーナーで目を引く新商品のペットボトル。[入力画像]の世界観がそのまま飲み物になったようなデザイン。[検出されたモチーフ]がラベルを飾り、液体の色もテーマカラー。ボトルの形状も自由（スリム、丸型、缶タイプなど）。

[雰囲気]
プロのスタジオで撮影された商品広告写真。ボトルに水滴がついて冷えている質感。背景にフルーツや素材が散らばっていてもいい。8k、f/1.8の浅い被写界深度、商品撮影のライティング。フォトリアリスティック。
```

**Related**: [[食品饮料]]、[[综合产品]]

### 301. 紫色人造皮草时尚肖像，带强闪光提示

**作者**: [Nano banana pro🍌](https://x.com/Vishnudxe/status/2013859870668398722)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成大胆、社论风格时尚肖像的提示，背景设定在充满活力的花海中。它要求使用一张附带的照片作为参考，照片中人物穿着一件蓬松的薰衣草色人造皮草外套，通过低角度向上倾斜的数码相机闪光灯拍摄，使色彩在湛蓝的天空下显得格外鲜明。

![紫色人造皮草时尚肖像，带强闪光提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063186188_t5oxwe_G_Kq4RnaoAA_uFm.jpg)
![紫色人造皮草时尚肖像，带强闪光提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063186198_0030n0_G_Kq4PUW8AA7C15.jpg)

```
Use this photo attached to create a striking outdoor fashion portrait set in a vibrant flower field during daylight, captured with a digital camera using a harsh flash. The camera angle is low and slightly tilted upward, intensifying the scene's energy and drama. The subject has long, loose, dark brown wavy hair cascading over a voluminous, soft, shaggy lavender faux fur coat that drapes naturally over the body. Surrounding the subject are large, colorful poppies in yellow, pink, and orange, some in the foreground and others in the background, creating an immersive field-of-flowers effect. The sky is clear and blue, providing a crisp, contrasting backdrop. The mood is bold, editorial, and whimsical, making the vibrant colors of the outfit and flowers pop starkly against the serene sky. The overall composition should evoke a playful yet high-fashion atmosphere with a hint of surrealism, emphasizing texture and color through the use of direct flash photography, aspect_ratio 5:8.
```

### 305. Nano Banana Pro 的卡通人物造型树提示

**作者**: [シュナプーン](https://x.com/schnapoon/status/2013796143046762680)  **日期**: 2026-01-21  **语言**: ja

> 一个详细的日式提示词，用于 Nano Banana Pro 创建一张真人大小的绿雕树的超逼真图像，该绿雕树以特定角色（棕色头发、双马尾、红眼睛、尖牙）为原型。绿雕树置于一个阳光斑驳、鲜花盛开的茂密花园环境中，背景是欧洲宫殿，采用垂直长宽比。

![Nano Banana Pro 的卡通人物造型树提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1769063243132_f5rxj5_G_Jw4p-aoAEkJ8E.jpg)

```
[キャラクター設定部分]
{argument name="キャラクター設定" default="茶色の髪、短いツインテール、赤い瞳、少し尖った歯（ギザ歯）"}。

[固定部分]
上記のキャラクターを模した、高さ2～3メートル程度の実物大トピアリー。
テーマパークの植え込みの中に設置されており、周囲の植物と一体化している。

足元と前景：
トピアリーの足元は、ピンク、紫、白などの色鮮やかなペチュニアやベゴニアのような花々で埋め尽くされている。土の地面は見えず、花の絨毯の中からトピアリーが立っているように見える。

周囲の環境と背景：
トピアリーのすぐ背後や横には、緑豊かな大きな広葉樹が植えられており、背景を覆っている。
広大な広場にポツンとあるのではなく、木々と花に囲まれた密度のある空間。
豪華でクラシックなヨーロッパ風の宮殿または大邸宅。建物はトピアリーの後ろに適切な距離感で配置されている。

光と影：
晴天。頭上の樹木を通した**「木漏れ日（Dappled sunlight）」**がトピアリーや足元の花壇に落ちており、実在感を強調している。

構図：
大人の目線の高さから、花壇越しに見上げるアングル。
手前の花々、中景のトピアリー、背景の樹木が重なり合い、奥行きと没入感がある。

スタイル：
高解像度の実写写真。鮮やかな色彩。8k、フォトリアル。

画像サイズ：
縦長（Vertical aspect ratio 9:16）

入力画像
アイコンの女の子

出力結果
```

**Related**: [[综合3D]]、[[综合动漫]]

aesthetic, natural beauty, ultra-realistic", "iso": "800-1600 (natural low light grain)" }, "scene": { "location": "Luxury bedroom interior", "environment": [ "high thread count white or cream bedding", "fluffy down pillows", "soft warm ambient light from background", "hint of a silk headboard" ], "time": "Late night / Bedtime", "atmosphere": "intimate, relaxing, soft luxury" }, "lighting": { "type": "Phone screen softbox effect", "key_light": "Soft cool light from phone screen illuminating the face center", "fill_light": "Warm, dim bedside lamp in background creating depth", "shadows": "Gentle contouring shadows under cheekbones and chin", "highlights": "Dewy highlights on the nose bridge, cheekbones, and forehead (skincare glow)" }, "camera_perspective": { "pov": "Selfie (arm model features, high sculpted cheekbones, defined jawline, elegant nose", "skin_texture": "Flawless but realistic texture, 'glass skin' effect (well-hydrated), visible pores but no blemishes, radiant natural glow (no foundation)", "lips": "Naturally large, full and plush lips, soft mauve/rosy natural pigment, hydrated texture", "eyes": "Large, expressive dark eyes, long natural dark lashes (no "Pushed up onto the forehead/hair", "color": "Champagne gold or blush pink", "texture": "Satin sheen" }, "top": { "type": "Silk or satin pajama camisole", "color": "Matching champagne or soft white", "details": "Delicate lace trim at neckline, thin straps, fabric draping naturally over collarbones" } }, "details": { "realism_focus": [ "Moisturizer sheen on skin (skincare routine look)", "Realistic lip texture (creases, hydration)", "Reflection of phone screen in the pupils", "Natural fabric folds of the silk pajamas and bedding", "Avoid plastic smoothing - preserve skin grain" ], "negative_prompt": [ "heavy makeup", "foundation", "cakey skin", "plastic skin", "airbrushed", "acne", "blemishes" ] } }

### 307. 玛格特·罗比 (Margot Robbie) 街拍风格

**作者**: [jennieee:3](https://x.com/jenniebae_ai/status/2013737008066183458)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个写实风格的提示词，用于生成玛格特·罗比 (Margot Robbie) 在夜晚被狗仔队偷拍的抓拍照片，强调强烈的闪光灯照明、特定的服装（褶皱小黑裙）以及以门卫为背景。

![玛格特·罗比 (Margot Robbie) 街拍风格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977298806_o0lpyr_G_I6ZYrW8AEes6U.jpg)
![玛格特·罗比 (Margot Robbie) 街拍风格](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977298795_67wthz_G_I6Y7EWsAE-t3g.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_data": {
    "type": "image_generation",
    "subject": {
      "name_likeness": "{argument name="celebrity" default="Margot Robbie"}",
      "description": "A beautiful blonde woman with a radiant, wide smile.",
      "body_type": "Fit, slender",
      "hair_style": "Blonde hair pulled back into a messy, elegant updo bun with loose tendrils framing the face.",
      "pose": "Walking forward confidently on a sidewalk, mid-stride with legs crossed slightly (catwalk style), looking ahead."
    },
    "apparel": {
      "dress": "A tight, strapless little black dress (mini dress). The fabric features heavy ruching (gathered texture) throughout the bodice and skirt.",
      "footwear": "Black, open-toe high-heeled sandals with thin straps that lace up around the ankles and lower calves.",
      "accessories": "Holding a simple black clutch bag in one hand."
    },
    "environment": {
      "setting": "Nighttime, urban exterior entrance of a high-end venue or hotel.",
      "background_details": "Dark wooden double doors with glass panels behind the subject. A concrete sidewalk.",
      "supporting_characters": "An African American man in a black suit and tie (security guard or doorman) stands in the background near the door, pointing a finger, slightly out of focus."
    },
    "photography_style": {
      "aesthetic": "Candid paparazzi style, celebrity sighting.",
      "lighting": "Direct, hard camera flash lighting typical of night press photography. The subject is brightly lit while the background falls into shadow.",
      "angle": "Eye-level to slightly low angle, full-body shot.",
      "quality": "Photorealistic, high definition, sharp focus on the subject, 8k resolution."
    }
  }
}
```

### 309. 奢华时尚街头摄影提示

**作者**: [Selina](https://x.com/selinaai_/status/2013646481325162707)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个 JSON 提示，用于生成一张奢华社论风格的、狗仔队式街拍照片，主角是一位有影响力的女性。该提示详细描述了特定的服装（祖母绿细条纹西装）、配饰（太阳镜、雪茄）、在一家高端欧洲咖啡馆里就座的姿势，以及电影般的灯光，同时明确指示模型创建一个全新的身份。

![奢华时尚街头摄影提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977281390_vy0avh_G_HozaTXoAAeTeY.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "image_editing_prompt",
  "language": "English",
  "style": "luxury editorial, paparazzi-style street photography",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",

  "identity_preservation": {
    "use_reference_image": false,
    "strict_identity_lock": false,
    "notes": "Create a completely new female identity. Facial structure, proportions, and features must be entirely different."
  },

  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "expression": "confident, cold, mysterious, powerful",
    "appearance": {
      "eyewear": "oversized black luxury sunglasses",
      "hair": "sleek straight hair, middle part, glossy finish"
    },

    "clothing": {
      "suit": {
        "color": "{argument name="suit color" default="emerald green"}",
        "pattern": "subtle gold pinstripes",
        "jacket": "double-breasted with gold buttons",
        "trousers": "matching tailored pinstriped trousers"
      },
      "shirt": "black silk dress shirt",
      "tie": "none",
      "pocket_square": "black with gold edge"
    },

    "accessories": [
      "luxury gold wristwatch",
      "minimal gold bracelet",
      "elegant gold rings"
    ],

    "props": {
      "right_hand": "holding a cigar",
      "left_hand": "holding a lighter"
    },

    "pose": {
      "position": "seated on a modern outdoor café chair",
      "body_language": "dominant, relaxed confidence",
      "elbow_position": "one elbow resting on a round marble table"
    }
  },

  "shot": {
    "type": "close-up to medium close-up",
    "framing": "chest level and above",
    "focus": "subject is the main focal point"
  },

  "environment": {
    "setting": "high-end European street café terrace",
    "background": "blurred luxury cars, city architecture",
    "lighting": "natural daylight, cinematic contrast"
  },

  "mood": "elite, boss lady, cinematic, high-fashion",
  "quality": "ultra-realistic, sharp focus, premium editorial photography"
}
```

**作者**: [Lore](https://x.com/l_w_lorenzen/status/2013639683927167453)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 这是一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的高度具体的图像编辑提示，旨在将现有图像转换为奢华的社论式狗仔队风格照片。该提示要求严格保留原始面部特征，同时添加特定的高级时尚元素：浅灰色细条纹双排扣西装、深色太阳镜、奢华配饰（腕表、链式手链）和道具（雪茄）。场景设定在一个精致的户外咖啡馆。

    "use_reference_image": true,
    "strict_identity_lock": true,
    "notes": "Preserve 100% of the original facial identity, structure, proportions, skin texture, and expression from the uploaded reference image. No facial alterations."
  },

    "gender": "female",
    "expression": "confident, serious, mysterious",
    "appearance": {
      "eyewear": "dark, thick-rimmed sunglasses concealing the eyes",
      "hair": "unchanged from reference image"
    },
    "clothing": {
      "suit": {
        "color": "light gray / silver",
        "pattern": "fine vertical pinstripes",
        "jacket": "double-breasted with two rows of dark buttons",
        "trousers": "matching gray pinstriped fabric"
      },
      "shirt": "white dress shirt",
      "tie": "dark red tie",
      "pocket_square": "dark red, neatly folded"
    },
    "accessories": [

      "wide heavy gold chain bracelet on left wrist",
      "ring on the ring finger of the right hand"
    ],
    "props": {
      "right_hand": "holding a thick cigar between the fingers",
      "left_hand": "holding a small white object (possibly a lighter)"
    },
    "pose": {
      "position": "seated on a woven rattan/wicker café chair",
      "body_language": "leaning slightly forward",
      "elbow_position": "right elbow resting on a small round table"
    }
  },
  "shot": {
    "type": "close-up to medium close-up",
    "framing": "chest level and above",
    "focus": "subject is the absolute focal point"
  },
  "environment": {
    "setting": "sophisticated outdoor café or restaurant terrace"
```

### 312. K-Pop 偶像专题：都市背景下的玻璃肌与牛仔风尚

**作者**: [QuestGlitch](https://x.com/AIRevSpot/status/2013586021632610444)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示词，用于生成一张 K-pop 偶像原型人物的超写实 8K 编辑图片，重点突出“玻璃肌”质感、特定相机光学参数（50mm, f/2.8）和服装细节（无肩带文胸、未扣的牛仔夹克），背景为模糊的城市天际线。

![K-Pop 偶像专题：都市背景下的玻璃肌与牛仔风尚](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977312640_altyik_G_GxzmxXIAAWa74.jpg)

```
{ "output_schema": { "metadata": { "camera_simulation": { "hardware": "Sony A7R IV | Canon EOS R5", "lens_optics": { "focal_length_mm": "50mm (natural eye perspective, slight intimacy)", "aperture_f": "f/2.8 (subject sharp, city background creamy bokeh)", "shutter_speed": "1/125s (freezing the pose)", "ISO": "100 (pristine image quality, no grain)" “aspect_ratio”: 4:5 }, "exposure_profile": { "dynamic_range": "High: preserved highlights in window, detailed shadows in denim", "metering": "Spot metering on face", "lighting_setup": "Natural soft window light from left, acting as a large softbox" } }, "digital_quality_profile": { "sensor_excellence": [ "60MP_full_frame_resolution: distinct fabric weave and eyelash definition", "14-bit_raw_depth: subtle skin tone transitions", "sharpness_tuned: high frequency detail on eyes and lips" ], "post_processing": [ "kpop_idol_grading: slight cool tone shadows, porcelain skin brightness", "commercial_polish: clean colors, high contrast but preserved details", "zero_noise: smooth gradients" ] } }, "anatomical_physics_displacement": { "proportions": { "ethnicity": "Korean K-pop Idol archetype, pale porcelain skin", "body_type": "Petite, slender frame, toned 11-line abs, delicate collarbones", "waist_hip_ratio": "Slim waist with subtle feminine curve" }, "physics_triggers": { "gravity": "Hair falling naturally with head tilt; denim jacket sliding off shoulder", "skin_texture": "Glass skin finish with visible pores close up, slight glow on cheekbones", "facial_features": "Doe eyes, gradient lip tint, straight eyebrows, sharp jawline", "pose_tension": "Elongated neck, relaxed torso lean, hand gently gripping hair roots" } }, "wardrobe_stress_mechanics": { "top_details": { "type": "Black branded triangle bralette (Calvin Klein style)", "fit": "Snug elastic band sitting flush against ribcage", "texture": "Cotton jersey fabric, soft sheen" }, "outerwear_details": { "type": "Oversized black denim jacket", "interaction": "Draped loosely over arms, revealing shoulders and chest, rigid denim texture" }, "bottom_details": { "type": "Black denim jeans", "state": "Unbuttoned top button, relaxed fit at hips, revealing waistband of underwear",
"fabric": "Heavyweight denim grain vs soft skin contrast" } }, "compositional_noise": { "framing": "Medium shot, subject leaning back against window sill", "background": "Blurred high-rise city skyline through glass, daylight", "atmosphere": "Chic, urban, intimate but professional editorial vibe" }, "prompt_text": { "instruction": "Generate a photorealistic 8k image. Start with the {argument name="subject type" default="K-pop idol"} subject and petite physique. Describe the specific pose leaning against the window. Detail the outfit ({argument name="outfit details" default="black bralette, unbuttoned jeans, denim jacket"}). Focus on the 'glass skin' texture and high-end photography aesthetic. End with environment details.", "mandatory_phrases": [ "Korean k-pop idol", "extremely sexy petite physique", "porcelain glass skin", "black c"

### 313. 秋日森林中的名人对比写真 (乌尔都语/英语混合)

**作者**: [Qaiser Tzq](https://x.com/TzqQaiser/status/2013576333276913769)  **日期**: 2026-01-20  **语言**: en

> 一个详细、结构化的提示，以英文和乌尔都语/印地语（罗马化）混合编写，用于生成一张对比图片，描绘西德尼·斯威尼（Sydney Sweeney）和安娜·德·阿玛斯（Ana de Armas）置身于秋季松树林中。两位人物都穿着相似的深色罗纹毛衣和牛仔裤，强调黄金时段光线、轮廓光以及古驰（Gucci）皮带扣等特定时尚细节。

![秋日森林中的名人对比写真 (乌尔都语/英语混合)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977340662_8nik2o_G_Go-l1XEAAHztL.jpg)
![秋日森林中的名人对比写真 (乌尔都语/英语混合)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768977340633_1vbami_G_Go-l7XMAAXP_D.jpg)

  },
  "visual_elements": {
    "background_analysis": {
      "trees": "Oonche aur seedhe darakht (Pine trees), jin par sunehri roshni par rahi hai.",
      "lighting_effect": "Bokeh effect aur 'Rim lighting' jo balon ke kinaron ko chamka rahi hai.",
      "ground": "Khushk patte aur ghaas (Dry foliage)."
    },
    "subject_comparison": [
      {
        "person": "{argument name="first person" default="Sydney Sweeney"}",
        "hair": "Blonde (Sunehri), darmiyan se split kiye hue.",
        "expression": "Halki muskurahat aur pur-aitamaad (Confident) pose."
      },
      {
        "person": "{argument name="second person" default="Ana de Armas"}",
        "hair": "Brunette (Gehray bhuray), seedhe aur chamakdar.",
        "expression": "Sanjeeda lekin naram (Soft) facial expression."
      }
    ]
  },
  "wardrobe_breakdown": {
    "clothing": {
      "upper_wear": "Dark charcoal grey ribbed sweater, off-the-shoulder neckline, fold-over collar style.",
      "lower_wear": "Faded light blue denim, classic 5-pocket style, high-rise waist."
    },
    "branding": {
      "belt": "Signature Gucci Leather Belt jis mein 'Double G' antique gold hardware hai.",
      "jewelry": "Small gold hoops aur ek minimalist silver/gold chain necklace."
    },
    "grooming": {
      "makeup": "Natural 'No-makeup' look, neutral lipstick.",
      "manicure": "Classic red (Surkh) nail color."
    }
  },
  "technical_data": {
    "frame_composition": "Waist-up portrait (Kamar tak ki tasveer).",
    "focal_point": "Subject ki aankhen aur belt buckle.",
    "color_palette": [
      "Golden Yellow",
      "Forest Green",
      "Charcoal Grey",
      "Denim Blue",
      "Bold Red"
    ]
  }
}

**作者**: [Noname Oasis](https://x.com/nonameoasis/status/2013338570765820273)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度结构化的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的 Ana de Armas 生活方式编辑肖像。它指定了相机设置（Sony A7 IV，35mm 镜头）、身份锁定规则、姿势、服装（柔软的针织毛衣）以及一个拥有自然窗户采光的现代阁楼环境。

![Ana de Armas 生活方式编辑肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890653727_330jwc_G_DQuSHWEAA8XqO.jpg)
![Ana de Armas 生活方式编辑肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890653715_u0zkl7_G_DQvhJXYAACqs1.jpg)

```
{
  "meta": {
    "platform": "Nano Banana Pro",
    "style": "ultra-photorealistic lifestyle editorial",
    "resolution": "high resolution",
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
    "camera": {
      "body": "Sony A7 IV",
      "lens": "FE 35mm f/1.4 GM",
      "iso": 100,
      "look": "natural shallow depth of field, soft background separation"
    }
  },

  "identity_lock": {
    "rule": "Preserve all facial features, body proportions, skin tone, hair color, hair texture, and overall appearance exactly as the reference image",
    "no_face_change": true,
    "no_body_change": true,
    "no_hair_change": true
  },

  "subject": {
    "description": "Adult woman with soft feminine features, natural proportions, calm confident presence",
    "expression": "relaxed, warm, subtly confident",
    "hair": "natural hairstyle and color preserved from reference",
    "skin": "realistic skin texture with visible pores, soft natural glow"
  },

  "pose": {
    "position": "seated or kneeling on a leather sofa",
    "posture": "relaxed lifestyle pose, gentle curves, natural body alignment",
    "hands": "resting softly on lap or sweater fabric",
    "gaze": "looking toward camera or slightly downward with calm expression"
  },

  "wardrobe": {
    "top": "soft knit sweater, cozy texture, neutral light tone",
    "bottom": "simple underwear or lounge bottom, neutral color",
    "styling_rule": "tasteful, non-explicit, lifestyle editorial balance"
  },

  "environment": {
    "location": "modern loft-style living room",
    "elements": [
      "brown leather sofa",
      "textured brick wall partially exposed",
      "soft pillows in neutral and olive tones",
      "large window with diffused daylight"
    ],
    "atmosphere": "calm, cozy, intimate but refined"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "type": "natural window light",
    "direction": "side-lit",
    "quality": "soft highlights, gentle shadows, realistic contrast"
  },

  "photography_style": {
    "genre": "lifestyle fashion portrait",
    "focus": "sharp on subject, background softly blurred",
    "color_tone": "warm neutral palette, earthy tones"
  },

  "negative_prompt": [
    "face alteration",
    "different hair color",
    "body distortion",
    "over-smoothing skin",
    "cartoon",
    "anime",
    "CGI",
    "extra limbs",
    "bad anatomy",
    "harsh lighting",
    "text",
    "watermark",
    "logo"
  ]
}
```

### 318. 欧洲城市高级时装街拍特辑

**作者**: [Melis✨](https://x.com/miilesus/status/2013328546039538111)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个高度技术化的 JSON 提示，旨在欧洲城市中生成一张高级时装街拍编辑图片。它要求根据面部参考图片严格保留身份，并根据场景参考图片重现场景，详细说明确切的服装（酒红色细条纹西装外套、蕾丝文胸、黑色手套）和技术相机设置（85 毫米镜头，干净的日光）。

![欧洲城市高级时装街拍特辑](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890681278_fnedva_G_DHTODXoAI5Hzv.jpg)
![欧洲城市高级时装街拍特辑](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890681328_xcgp6j_G_DHTpAWoAEViX-.jpg)

```
{
  "job_id": "photo_03_city_car",
  "model": "nano-banana-pro",
  "task": "image_generation",
  "inputs": {
    "face_reference_image": "<YOUR_FACE_IMAGE>",
    "scene_reference_image": "<SCENE_IMAGE_3>"
  },
  "prompt": "High-fashion street editorial in European city. EXACT SAME FACE as face_reference_image, identical identity. Recreate the scene exactly from scene_reference_image: woman leaning on a vintage car, classic European architecture background. Outfit must match exactly: {argument name="outfit color" default="burgundy pinstripe blazer"} and matching skirt with belt, black lace bra visible, black gloves, sheer black tights, gold earrings. Same pose, same body angle, same framing. Luxury magazine look, clean daylight, 85mm fashion lens feel, natural skin texture.",
  "negative_prompt": "different suit color, no lace bra, face changed, identity drift, stylized, cartoon, CGI, over-retouch, wrong car, wrong city, text, watermark, blur",
  "settings": {
    "stylization": 0,
    "quality": "max",
    "detail_boost": 0.8,
    "lighting_match": "high",
    "composition_match": "max",
    "color_match": "max",
    "identity_preservation": "max",
    "face_consistency": "max",
    "reference_strength": { "face": 1.0, "scene": 0.96 },
  }
}
```

### 321. 高端街头摄影改造

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2013196566514024800)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的指令提示，用于将上传的参考图像转换为旅行者/摄影师的高端街头摄影肖像。它要求保留姿势和构图，同时增强服装纹理，应用带有暖色边缘光的电影级冷色调分级，并模拟浅景深定焦镜头效果。

![高端街头摄影改造](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890649998_sozw27_G_BPm1FWIAAGZbR.jpg)

```
transform the photo a reference image into a high-end street-photography portrait of a traveler/photographer leaning casually on a lamp post in front of a historic tower. Keep the original pose and composition: standing with left leg bent and foot on the lamp base, right leg relaxed, left hand in jacket pocket, right hand holding a camera down by the thigh, shoulders slightly turned to camera, chin up and gaze off-frame. Preserve the camera, and textured jacket but enhance and stylize as follows:

Wardrobe & accessories: keep the dark parka/jacket but enrich fabric texture (subtle waxed canvas look), change inner hoodie to a soft charcoal knit, keep blue jeans but slightly deepened to rich indigo with natural creasing. Emphasize the high-top sneakers boost contrast on black-and-white panels and add faint scuff details for

realism. Add a small messenger bag strap across the chest and a compact leather wrist strap on the camera. Lighting & color: cinematic cool-tone grade (soft blue shadows) with warm golden rim light hitting the left side of the face and shoulder (suggest late-afternoon sun). Slightly boost contrast and midtones to create punch without losing skin detail. Add subtle film grain and gentle vignette to focus on the subject.

Camera & optics: emulate 35mm-50mm prime look, shallow DOF (f/1.8-2.8) so the tower and crowd become painterly bokeh while the subject remains razor-sharp. Slight perspective correction to emphasize the tower peek. behind his shoulder. Enhance catchlight/reflection in the eyes (or sunglasses reflection if present) and sharpen

camera details.

Background & atmosphere: keep the busy pedestrian scene but soften and desaturate it so the subject pops; raise clarity and texture on the stone tower so it reads as a strong architectural anchor. Add a few falling autumn leaves and a faint wet-pavement sheen to suggest recent rain (subtle reflections under shoes).. Final touches: natural skin retouching (preserve stubble and pores), boost micro-contrast on jacket and jeans,

accentuate lens/glass reflections on the camera. Export as photorealistic, vertical 4K editorial crop with high

detail.

Position (short): standing, left foot on lamp base, leaning against lamppost, camera in right hand, left hand in pocket, gaze off-frame.
```

**Related**: [[旅行]]、[[修复与增强]]

### 323. Image-to-Image 冬季高山肖像

**作者**: [Sudee🥀](https://x.com/NameIsSudee/status/2013182092331589997)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个用于 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 的结构化提示，它使用 Stable Diffusion XL 模型进行图像到图像的生成。它需要上传一张参考图像以保留主体的身份，并生成一张超现实的户外冬季肖像，背景是高山阳台，指定了铂金色双马尾、俏皮的表情和清晰自然的冬季日光。

![Image-to-Image 冬季高山肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890710684_0yaxud_G_BCVx7XQAASbey.jpg)
![Image-to-Image 冬季高山肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890710797_p1utsa_G_BCVwqWkAMyFyL.jpg)

```
{
  "type": "image_to_image",
  "model": "stable-diffusion-xl",
  "prompt": "Use the uploaded image as the main reference and keep the same person, face structure, skin tone, and identity. Create an ultra-realistic outdoor winter portrait on a wooden balcony in snowy alpine mountains. The person is leaning slightly forward toward the camera with a playful kiss-pout expression. Platinum blonde hair styled into two long braided pigtails. Wearing a fitted black long-sleeve top and black pants. Stylish black rectangular sunglasses. Natural fair skin texture with realistic pores and highlights. Background includes snow-covered mountains, pine trees, wooden cabins, and a clear blue winter sky. Fresh snow visible on the balcony railing. A white coffee cup placed casually on the wooden railing. Bright natural winter daylight, crisp sunlight, realistic shadows. Shot with a wide-angle lens, travel lifestyle photography, Instagram aesthetic, ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic, professional photo.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurry, low quality, distorted face, wrong identity, extra fingers, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, anime, CGI, plastic skin, overexposed snow, watermark, logo, text",
  "settings": {
    "denoise_strength": 0.5,
    "cfg_scale": 7,
    "steps": 30,
    "sampler": "DPM++ 2M Karras",
    "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
    "seed": -1
  }
}
```

**作者**: [𝐌](https://x.com/Strength04_X/status/2013153024538243479)  **日期**: 2026-01-19  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于创建垂直混合媒体数字拼贴三联画。中央条带色彩鲜艳，带有霓虹灯点缀和特定的文本叠加，而顶部和底部面板则是高对比度的黑白单色，所有部分都由逼真的撕纸边缘隔开。

![混合媒体数字拼贴画（单色与霓虹）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768890651568_vhaetw_G_An-U7XYAAb4tJ.jpg)

```
A vertical mixed-media digital collage composition featuring a triptych of the same male subject, separated by realistic torn pieces of paper with rough edges that create a layered effect. The central horizontal strip is rendered in vibrant full color, capturing the subject with the face from the uploaded reference photo, in a three-quarter angle view facing right, illuminated by bright natural sunlight that casts sharp shadows on the asphalt road. He wears a teal crewneck sweatshirt with the word "{argument name="text on shirt" default="DHINOV"}" written in a distorted font, accented by an illustration-style neon orange squiggle that follows the lines of his back and hair, accompanied by a cartoonish yellow lightning bolt element floating in a bold line.

The top and bottom are rendered in high-contrast black-and-white monochrome.

The top shows the subject standing facing forward in front of an ornamental iron gate and fence, framed by a glowing white doodle outline with jagged shapes.

The bottom section shows the subject looking down with a slight smile, standing near a parked motorbike and a building facade, also outlined in white scribbles.

The overall aesthetic blends urban streetwear photography with scrapbook-style editing, featuring high-resolution fabric textures and paper edges, 8K quality, and a modern, trendy social media editing feel.
```

> 一个高度具体的提示，用于生成具有 2000 年代初期模拟胶片美学的原始日光街头摄影。它详细描述了拍摄对象的姿势、服装、情绪和纽约市环境，最重要的是，它要求模型精确保留上传照片中的面部特征，使其适用于图像到图像或换脸任务。

![模拟街头摄影提示，附参考图像要求](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804306692_on1wz7_G-6ess-W8AETkBn.jpg)

```
Raw daylight street photography, early-2000s analog film aesthetic; man (keep original face from uploaded photo exactly, do not alter facial features in any way, no face changes even 1%) sitting low on a street object at a city corner; camera angle: low angle, camera slightly below knee level, face looking down into lens; outfit: {argument name="Outfit" default="loose beige suit, white tank top underneath, leather belt, minimal jewelry"}; action: elbows resting on knees, hands loosely clasped, posture relaxed but grounded; emotion: {argument name="Emotion" default="calm dominance, quiet confidence, emotionally closed"}; lighting: natural daylight, soft highlights on face, mild shadow under brow and jawline; textures: realistic skin pores, subtle imperfections, textured suit fabric, worn street surface; background: NYC intersection, brick buildings, traffic lights, distant pedestrians; composition: vertical frame, subject filling lower half, city towering above; film grain, slight color fade, imperfect exposure, unpolished realism.
```

### 335. 加油站街头服饰时尚摄影模板

**作者**: [Lloyd Creates](https://x.com/lloydcreates/status/2012717108031857033)  **日期**: 2026-01-18  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 结构化提示模板，用于生成以加油站为背景的高级时尚街头服饰照片。它允许选择性别和加油站品牌，确保定制服装（夹克、毛衣）与所选品牌的审美和标志相匹配，拍摄时间设定在黄金时段或霓虹灯下。

![加油站街头服饰时尚摄影模板](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768804313396_njm6uz_G-6bfsLWkAAjrhr.jpg)

```
{
  "prompt_type": "High-Fashion Streetwear Photoshoot",
  "options": {
    "selection_instruction": "Choose one gender and one gas station brand to begin the prompt generation.",
    "gender": [
      "Male",
      "Female",
      "Non-binary"
    ],
    "gas_station": [
      "Shell",
      "ExxonMobil",
      "Marathon Petroleum",
      "Chevron",
      "Valero",
      "BP",
      "Citgo",
      "RaceTrac",
      "Maverik",
      "Royal Farms",
      "Rutter’s",
      "Yesway/Allsup’s",
      "Mobil One",
      "7-Eleven"
    ]
  },
  "environment": {
    "description": "Outdoor at a gas pump at the chosen gas station.",
    "details": "The scene is set during late afternoon 'golden hour' or under neon lights at night. The clothing colors, logos, and overall aesthetic of the custom top/jacket must directly complement the branding of the selected gas station. The ground is concrete, the pumps are either vintage or modern, and there's a busy street in the background."
  },
  "subject_styling": {
    "description": "High-fashion, custom streetwear inspired by vintage racing and track aesthetics for the upper body, paired with generic bottoms. NO sunglasses are worn.",
    "materials_and_items": {
      "top_layer": {
        "instruction": "Randomly select one top layer, ensuring its style/color matches the gas station brand.",
        "options": [
          "Heavy knitwear sweater or cardigan with bold patterns/logos",
          "Oversized vintage leather racing jacket with heavy patch embroidery",
          "Premium heavyweight cotton t-shirt with a large graphic print",
          "Matching fleece set hoodie or quarter-zip sweatshirt",
          "Nylon windbreaker jacket with color-blocking"
        ]
      },
      "bottom_layer": {
        "instruction": "Randomly select one generic bottom layer.",
        "options": [
          "Generic black wide-leg pants",
          "Classic blue or black denim jeans",
          "Plain knitwear shorts",
          "Generic basketball shorts"
        ]
      }
    },
    "accessories": {
      "instruction": "Choose one.",
      "options": [
        "Vintage baseball cap",
        "Knit beanie"
      ]
    },
    "key_features": "Oversized fits, heavy patch embroidery, large typography logos, and bold color-blocking on the top layer that ties into the gas station's branding."
  },
  "poses_and_angles": {
    "instruction": "Select one pose to define the shot's composition.",
    "options": [
      "Facing the camera, holding the gas nozzle in the car, with a confident, high-fashion gaze.",
      "Back to the camera, looking over shoulder towards the street, showcasing the large back graphic/patches of the jacket.",
      "Side profile view, leaning casually against the supercar, looking off-camera.",
      "Dynamic low-angle shot, crouched near the car's fuel cap, looking up at the camera.",
      "Three-quarter view, walking away from the pump, looking back "
    ]
  }
```

### 337. 冬季运动生活方式肖像：戴着毛皮帽，嘟着嘴

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2012594878350254251)  **日期**: 2026-01-17  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张超逼真的冬季生活方式肖像，描绘一位女士在雪林中，身穿海军蓝滑雪服，头戴蓬松的白色毛皮帽，做出俏皮的嘟嘴表情。该提示强调自然的冬季光线、真实的纹理渲染，并要求提供参考图像以锁定身份和姿势。

![冬季运动生活方式肖像：戴着毛皮帽，嘟着嘴](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768717560508_05gh1h_G-4sVCPXoAADqMJ.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_winter_sport_lifestyle_portrait",
      "version": "v1.0_SNOW_FOREST_WHITE_FUR_HAT_POUT_LIFESTYLE_NO_TEXT_NO_AI",
      "priority": "highest"
    },

    "references": {
      "reference_image_1": {
        "source": "UPLOAD_REFERENCE_IMAGE (REQUIRED)",
        "purpose": "POSE_COMPOSITION_STYLE_ANCHOR",
        "strict_lock": true,
        "preserve_pose": true,
        "preserve_body_proportions": true,
        "no_body_rescale": true,
        "no_identity_blending": true,
        "no_beautify": true,
        "preserve_skin_texture": true
      }
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "natural_winter_lifestyle_photoreal",
      "sharpness": "crisp_subject_soft_background",
      "film_grain": "very_subtle",
      "color_grade": "cool_winter_neutral_skin",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2012005508769857710)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的提示，用于生成一张黑白、极致魅力的街头时尚专题摄影照片。场景中，一位身穿宽松大衣、佩戴粗大项链的男性主体居中，两侧各有一名穿着相同服装的男子。背景设定在白雪皑皑的都市景观中，摩天大楼汇聚。提示中还特别说明了要使用超广角镜头效果、柔和的冬季光线、高对比度，并包含一辆跑车和一棵小圣诞树。

![高对比度黑白街头时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631172446_yoir9n_G-wSnQgbQAcgZ6p.jpg)
![高对比度黑白街头时尚大片](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631172531_1uf0yx_G-wTe3ebQAQ-yxD.jpg)

```
A black-and-white, high-contrast, ultra-glamorous street fashion editorial photograph taken with an ultra-wide-angle lens that creates the effect of a slight perspective deformation. A vertical composition in the center of a large urban space surrounded by high-rise buildings that rise up and converge to the center of the frame, forming a dramatic architectural geometry. It's a winter day, there is an uneven layer of snow and ice on the ground, the surface is matte, with the texture of frozen asphalt. The contrast is soft at the top of the frame due to the atmospheric haze. In the foreground is the young man standing closest to the camera. He's wearing large rectangular dark sunglasses. Hairstyle-short, with dense front

styling, partially disheveled, slight asymmetry of strands. The emotion is neutral, serious, and the gaze is directed directly into the lens. He is wearing a voluminous long coat with a massive collar, under which multi-layered clothes are visible, including a thick shirt with a pronounced checkered texture. A large heavy chain with massive links hangs on the chest, visually dominating the composition. Behind, to the left and right of the man, there are two men dressed identically in dark ensembles: thick coats or jackets, smooth fabrics that emphasize a strict silhouette. They wear large chains of a similar type, stacked on top of clothes. They wear dark sunglasses. They stand statically, strictly, with their legs slightly apart, arms lowered or gathered in front of them. Their figures create balance on the sides of the frame. On the left behind there is a sports car with a low wide body and a pronounced wedge-shaped front. The polished metal reflects the

surrounding buildings and the sky. The car is parked on a snow-covered surface next to a small city Christmas tree, surrounded by metal fences..

The fir tree is fluffy and rich in tone, contrasting with the smooth surfaces of cars and skyscrapers. The urban backdrop consists of densely packed skyscrapers stretching into the misty sky. Their glass and concrete facades create vertical rhythms. The light is diffused, wintry, soft, without pronounced shadows. The color scheme is a pure monochrome palette with deep shadows and even light areas. The processing is glossy, with a light feel of an advertising photo shoot, moderate grain, high sharpness in the foreground.
```

### 345. 超逼真同脸家庭肖像

**作者**: [ぴょんきち|AI兄さん](https://x.com/yarakashiyama_/status/2011996597253480461)  **日期**: 2026-01-16  **语言**: ja

> 一个为 NanoBananaPro 设计的详细提示，旨在生成一张超写实、专业的家庭肖像。肖像中的所有个体都拥有完全相同的面部特征，100% 忠实于一张基础参考照片，同时自然地调整年龄、性别和体型。

![超逼真同脸家庭肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768631214184_5cwhfb_G-wMPPEXMAAlY9o.jpg)

```
提供された1人のベースとなる人物の写真を唯一の基準として使用する。 この人物の顔立ち、輪郭、パーツ配置、表情、雰囲気、アイデンティティは一切変更しない。

生成される家族全員は、 すべて同一人物の顔を共有している設定とし、 年齢や性別、立場が異なっていても、 顔の特徴は完全に同一とする。 顔の再現度は100%を維持する。

人数に関わらず、 すべての被写体を1枚のまとまりのあるシーンとして構成し、 プロフェッショナルで写実的な家族集合写真として仕上げる。

家族同士の距離感や立ち位置は自然で、 無理のないグループインタラクションを表現する。 体格や身長差はそれぞれの設定に応じて調整するが、 顔だけは完全に同一であることを保つ。

全員に統一感のあるカラーパレットとスタイルを使用し、 コーディネートされたマッチング衣装を着用させる。 各人物の体型は不自然に誇張せず、現実的な範囲で表現する。

背景は、 暗く、清潔感のあるプロフェッショナルなスタジオ背景。 余計な装飾は入れない。

照明はスタジオ品質の柔らかなライティング。 リアルな影、均一で自然な肌の色合い、 バランスの取れたコントラストを重視する。

顔を様式化したり、美化したり、誇張したり、 再解釈することは一切行わない。 あくまで実写的でハイエンドなポートレート表現を維持する。
```

### 348. 原始高对比度夜间文档肖像

**作者**: [Dan Reed](https://x.com/daaaaanc/status/2011816533861741047)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的图像生成提示，旨在生成原始、高对比度的夜间肖像，模仿智能手机使用强光闪光灯拍摄的快照。它高度关注生物保真度、材料物理和激进的解剖校准，确保一切都保持锐利和对焦，拒绝人工散景。

![原始高对比度夜间文档肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544760501_oghb16_G-toeSkbQAIBWO_.jpg)

```
(Vertical 9:16 smartphone aspect ratio). A raw, high-contrast {argument name="setting" default="Urban/Coastal Night Documentation"} captured with an iPhone 17 Pro. DIRECT HARD PHOTON FLASH. NO ARTIFICIAL BOKEH. Everything remains SHARP and in focus from the subject's eyelashes to the textured ground.
Subject & Identity Locking:
•Identity: Strictly preserve the exact face and unique features of the person in Image 1.
•Bio-Fidelity: Render high-fidelity "TrueLens" biological rendering: visible micro-pores, natural "satin-finish" night hydration, and a healthy cold-induced chromatic flush on the cheeks. Fine vellus hair catching the light ONLY along the jawline.
•Hair Reality: Strands of voluminous hair are captured in a dynamic mid-motion state, partially veiling the facial features naturally due to air current.
•Silhouette Calibration: Prioritize a dominant structural upper-torso volume and substantial hip-width anatomical depth. Focus on an aggressive architectural tapering at the midsection to maximize the S-curve geometry.
Outfit & Matter Physics:
•Clothing: A high-density {argument name="clothing color and pattern" default="Orange and White Floral-Patterned Underwire Bodice Top"} paired with unfastened, low-slung denim lower-apparel.
•Tension: The technical fabric exhibits extreme mechanical tension and a vacuum-tight fit, creating realistic textural expansion and skin-to-textile indentations where the material contours to her fit form.
•Physics: Realistic anatomical interaction where the structured bodice defines the fit, symmetrical volume of the upper physique.
Pose & Composition:
•Pose: Captured in an aggressive S-curve alignment. She is standing with bilateral hand-to-hip positioning, arching her spine to maximize the structural prominence of her silhouette.
•Action: Captured by a third person at a medium distance. Her hands are positioned to emphasize the high-impact proportions of her form.
Environment & Social Realism:
•Lighting: Hard Direct Optical Flash. The light creates brilliant high-key specular highlights on her skin and the floral textile, casting sharp, pitch-black shadows that define her 3D volume.
•Background (SHARP): A dark, unilluminated coastal setting. The sharp texture of the granular ground at her feet is perfectly IN FOCUS. No artificial blur.
Quality: Raw unedited social-media dump aesthetic, high dynamic range, visible digital grain in the deep shadows (ISO 1600 style), 8k resolution. Everything is sharp, detailed, and physically real.
```

### 353. 散景背景下的写实街头肖像

**作者**: [Heisenberg](https://x.com/rovvmut_/status/2011682653108650395)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 生成一张年轻女性街头写实肖像的提示词，她留着凌乱的棕色波波头。重点是柔和、漫射的日光，真实的皮肤纹理，以及浅景深（85mm 镜头，f/1.8）以虚化城市背景，突出主体手持一本印有西里尔文字的平装书。

![散景背景下的写实街头肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544827922_8m0xix_G-rutdWbQAQDYDY.jpg)

```
A photorealistic street portrait of a young woman with a short, messy brunette bob haircut, strands of hair blowing slightly across her face. She is looking directly at the camera with a soft, subtle smile. She wears an oversized beige suede jacket and a white wireless earbud in her left ear. She is clutching a paperback book with a yellow and black spine containing Cyrillic text and a pastel blue smartphone against her chest. The lighting is soft and diffused daylight. The background is a heavily blurred urban street (bokeh) with hints of blue and white tones. Shot on 85mm lens, f/1.8, high definition, authentic skin texture. 3:4
```

    "No artificial filters or glam effects",
    "No distorted anatomy",
    "No text overlays or watermarks"
  ],
  "output_goal": "Create a realistic, high-resolution 9:16 portrait of a stylish European woman sitting at an outdoor Parisian café table, using the user’s face with 100% accuracy, featuring elegant fashion, café details, and a lively yet refined CARETTE café atmosphere."
}

### 357. 逼真的微缩自互动场景

**作者**: [ぴょんきち|AI兄さん](https://x.com/yarakashiyama_/status/2011636701328715904)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: ja

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细日文提示，用于生成一张超现实的写实图像，其中主体（一个身穿黑色西装的男人）与多个迷你版的自己互动。该提示强调完美保持身份一致性、电影级布光、浅景深以及干净的深色背景，以突出非真实的比例和纹理细节，使微缩人物看起来真实。

```
提供された参照画像の人物を完全に基準とする。 顔立ち、髪型、表情、体型、服装はすべて参照画像のまま変更しない。

主人公は参照画像の男性。 {argument name="服装" default="黒のスーツ、白いシャツ、赤いネクタイ"}を着用し、 髪型や全体の雰囲気も含めて、参照画像と完全に一致させる。

彼は地面に座った姿勢で写っている。 スーツ姿のまま自然に座り込み、落ち着いた存在感を保っている。

彼の周囲には、同じ人物のミニチュア版が複数体存在する。 ミニチュアたちはすべて、 顔・髪型・体型・表情・スーツ姿の服装まで含めて、 大きな彼と完全に同一の外見。

小さなミニチュアたちは、 手のひらの上に立つ 肩の上に乗る 足元の地面に立つ など、それぞれ異なるポーズで、 大きな彼と戯れるような仕草を見せている。

全体のトーンはフォトリアルでシュール。 現実の質感を保ちながら、 非現実的なスケール感による不思議さとユーマが同時に感じられる。

背景 背景は{argument name="背景色" default="シンプルでクリーンなダークライトグレー"}。 余計な小物や装飾は一切入れない。

照明と質感 照明は柔らかく、映画的。 被写体を包み込むようなライティングで、 リアルな影と自然な被写界深度を表現する。 人物とミニチュアのサイズ差が、光と影で明確に分かる。

実写写真のような質感。 CG感やイラスト調にならないようにする。
```

**Related**: [[手绘素描]]、[[微缩模型与立体模型]]、[[超现实]]

### 358. 故障风新东京街头风格照片，搭配红色霓虹灯

**作者**: [Harboriis](https://x.com/harboriis/status/2011634939490672664)  **日期**: 2026-01-15  **语言**: en

> 一个原始、坦率的街头风格提示，用于生成一张主体穿梭于被雨水浸透的新东京小巷的图像。它着重于视觉效果：镜头上的雨滴、模糊的红色霓虹灯反射，以及带有“Critical Error”文字叠加和故障伪影的重度后期处理，模拟闪光摄影和高对比度。

![故障风新东京街头风格照片，搭配红色霓虹灯](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768544850733_r14hzq_G-rDScOaEAAutRk.jpg)

```
A raw, candid street-style shot of reference running through a rain-soaked Neo-Tokyo alleyway, glancing over her shoulder. She is wearing an oversized "Crimson Red" distressed denim jacket with safety pins and patches, the [{argument name="branding text" default="YOUR TEXT"}] branding is embroidered in white on the back. Underneath, a torn band tee. Raindrops on the camera lens create natural distortion. The background is blurred red neon signs reflecting on wet asphalt. The image is heavily processed with "Critical Error" red text overlays and glitch artifacts. Style: Flash photography, high contrast, adrenaline rush.
```

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，用于生成一张巴黎玛莱区黄金时段自信女性的超逼真街头摄影图像。该提示详细说明了法式时尚的秋季叠穿（粗花呢迷你裙、羊绒毛衣、羊毛大衣）、相机设备（徕卡 M10-R）、胶片模拟（柯达 Portra 400），以及鹅卵石街道和湿润路面反射等环境细节。

      "details": "French-chic aesthetic, tousled brunette bob haircut, natural makeup highlighting strong cheekbones. A subtle, confident smirk looking slightly off-camera.",

    },

      "materials": "Contrasting textures: rough tweed wool, soft cashmere, rigid polished leather, flowing coat fabric.",

    },

      "camera_angle": "Slightly low angle, looking up just a fraction to emphasize her powerful stride and the boots.",

      "lighting_setup": "Natural backlighting from the setting sun, supplemented by ambient light reflecting off Parisian limestone buildings.",
      "color_grading": "Kodak Portra 400 film emulation. Warm tones, rich greens and browns, natural skin texture with fine grain.",

    },

{
  "reference_usage": {
    "use_reference_for": [
      "face_identity",
      "facial_structure",
      "pose",
      "framing",
      "camera_angle",
      "lighting_style",
      "overall_composition"
    ],
    "do_not_copy": [
      "exact_outfit",
      "formal_corporate_styling",
      "celebrity_association"
    ]
  },
  "scene": {
    "type": "studio",
    "background": "soft_muted_gradient_with_subtle_texture",
    "lighting": "natural_soft_studio_lighting_with_gentle_falloff"
  },
  "subject": {
    "identity": "same_person_as_reference",
    "age_range": "late_20s_to_mid_30s",
    "pose": "relaxed_upright_head_and_shoulders_pose",
    "expression": "calm_confident_approachable_smile",
    "gaze": "direct_eye_contact_with_camera",
    "hair": {
      "style": "short_naturally_styled",
      "color": "dark_brown_or_black"
    },
    "facial_features": "match_reference_face_with_natural_variation"
  },
  "outfit": {
    "type": "smart_casual",
    "top": "solid_color_crewneck_or_lightweight_knit",
    "layer": "casual_blazer_or_unstructured_jacket",
    "colors": "{argument name="outfit colors" default="earthy_or_neutral_tones_beige_olive_charcoal"}",
    "styling": "effortless_and_modern_not_formal"
  },
  "camera": {
    "framing": "tight_head_and_upper_torso",
    "angle": "straight_on_or_slightly_above_eye_level",
    "lens": "85mm_portrait",
    "aperture": "f2.8",
    "depth_of_field": "shallow",
    "focus": "sharp_on_eyes_and_face"
  },
  "style": {
    "look": "photorealistic_editorial_casual_portrait",
    "skin_texture": "natural_detailed_realistic",
    "contrast": "soft_clean_with_warm_tones",
    "detail_level": "high"
  },
  "negative_prompt": [
    "formal_suit_and_tie",
    "corporate_headshot_style",
    "celebrity",
    "lookalike",
    "different_face_from_reference",
    "cartoon",
    "illustration",

}

### 365. 人物从智能手机屏幕中浮现（强制透视）

**作者**: [かし子🍩](https://x.com/Kashiko_AIart/status/2011431468384612478)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: ja

> 以下是两个相关的提示（A 和 B），用于生成一个角色从放置在桌上的智能手机中动态出现，且超逼真的图像。两者都使用超广角和强制透视来夸大离镜头最近的手和脸的尺寸，从而营造出 3D 弹出效果。

![人物从智能手机屏幕中浮现（强制透视）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468602600_n8jbqp_G-oKQo7aoAExHwD.jpg)
![人物从智能手机屏幕中浮现（强制透视）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468602511_49ec7v_G-oKQoiaYAEJ_dV.jpg)
![人物从智能手机屏幕中浮现（强制透视）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468602575_xymxl4_G-oKQrra0AA4YPi.jpg)
![人物从智能手机屏幕中浮现（强制透视）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468603599_megt35_G-oKQrKaMAA5B4G.jpg)

```
🍌プロンプトA
超リアルな実写写真。テーブルの上に置かれたスマホから、このキャラクターが立体的に出てきた瞬間。片方の手はこちらに伸ばし、片手をスマホのフレームにかけ、下半身はスマホの中にあり足元は見切れている。キャラクターはこちらを見つめている。
強い誇張パース（extreme wide-angle, forced perspective）により、
手と顔がカメラのすぐ近くにあり極端に大きく見え、
下半身は奥に小さく見える立体的な奥行き構成。

🍌プロンプトB
超リアルな実写写真。テーブルの上に置かれたスマホから、このキャラクターが立体的に出てきた瞬間。片方の手はこちらに伸ばし、片足をスマホのフレームにかけ、下半身はスマホの中にある。大袈裟な遠近感で近くにある顔と手が大きく見える。参考画像の雰囲気から連想されるモチーフが一緒に飛び出てくる。キャラクターはこちらを見ながら勢いよく飛び出て、モーションブラーが発生している。
```

**Related**: [[综合3D]]、[[超现实]]

### 367. 伊斯坦布尔雪景下的电影级写实街头浪漫

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2011397429568892987)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: en

> 一个高度详细的 JSON 提示，专为超逼真的图像生成而设计，重点是在伊斯坦布尔一个下雪天，拍摄一个坦率的街头浪漫场景。它指定了相机设置（35mm 镜头、平视视角、抓拍纪录片感）、光线（阴天自然光）和详细的主体描述（年轻情侣、自然皮肤纹理、特定服装），以确保生成一张高优先级的、真实的电影剧照。

![伊斯坦布尔雪景下的电影级写实街头浪漫](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468564806_golej9_G-nrRGvWMAAl0wF.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_street_romance",
      "version": "v1.3_ISTANBUL_SNOW_SNOWMAN_LOVE_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_street_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "true_to_life_winter_natural",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, imperfect framing, candid documentary feel, focus on eyes when people are present",
      "authenticity_markers": "subtle halation on snow highlights, tiny film gate weave, slight background motion blur only, real winter street texture, no studio look",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (overcast snowy daylight), deep but detailed shadows"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "{argument name="scene summary" default="Istanbul during a snowy day. A young couple in their early 20s builds a snowman together while snow continues to fall. A quiet, candid moment of shared joy—love without performance."}",

      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "the same young man and woman (early 20s), university students, ordinary and real, not model-like; faces visible and eyes sharp",
        "expression": "soft laughter, concentration, shy happiness; restrained and natural",
        "skin_and_face": "natural skin texture, slightly reddened cheeks from cold, no beauty retouch, no plastic skin"
      },

      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "female": "simple winter coat in neutral tone, scarf loosely wrapped, gloves slightly wet from snow, long hair partially tucked into coat",
        "male": "dark winter jacket, knit sweater underneath, simple jeans, gloves in hand or worn",
        "props": "partially built snowman between them, snow clinging to sleeves and hair"
      },

      "micro_action": "they roll snow together, hands brushing accidentally; one adjusts the snowman’s head while the other laughs; snowflakes collect on shoulders and eyelashes",

      "environment_details": {
        "location": "Istanbul neighborhood street or park ({argument name="location vibe" default="Moda / Kuzguncuk / university surroundings vibe"})",
        "background": "old apartment facades dusted with snow, parked cars lightly covered, bare tree branches, a few distant passersby softly blurred",
        "ground_details": "fresh snow underfoot, uneven footprints, slushy edges near the pavement"
      },

      "lighting": "soft overcast winter daylight, diffused by snowfall; gentle contrast; subtle halation on bright snow surfaces",

      "composition": "eye-level medium shot, slightly off-center framing, imperfect crop like real street ph"
    }
  }
}
```

### 368. 角色便当产品图

**作者**: [かし子🍩](https://x.com/Kashiko_AIart/status/2011375322776936639)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: ja

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 提供一个高度详细的提示，用于生成“角色便当”（以角色为主题的午餐盒）的逼真产品照片，强调商业包装设计、食物真实感、特定构图（平铺拍摄），以及使用食物来表现角色特征。

![角色便当产品图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468609460_hkiqa6_G-nXMVFbAAAme_u.jpg)
![角色便当产品图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468609470_ep2pee_G-nXMVNaQAA2ONa.jpg)
![角色便当产品图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468609822_u7yu1a_G-nXMPQbIAAusLD.jpg)
![角色便当产品图](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468610114_h7arj6_G-nXMUHbIAEAUgT.jpg)

```
キャラクター名：
（シーン・瞬間）
売り物としてパッケージされたキャラ弁風弁当の蓋が開けられ瞬間を捉えた一枚。

透明または紙製の蓋が弁当を隠さない程度に被されていて、中身が現れた瞬間。

（パッケージ・蓋の表現）
蓋の外側には、参考画像のキャラクターをモチーフにした商用向けパッケージデザインが印刷されている。参考画像を誇張した様々な売り文句がハイクオリティかつハイセンスで表示されている。

実際の駅弁売り場に並んでいそうなデザイン
キャラクターを「食」をテーマにデフォルメしたイラスト
色数は抑えめで、食品表示・ロゴ・キャッチコピー風のレイアウト
参考画像と弁当のコンセプトを大げさに反映した価格を表示する。

キャラクター性を活かたユーモラスな商品名が入っている
冒頭のキャラクター名が設定してある場合はそれを使う
印刷の光沢、紙の厚み、折り返し部分もリアルに描写
※この蓋は中身のコンセプトと強く連動している。
（構図・撮影スタイル）
テーブルの上に置かれた弁当を、**やや斜め上からの真俯瞰寄り（商品撮影的フラットレイ）**で撮影。

8K解像度、超写実的なフードフォト。

「コンビニ・デパ地下・駅弁フェア」に並んでいても違和感のないクオリティ。
（容器 - 弁当箱）
量産品らしい実在感のある弁当箱。

黒・白・木目調など、一般的な弁当容器
仕切り付き、または一体型
角の丸み、成形跡、フチの影までリアル

キャラクター表現の基本構造
顔・身体：

立体的に握られたご飯（白米／炊き込み／混ぜご飯など、コンセプトに応じて変化）
表情・輪郭：

海苔・塩昆布・胡麻・揚げパスタ・刻み野菜などで立体的に表現
コンセプト別おかず展開
参考画像の特徴を誇張したコンセプトにする。
固定メニューではなく、キャラクターや世界観に合わせて自由に変化する。
おかずはすべて実在の食材・調理法のみで構成され、

一つ一つがしっかり立体感と質感を持つ。
（色彩設計）
参照画像の色は直接使わず、
食材として自然な色のみで翻訳。
米の白・薄茶
揚げ物のきつね色
野菜の緑
トマト・梅・人参の赤
卵の黄色
海苔・胡麻の黒
「色分け」ではなく
質感・形・配置の差でキャラクターを認識させる設計。
（文字・ロゴ表現：売り物感の強化）
弁当内の空きスペースに、商品名やキャッチコピーを食材で立体表現。

参考画像の特徴を誇張したものにする。
文字も完全に“食べられるもの”で構成されている。
（背景・環境）
屋外をランダムで選定
サイドからの自然光
唐揚げの油の照り、ご飯の湿り気、野菜の瑞々しさが強調される
全体は温かみのある色温度で、売り場で一番おいしそうに見える光
（全体トーン）
「かわいい」＋「本当に売っていそう」
キャラ弁 × 商品写真 × フードシズルの融合。
```

**Related**: [[食品饮料]]、[[综合产品]]、[[手绘素描]]

### 369. 混合现实街头肖像与卡通双胞胎

**作者**: [Johnn](https://x.com/john_my07/status/2011319340684231063)  **日期**: 2026-01-14  **语言**: en

> 一个复杂的 JSON 提示，用于生成一个混合现实的街头肖像，其中包含一个逼真的主体和一个相同的卡通对应物。它指定了详细的环境设置（风化的混凝土墙、石阶）、Y2K 街头服饰风格以及严格的相机参数（50mm 镜头、f/2.8），旨在创建一张有趣、怀旧、高分辨率的图像，其中真实人物和插画人物相互互动。

![混合现实街头肖像与卡通双胞胎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468566666_oghqkc_G-mkQ1fbgAEpobD.jpg)
![混合现实街头肖像与卡通双胞胎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468566763_ezte95_G-mkQ0kaoAAgrhq.jpg)
![混合现实街头肖像与卡通双胞胎](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768468566732_i52uoe_G-mkQ2ibQAAosAB.jpg)

{
  "output_resolution": "64K_DSLR_ultra_high_detail",

  "environment": {
    "location": "urban outdoor setting",
    "background": {
      "wall": "weathered concrete wall with subtle graffiti traces",

    },

    "style": {

      "linework": "thick black outlines",
      "shading": "clean flat colors with minimal gradients",
      "inspiration": "hand-drawn street art and animated hip-hop characters"
    },
    "pose_matching": "mirrors real subject exactly in posture, scale, and alignment",
    "outfit_matching": "identical clothing, colors, and accessories as real subject",
    "interaction": {
      "visual_connection": "illustrated hand lightly overlaps or aligns with real subject’s arm",
      "effect": "playful illusion of cartoon and reality interacting"
    }
  },
  "visual_contrast": {
    "realism": ["fabric texture", "skin detail", "concrete grain", "natural shadows"],
    "illustration": ["smooth color blocks", "simplified facial features", "bold outlines"]
  },
  "camera_settings": {
    "lens": "50mm",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "depth_of_field": "moderate subject separation",
    "focus": "sharp on both real and illustrated figures"
  },

> 一个用于生成霍格沃茨风格主题肖像的提示，描绘了一位身穿黑红相间、带有格兰芬多学院色彩长袍的女孩。场景中包含魔杖、一本破旧的书和一只停在她肩上的白色猫头鹰等特定道具，背景是一堵古老的石墙，强调高品质和细节。

```
USE UPLOADED PHOTO AS REFERENCE.HOGWARTS-STYLEPHOTOSHOOT. THE GIRL IS POSING, IN A BLACK ROBE, THE UNDERSIDE OF THE ROBE IS RED, A WHITE COLLAR AND A TIED TIE OF GRYFFINDOR COLOR ARE VISIBLE. HER HAIR IS LOOSE, A DILAPIDATED, OLD BOOK IS PRESSED TO HER BODY IN HER HANDS. HE HOLDS A MAGIC WAND IN ONE HAND. A WHITE OWL SITS ON THE SHOULDER, THE BACKGROUND IS AN OLD STONE WALL, THE BACKGROUND IS SLAY. THEMATIC PHOTO SESSION. DETAILING, HIGH QUALITY.PORTRAIT.
```

      "

### 379. 保留身份的坦率都市肖像

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2010886981191131384)  **日期**: 2026-01-13  **语言**: en

> 为 Gemini Nano Banana Pro 提供一个详细的提示，用于生成一张年轻女性的轻松、坦诚的肖像照。她坐在一张白色木凳上，身穿黑色图案棒球夹克和深蓝色牛仔裤，背景是白色格子墙。该提示严格要求使用上传的照片以精确保留面部特征。

![保留身份的坦率都市肖像](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768466996795_4rssbv_G-gbC03bQAErVsL.jpg)

```
A young woman is sitting casually on a white wooden bench, positioned slightly off-center, with her legs crossed and her posture relaxed yet confident. She is leaning back comfortably, resting her left arm behind her head, creating an effortless, candid pose that feels natural and unforced. Her face is softly angled upward and slightly to the side, with a calm, thoughtful expression and a gentle, almost dreamy gaze. She has medium-length, dark black hair styled in loose, natural waves that frame her face, parted casually and falling around her shoulders. Her skin tone is warm and medium, with smooth, natural texture and minimal makeup, giving a fresh, authentic look. She is wearing a black graphic varsity-style jacket with white sleeves, featuring bold pink and white patches and text designs across the chest and arms, layered over a black top. She pairs this with relaxed-fit dark blue denim jeans, slightly faded, adding to the laid-back street-style aesthetic. Subtle accessories like rings on her fingers add personality without overpowering the look. The background features an elegant white lattice wall with geometric cut-out patterns, creating a textured, architectural backdrop that contrasts softly with her darker outfit. The setting appears outdoors or semi-outdoors, with natural daylight illuminating the scene evenly, producing soft shadows and a clean, neutral color palette dominated by whites, blacks, and muted tones. The lighting is diffused and natural, likely overcast or shaded, enhancing skin tones and preserving fine details without harsh highlights. The overall mood is relaxed, stylish, and introspective, with a modern urban-meets-classic architectural vibe. Use this uploaded photo as the only and exact face reference. The generated image must use this same face exactly as shown, without any changes to identity, facial structure, or expression.
```

### 380. 写实偷拍街头浪漫电影剧照提示词（Büyükada）

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2010792055123951967)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张超逼真、抓拍式的电影剧照，内容是一对年轻夫妇在伊斯坦布尔的 Büyükada 岛上骑自行车。该提示强调自然光、真实的皮肤纹理（无修饰）、细微的胶片颗粒感以及不完美的纪录片式构图，以捕捉一个普通而充满爱意的瞬间。

![写实偷拍街头浪漫电影剧照提示词（Büyükada）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319140374_a5gu3k_G-fEpqlXIAA6qEJ.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_street_romance",
      "version": "v1.0_BUYUKADA_BICYCLE_RIDE_LOVE_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_street_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "true_to_life_island_daylight",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, imperfect framing, candid documentary feel, focus on eyes when people are present",
      "authenticity_markers": "subtle halation on sunlit highlights, tiny film gate weave, slight background motion blur only, real street clutter, no studio look",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (soft sunny daylight + sky fill), deep but detailed shadows"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Büyükada, Istanbul. A young couple in their early 20s rides bicycles along a quiet island street. A candid, unposed film-still moment—light, real, and ordinary in the best way.",
      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "the same young man and woman (early 20s), university students, ordinary and real, not model-like; faces visible and eyes sharp when visible",
        "expression": "easy smiles, wind in hair, relaxed closeness; micro-expressions only",
        "skin_and_face": "natural skin texture, no beauty retouch, no plastic skin"
      },
      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "female": "simple casual outfit in natural tones (light top, cardigan or denim jacket), minimal makeup, long wavy hair moving with the wind",
        "male": "jeans or chinos with a plain t-shirt, neutral overshirt, no logos",
        "props": "two bicycles (classic island style), small backpacks or tote bags"
      },
      "micro_action": "they ride side by side; one looks over and laughs; the other steadies a bag on the handlebar; a brief glance that lingers while they keep moving",
      "environment_details": {
        "location": "Büyükada island street",
        "background": "historic wooden mansions with pastel paint and weathered details, bougainvillea, tree shadows on the road, a glimpse of sea light at the end of the street, a few distant pedestrians softly out of focus",
        "ground_details": "sunlit asphalt with small cracks, scattered leaves, realistic island street texture"
      },
      "lighting": "soft sunny daylight with sky fill; controlled highlights; deep but detailed shadows under bikes and faces; subtle halation on sunlit edges",
      "composition": "eye-level moving candid shot, slightly imperfect framing like a real street photographer pa"
    }
  }
}
```

Raw night street photography with flash, early-2000s aesthetic; man (KEEP ORIGINAL FACE FROM UPLOADED PHOTO EXACTLY, do not alter facial features in any way, no face changes even 1%) sitting on concrete stairs near a metal railing; outfit: black t-shirt slightly damp with sweat, loose light pants, minimal accessories; action: he runs his hand through his hair while looking off to the side, as if reacting to something outside the frame; emotion: tired, reflective, emotionally open; lighting: direct flash hitting face and chest, background falling into darkness, harsh contrast; textures: realistic skin with visible pores, light sheen of sweat, rough concrete steps; composition: medium shot, asymmetrical framing, night documentary feel; grain, noise, imperfect flash balance, unpolished realism.

### 385. 超逼真生活风时尚照片（羊毛斗篷）

**作者**: [Amanpreet Singh](https://x.com/amanxdesign/status/2010700540636958888)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 生成一张超逼真、全身、生活方式时尚照片的提示，照片中一位自然女性模特身穿炭灰色不对称羊毛披风。它强调逼真的织物纹理、欧洲街道上带有石墙背景的自然日光，以及严格的技术参数（50mm 镜头，f/4），以确保结果与真实照片无异。

![超逼真生活风时尚照片（羊毛斗篷）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319190611_c0q96d_G9rgn-raIAAfwht.jpg)
![超逼真生活风时尚照片（羊毛斗篷）](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319190693_ows5si_G9rgoDMbMAAJ3hi.png)

```
{
  "prompt": "Ultra photo-realistic full-body street-style photograph of a natural female model in her late 20s wearing a {argument name="garment color" default="charcoal gray"} asymmetric wool poncho identical to the reference, with elegant draped folds on one shoulder. The model is different from all previous references — she has shoulder-length wavy chestnut-brown hair, warm beige skin tone, and a relaxed, confident look. She is photographed outdoors in soft daylight, standing casually on a European street with a stone or marble wall background, giving a modern yet natural vibe. The outfit includes straight dark jeans, ankle boots, and a small leather crossbody bag. Lighting is soft natural daylight (around 5200 K), evenly diffused to highlight the wool texture and subtle shadows. Skin should look realistic with visible texture, eyes clear, and proportions humanly accurate. Captured with a DSLR 50 mm lens, f/4, ISO 200 for authentic focus depth. The result must look indistinguishable from a real photo — true fabric details, lifelike model expression, balanced exposure, and photographic realism.",
  "negative_prompt": "no stylized AI faces, no over-smooth skin, no symmetry artifacts, no HDR glow, no plastic look, no fantasy background, no motion blur, no duplicated limbs, no flat lighting, no cropped frame, no uncanny valley aesthetics.",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "number_of_images": 1,
  "style": "hyper-realistic lifestyle fashion",
  "quality": "ultra",
  "safety_filter_level": "strict",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "color_space": "sRGB",
    "resolution": "4k"
  }
}
```

### 386. 写实抓拍街头浪漫电影剧照提示词 (Moda Seaside)

**作者**: [Özge Döner](https://x.com/astronomerozge1/status/2010681577987055947)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 为 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张超逼真、抓拍的电影剧照，内容是一对年轻夫妇在伊斯坦布尔 Moda 海边吃西米特。提示词强调阳光充足的自然光、真实的皮肤纹理、细微的胶片颗粒感以及不完美的纪录片式构图，以捕捉日常生活中的一个宁静而充满爱意的瞬间。

![写实抓拍街头浪漫电影剧照提示词 (Moda Seaside)](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319153502_7i5y8c_G-dgGJ4XQAAv2Ak.jpg)

```
{
  "generation_request": {
    "meta_data": {
      "tool": "NanoBanana Pro",
      "task_type": "photoreal_candid_street_romance",
      "version": "v1.2_MODA_SEASIDE_SIMIT_SUNNY_CHERRY_DRESS_EN",
      "priority": "highest"
    },

    "output_settings": {
      "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
      "orientation": "portrait",
      "resolution_target": "ultra_high_res",
      "render_style": "ultra_photoreal_candid_street_film_still",
      "sharpness": "crisp_but_natural",
      "film_grain": "subtle_35mm",
      "color_grade": "true_to_life_sunny_natural",
      "dynamic_range": "natural_not_hdr",
      "skin_rendering": "real_texture_no_retouch"
    },

    "global_rules": {
      "camera_language": "35mm lens equivalent, eye-level, imperfect framing, candid documentary feel, focus on eyes when people are present",
      "authenticity_markers": "subtle halation on highlights, tiny film gate weave, real street clutter, slight background motion blur only, no studio look",
      "lighting_language": "motivated natural light only (sunlight + sky fill), deep but detailed shadows"
    },

    "creative_prompt": {
      "scene_summary": "Moda seaside in Istanbul on a sunny day. A young couple in their early 20s sits near the shore eating simit. A candid, unposed film-still moment—quiet love inside everyday life.",

      "subjects": {
        "count": 2,
        "description": "the same young man and woman (early 20s), ordinary and real, not model-like; faces visible and eyes sharp",
        "expression": "small genuine smiles, relaxed presence, natural micro-expressions",
        "skin_and_face": "natural skin texture, no beauty retouch, no plastic skin, slight imperfections preserved"
      },

      "wardrobe_and_props": {
        "female": "pink dress with colorful cherry pattern, simple fit, slightly moving in sea breeze, natural minimal makeup, long wavy hair",
        "male": "blue denim jeans and a plain white t-shirt, slightly wrinkled, no logos",
        "props": "two simits in their hands, a simple tote/backpack nearby, no branding"
      },

      "micro_action": "they break pieces of simit, share a bite, laugh softly; the wind lifts the dress hem slightly; crumbs fall naturally onto their hands",

      "environment_details": {
        "location": "Moda coast, Istanbul",
        "background": "sea horizon, gentle waves, a few distant people walking softly out of focus, seagulls in the sky, sunlit railing and rocks",
        "ground_details": "worn stone or concrete edge, small everyday clutter (a bottle cap or leaf), but clean and believable, no staged props"
      },

      "lighting": "bright sunny daylight with soft sky fill; controlled highlights; subtle halation on sunlit edges; deep but detailed shadows under chins and clothing folds",

      "composition": "eye-level medium shot, slightly off-center, imperfect framing like real street photography; faces sharp; background gently receding; no per"
    }
  }
}
```

### 387. 高对比度闪光人像，带身份锁定

**作者**: [Zara](https://x.com/ZaraIrahh/status/2010661146349756814)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: en

> 一个用于生成高分辨率、编辑风格肖像的提示，该肖像采用刺眼的正面机顶闪光灯对着混凝土墙拍摄，营造出一种原始、情绪化、高对比度的美学。它指定了拍摄对象的姿势（头部后仰，下巴抬起）、服装（带有红色字体的超大白色 T 恤），并要求使用上传的照片作为精确的面部参考，以确保身份锁定。

![高对比度闪光人像，带身份锁定](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319127389_7a63tg_G-dNpNLagAAEaq-.jpg)

```
A high-resolution, close-up editorial-style portrait of a young woman standing against a textured gray concrete wall, captured with direct on-camera flash that creates a raw, moody, high-contrast aesthetic. She is positioned slightly angled to the side with her head tilted back and chin lifted, giving an effortlessly cool, candid expression. Her face has a fair, smooth complexion with a natural sheen from the flash, soft rosy blush across the cheeks, minimal eye makeup, lightly defined brows, and glossy natural pink lips that are slightly parted, conveying a relaxed yet confident mood. Wispy strands of her dark brown hair fall loosely across her face, partially covering one eye, while the rest of her hair is pulled back into a low, casual style, enhancing the spontaneous, fashion-editorial feel. Her eyes look slightly upward and past the camera, adding to the detached, artistic vibe. She is wearing a loose-fitting white oversized T-shirt with bold red typography reading “{argument name="t-shirt text" default="CALIFORNIA"}” across the chest, along with smaller black text underneath, giving a casual streetwear aesthetic. Small, subtle stud earrings are visible, adding minimal detail without distracting from the overall look. The lighting is harsh and frontal, producing sharp shadows behind her on the wall and emphasizing skin texture, hair strands, and fabric folds, while the background remains simple and uncluttered. The color palette is muted and neutral—gray wall, white shirt, and red lettering—allowing the subject’s face and expression to remain the focal point. The overall atmosphere feels intimate, modern, slightly gritty, and effortlessly stylish, like a candid fashion snapshot captured at night with flash photography. Use this uploaded photo as the only and exact face reference. The generated image must use this same face exactly as shown, without any changes to identity, facial structure, or expression.
```

> 这是一个针对 Nano Banana Pro 的多步骤提示，首先将动物照片转换为清晰的图表，然后为小学生修改（添加假名/注音），最后将结果转换为涂色书页面。

動物の写真▶︎図解に

キレイな図解が完成
↓
小学生向けに修正
カラーリングにルビも付いてくる
↓
塗り絵にしてもらう
↓
自分だけの図解が完成♪

> 一个为 Nano Banana Pro 设计的详细提示，旨在生成一张具有扎实真实感的超写实观察式街头肖像。它指定了一位穿着日常服装（黑色皮夹克、羊毛长裤）的女性主体，在自然阴天光线下拍摄，并严格限制了人工痕迹（无塑料感皮肤、无美颜修饰、无电影化夸张）。

```
{
  "scene": "Urban street portrait on a quiet city sidewalk",
  "subject": {
    "gender": "female",
    "age_range": "late 20s to early 30s",
    "expression": "neutral, introspective, calm confidence",
    "pose": "standing casually, leaning slightly against a brick wall, weight shifted to one leg, arms relaxed",
    "gaze": "looking directly at camera, unfazed, understated presence"
  },
  "wardrobe": {

    "top": "dark charcoal ribbed tank top",
    "bottom": "high-waisted tailored wool trousers in muted grey",

    "styling_notes": "effortless, functional, lived-in fashion, no trend exaggeration"
  },

  },
  "environment": {

  },
  "lighting": {
    "type": "natural overcast daylight",
    "direction": "soft frontal with gentle side falloff",
    "contrast": "low to medium contrast",
    "notes": "no harsh highlights, no dramatic rim light"
  },
  "camera": {
    "lens": "50mm full-frame look",
    "framing": "full-body portrait, eye-level perspective",

    "movement": "static, documentary stillness"
  },

    "color_palette": "muted earth tones, soft greys, natural skin tones",
    "texture": "visible fabric weave, brick texture, light film grain",
    "grading": "neutral, slightly cool, filmic, no teal-orange"

    "no plastic skin",
    "no beauty retouching",
    "no cinematic exaggeration",
    "no fashion editorial posing",
    "no artificial glow",
    "avoid AI symmetry"
  ],
  "overall_vibe": "quiet confidence, observational, grounded realism, modern street portrait"
}

### 392. 自定义人物拿铁艺术生成提示

**作者**: [シュナプーン](https://x.com/schnapoon/status/2010501988774011142)  **日期**: 2026-01-12  **语言**: ja

> 一个结构化提示词，用于让 Nano Banana Pro 生成一张包含自定义角色的拿铁艺术照片。该提示词包含定义角色外观和名称的部分，以及关于咖啡杯、碟子、勺子、木桌和拿铁艺术风格的固定细节，以确保角色名称的文本渲染准确无误。

![自定义人物拿铁艺术生成提示](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768319237359_wddesi_G-ONAG1bcAApk2a.jpg)

```
[キャラクター設定部分]
※以下の【 】内を書き換えてください

【キャラクターの外見的特徴】:
（例：ウィンクをして笑っている、明るい茶色のロングヘアのアニメ風の少女）
{argument name="キャラクターの外見的特徴" default="茶色の髪、短いツインテール、赤い瞳、少し尖った歯（ギザ歯）。"}

【キャラクターの名前】:
（例：Latte Chan）
{argument name="キャラクターの名前" default="ツノちゃん"}

[固定部分]

真上から撮影した、木製のテーブルの上に置かれたラテアートの写真。縦長のアスペクト比。

被写体：
白いセラミックのコーヒーカップに入ったカフェラテ。
カップの下には白いソーサーがあり、その横には銀色のスプーンが添えられている。
テーブルは質感のある木目調。

ラテアートの詳細：
カップの表面のきめ細かいミルクの泡には、チョコレートソースとエスプレッソの濃淡を使って、「{argument name="キャラクターの外見的特徴" default="茶色の髪、短いツインテール、赤い瞳、少し尖った歯（ギザ歯）。"}」のイラストが繊細かつ芸術的に描かれている。
線は滑らかな茶色のシロップで描かれ、アニメスタイルの絵柄が再現されている。

小物の詳細：
カップのすぐ横に、小さな白いメモ用紙（またはカード）が置かれている。
そのメモには「{argument name="キャラクターの名前" default="ツノちゃん"}」というテキストが、読みやすい手書き風の文字ではっきりと書かれている。

画質・スタイル：
フォトリアリスティック、高解像度、温かみのあるカフェの照明、美味しそうな質感、フードフォトグラフィー。
```

### 393. 闪光灯下的夜间车内自拍

**作者**: [underwood](https://x.com/underwoodxie96/status/2010483861944434893)  **日期**: 2026-01-11  **语言**: en

> 一个详细的提示，用于生成一张在车内拍摄的、使用直射闪光灯的、真实自然的社交媒体风格夜间照片。它着重于一个特定的姿势：主体用手遮住脸，强调高对比度、光泽的头发以及汽车仪表盘的微光。

![闪光灯下的夜间车内自拍](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768225968215_0pw0kz_G-ZnvpkacAA0Am5.jpg)

```
Scene: Nighttime inside a car (driver’s seat, on the left side of the frame). The instrument cluster and center console glow with crisp cool white/blue backlighting. Outside the window is a dim roadway with streetlight bokeh, adding a slight sense of motion and an urban night atmosphere.  Subject & emotion: A young adult woman sits on the left side of the image and turns her head to the right to look back at the camera. She makes direct eye contact with a playful, subtly flirty “caught candid” vibe. She holds her left hand horizontally across the lower half of her face, revealing only her eyes and brow area—an instantly memorable gesture.  Hair & texture: Long, straight hair with a slightly center part; light blonde with even lighter highlighted streaks. The strands look smooth and glossy, catching reflections from the flash.  Outfit: A black spaghetti-strap bra-style top paired with low-rise jeans, giving an authentic “night out / getting into the car after a party” social-media feel.  Detail boosters: Nude/pale pink manicure; a delicate chain bracelet on the wrist. Warm fair skin tone. The direct flash creates high contrast and soft shadows that sculpt the body and add dimension.  Photography language: Clear smartphone on-camera flash in a dark environment. Vertical close medium framing, shot from the passenger side/back-seat angle, capturing her upper body along with the steering wheel, door trim, and dashboard—very Instagram/social-media candid.
```

**Related**: [[综合时尚]]、[[综合艺术]]、[[综合3D]]

A black structured handbag is placed on the bench to her left side, very close to her body, clearly visible in the frame. The environment is a café exterior seating area. On the left side of the image there is a plain light concrete wall; on the right side there is a light wall with rounded stone texture. Behind her, a café service window is visible with menu boards inside, and a ceiling fan can be seen through the window. Lighting is natural daylight with soft, realistic shadows. The camera is positioned at eye level, vertical portrait framing, medium-to-full body composition. The face must use the identity from the provided face reference image, blended naturally and realistically, while keeping the exact pose, body proportions, outfit, environment, object placement, and camera angle unchanged. Ultra-realistic photography, natural skin texture, no stylization.

> 以下是为 Nano Banana Pro 创建逼真图像的详细图像生成提示，该图像描绘了一个以复杂的泰式水果雕刻风格雕刻的完整西瓜，其中包含一个原创角色（OC）设计。该提示指定了复杂的细节，例如利用负空间来表现眼睛、深层雕刻以露出红色果肉以及周围的花卉浮雕。

![原创角色 (OC) 的逼真西瓜雕刻](https://cms-assets.youmind.com/media/1768226100650_1trgti_G-X2Cm1bIAAHZGr.jpg)

```
キャラクター設定（ここを変更してください）
※以下の{参照キャラクターの説明}の部分に、描きたいキャラクターの特徴を入力してください。
設定:
{参照キャラクターの説明}: {argument name="キャラクターの特徴" default="茶色の髪、短いツインテール、赤い瞳、少し尖った歯（ギザ歯）。"}

生成用プロンプト（画像生成AIに入力する文章）
※上記の{参照キャラクターの説明}の内容を含めて、以下のプロンプトを使用してください。
プロンプト:
(masterpiece, best quality, photorealistic:1.3),
[ {argument name="キャラクターの特徴" default="茶色の髪、短いツインテール、赤い瞳、少し尖った歯（ギザ歯）。"} ] が中央に彫刻された丸ごとのスイカ,

(oblique angle:1.4), (3/4 view:1.3), (side view:1.2),
スイカを斜め前から捉えた構図, ヘタは見えない,

(Intricate Thai fruit carving style:1.4),
(sculpted eyes made of watermelon skin:1.6),
(eyes are expressed only by carving lines and negative space:1.5),
(no color in eyes, monochromatic eyes:1.5),
目の部分は皮の削り残しと白い部分の段差のみで表現,
瞳の色は無くスイカの素材そのものの色,

(deep carving exposing red flesh in the background patterns:1.5),
模様部分には深く彫り込まれた赤い果肉のグラデーション,
緑の皮・白い中果皮・赤い果肉の3色のコントラスト,
キャラクターの顔の周りを囲むような優雅なバラや幾何学模様のレリーフ,唐草模様と花の彫刻,
緑色の皮と白い層のコントラストを活かした立体的な渦巻き模様,
職人技, 彫刻刀の質感,

テーブルクロスの上の銀製のお盆に置かれている,
スイカの周りには新鮮なイチゴ、ブドウ、オレンジ、ベリーなどの様々なフルーツが豪華に配置されている,
被写界深度, 明るい自然光, 鮮やかな色彩, クローズアップ, 高解像度写真, 8k

ネガティブプロンプト（除外したい要素）
ネガティブプロンプト:
(stem:1.5),iris, pupil color, makeup, painted, skin tone, colored hair, illustration, drawing, 2d, smooth skin, plain watermelon skin, simple background, text, watermark, low quality
